Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(**

  Sets With One and Two Binary Operations

  Contents
  1. Unary operations
  2. Binary operations
  2.1. General definitions
  2.2. Standard conditions on one binary operation on a set
  2.3. Elements with inverses
  2.4. Group operations
  2.5. Standard conditions on a pair of binary operations on a set
  3. Sets with one binary operation
  3.1. General definitions
  3.2. Functions compatible with a binary operation (homomorphism) and their properties
  3.3. Transport of properties of a binary operation
  3.4. Subobject
  3.5. Relations compatible with a binary operation and quotient objects
  3.6. Relations inversely compatible with a binary operation
  3.7. Homomorphisms and relations
  3.8. Quotient relations
  3.9. Direct products
  4. Sets with two binary operations
  4.1. General definitions
  4.2. Functions compatible with a pair of binary operation (homomorphisms) and their properties
  4.3. Transport of properties of a pair of binary operations
  4.4. Subobjects
  4.5. Quotient objects
  4.6. Direct products
  5. Infinitary operations

  Originally written by Vladimir Voevodsky, Aug. 2011.

 *)
Require Export UniMath.Foundations.Sets.
Require Export UniMath.MoreFoundations.Propositions.

(** * 1. Unary operations *)

Definition unop (X : UU) : UU := X → X.

(** * 2. Binary operations *)

(** * 2.1. General definitions *)

Definition islcancelable {X : UU} (opp : binop X) (x : X) : UU := isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x x0).


X: UU
opp: binop X
x: X
H_x: islcancelable opp x
y, z: X
opp x y = opp x z → y = z


X: UU
opp: binop X
x: X
H_x: islcancelable opp x
y, z: X
opp x y = opp x z → y = z

  apply invmaponpathsincl, H_x.
Defined.

Definition isrcancelable {X : UU} (opp : binop X) (x : X) : UU := isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x).


X: UU
opp: binop X
x: X
H_x: isrcancelable opp x
y, z: X
opp y x = opp z x → y = z


X: UU
opp: binop X
x: X
H_x: isrcancelable opp x
y, z: X
opp y x = opp z x → y = z

  apply (invmaponpathsincl (λ y, opp y x)), H_x.
Defined.

Definition iscancelable {X : UU} (opp : binop X) (x : X) : UU :=
  (islcancelable opp x) × (isrcancelable opp x).

Definition islinvertible {X : UU} (opp : binop X) (x : X) : UU := isweq (λ x0 : X, opp x x0).

Definition isrinvertible {X : UU} (opp : binop X) (x : X) : UU := isweq (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x).

Definition isinvertible {X : UU} (opp : binop X) (x : X) : UU :=
  (islinvertible opp x) × (isrinvertible opp x).

(** **** Transfer of binary operations relative to weak equivalences *)

Definition binop_weq_fwd {X Y : UU} (H : X ≃ Y) :
  binop X → binop Y :=
  λ (opp : binop X) (x y : Y), H (opp (invmap H x) (invmap H y)).

Definition binop_weq_bck {X Y : UU} (H : X ≃ Y) :
  binop Y → binop X :=
  λ (opp : binop Y) (x y : X), invmap H (opp (H x) (H y)).

(** * 2.2. Standard conditions on one binary operation on a set *)

Definition isassoc {X : UU} (opp : binop X) : UU :=
  ∏ x x' x'', opp (opp x x') x'' = opp x (opp x' x'').


X: hSet
opp: binop X
isaprop (isassoc opp)


X: hSet
opp: binop X
isaprop (isassoc opp)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
∏ t : X,
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ x' x'' : X,
   opp (opp t x') x'' = opp t (opp x' x''))
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
x: X
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ x' x'' : X,
   opp (opp x x') x'' = opp x (opp x' x''))

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
x: X
∏ t : X,
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ x'' : X, opp (opp x t) x'' = opp x (opp t x''))
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
x, x': X
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ x'' : X, opp (opp x x') x'' = opp x (opp x' x''))

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
x, x': X
∏ t : X,
isofhlevel 1 (opp (opp x x') t = opp x (opp x' t))
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
x, x', x'': X
isofhlevel 1 (opp (opp x x') x'' = opp x (opp x' x''))

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
x, x', x'': X
∏ x0 x'0 : opp (opp x x') x'' = opp x (opp x' x''),
iscontr (x0 = x'0)
 apply (setproperty X).
Defined.

(** Compare to [CategoryTheory.Categories.assoc4] *)

X: UU
opp: binop X
isa: isassoc opp
∏ w x y z : X,
opp (opp (opp w x) y) z = opp (opp w (opp x y)) z


X: UU
opp: binop X
isa: isassoc opp
∏ w x y z : X,
opp (opp (opp w x) y) z = opp (opp w (opp x y)) z

  
X: UU
opp: binop X
isa: isassoc opp
w, x, y, z: X
opp (opp (opp w x) y) z = opp (opp w (opp x y)) z

  repeat rewrite isa; exact (idpath _).
Qed.

(** cancellativity *)

Definition isrcancellative {X : UU} (opp : binop X) : UU :=
  ∏ x:X, isrcancelable opp x.

Definition islcancellative {X : UU} (opp : binop X) : UU :=
  ∏ x:X, islcancelable opp x.

(** *)

Definition islunit {X : UU} (opp : binop X) (un0 : X) : UU := ∏ x : X, opp un0 x = x.


X: hSet
opp: binop X
un0: X
isaprop (islunit opp un0)


X: hSet
opp: binop X
un0: X
isaprop (islunit opp un0)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
un0: X
∏ t : X, isofhlevel 1 (opp un0 t = t)
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
un0, x: X
isofhlevel 1 (opp un0 x = x)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
un0, x: X
∏ x0 x' : opp un0 x = x, iscontr (x0 = x')
 apply (setproperty X).
Defined.

Definition isrunit {X : UU} (opp : binop X) (un0 : X) : UU := ∏ x : X, opp x un0 = x.


X: hSet
opp: binop X
un0: X
isaprop (isrunit opp un0)


X: hSet
opp: binop X
un0: X
isaprop (isrunit opp un0)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
un0: X
∏ t : X, isofhlevel 1 (opp t un0 = t)
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
un0, x: X
isofhlevel 1 (opp x un0 = x)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
un0, x: X
∏ x0 x' : opp x un0 = x, iscontr (x0 = x')
 apply (setproperty X).
Defined.

Definition isunit {X : UU} (opp : binop X) (un0 : X) : UU :=
  (islunit opp un0) × (isrunit opp un0).

Definition make_isunit {X : UU} {opp : binop X} {un0 : X} (H1 : islunit opp un0)
           (H2 : isrunit opp un0) : isunit opp un0 := H1 ,, H2.

Definition isunital {X : UU} (opp : binop X) : UU := ∑ (un0 : X), isunit opp un0.

Definition make_isunital {X : UU} {opp : binop X} (un0 : X) (is : isunit opp un0) :
  isunital opp := un0 ,, is.


X: hSet
opp: binop X
isaprop (isunital opp)


X: hSet
opp: binop X
isaprop (isunital opp)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
∏ x1 x2 : X,
make_hProp (islunit opp x1) (isapropislunit opp x1)
∧ make_hProp (isrunit opp x1) (isapropisrunit opp x1)
→ make_hProp (islunit opp x2) (isapropislunit opp x2)
  ∧ make_hProp (isrunit opp x2)
      (isapropisrunit opp x2) → x1 = x2

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
u1, u2: X
make_hProp (islunit opp u1) (isapropislunit opp u1)
∧ make_hProp (isrunit opp u1) (isapropisrunit opp u1)
→ make_hProp (islunit opp u2) (isapropislunit opp u2)
  ∧ make_hProp (isrunit opp u2)
      (isapropisrunit opp u2) → u1 = u2
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
u1, u2: X
ua1: make_hProp (islunit opp u1) (isapropislunit opp u1)
∧ make_hProp (isrunit opp u1) (isapropisrunit opp u1)
ua2: make_hProp (islunit opp u2) (isapropislunit opp u2)
∧ make_hProp (isrunit opp u2) (isapropisrunit opp u2)
u1 = u2

  apply (!(pr2 ua2 u1) @ (pr1 ua1 u2)).
Defined.

(** *)

Definition ismonoidop {X : UU} (opp : binop X) : UU := (isassoc opp) × (isunital opp).

Definition make_ismonoidop {X : UU} {opp : binop X} (H1 : isassoc opp) (H2 : isunital opp) :
  ismonoidop opp := H1 ,, H2.

Definition assocax_is {X : UU} {opp : binop X} : ismonoidop opp → isassoc opp := @pr1 _ _.

Definition unel_is {X : UU} {opp : binop X} (is : ismonoidop opp) : X := pr1 (pr2 is).

Definition lunax_is {X : UU} {opp : binop X} (is : ismonoidop opp) :
  islunit opp (pr1 (pr2 is)) := pr1 (pr2 (pr2 is)).

Definition runax_is {X : UU} {opp : binop X} (is : ismonoidop opp) :
  isrunit opp (pr1 (pr2 is)) := pr2 (pr2 (pr2 is)).

Definition unax_is {X : UU} {opp : binop X} (is : ismonoidop opp) :
  isunit opp (pr1 (pr2 is)) := lunax_is is ,, runax_is is.


X: hSet
opp: binop X
isaprop (ismonoidop opp)


X: hSet
opp: binop X
isaprop (ismonoidop opp)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
isofhlevel 1 (isassoc opp)
X: hSet
opp: binop X
isofhlevel 1 (isunital opp)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
isofhlevel 1 (isunital opp)

  apply isapropisunital.
Defined.

(** * 2.3. Elements with inverses *)

Section ElementsWithInverses.
  Context {X : UU} (opp : binop X) (is : ismonoidop opp).
  Local Notation "x * y" := (opp x y).
  Local Notation u := (unel_is is).

  (** Is this element x0 the left/right inverse of x? *)

  Definition islinvel (x : X) : X → UU := λ x0, x0 * x = u.
  Definition isrinvel (x : X) : X → UU := λ x0, x * x0 = u.
  Definition isinvel (x : X) : X → UU := λ x0, (islinvel x x0) × (isrinvel x x0).

  (** Is there some element x0 that is the left/right inverse of x? *)

  Definition haslinv (x : X) : UU := ∑ x0 : X, islinvel x x0.
  Definition hasrinv (x : X) : UU := ∑ x0 : X, isrinvel x x0.
  Definition hasinv (x : X) : UU := ∑ x0 : X, isinvel x x0.

  (** Accessor functions *)
  Definition haslinv_to_linvel {x : X} : haslinv x → X := pr1.
  Definition hasrinv_to_rinvel {x : X} : hasrinv x → X := pr1.
  Definition hasinv_to_invel {x : X} : hasinv x → X := pr1.

  Definition merely_haslinv (x : X) : hProp := ∥ haslinv x ∥.
  Definition merely_hasrinv (x : X) : hProp := ∥ hasrinv x ∥.
  Definition merely_hasinv (x : X) : hProp := ∥ hasinv x ∥.

  (** Lemmas for elements with inverses *)

  (** The inverse of an element's two-sided inverse is just that element *)
  Definition is_inv_inv : ∏ (x x0 : X), (isinvel x x0 → isinvel x0 x) :=
    λ x x0 isinv, pr2 isinv ,, pr1 isinv.

  (** If two elements have left inverses, so does their product. *)
  
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
∏ x y x' y' : X,
islinvel x x'
→ islinvel y y' → islinvel (x * y) (y' * x')

  
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
∏ x y x' y' : X,
islinvel x x'
→ islinvel y y' → islinvel (x * y) (y' * x')

    
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y, x', y': X
xinv: islinvel x x'
yinv: islinvel y y'
islinvel (x * y) (y' * x')

    
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y, x', y': X
xinv: islinvel x x'
yinv: islinvel y y'
y' * x' * (x * y) = u

    
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y, x', y': X
xinv: islinvel x x'
yinv: islinvel y y'
assoc:= pr1 is: isassoc opp
y' * x' * (x * y) = u

    
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y, x', y': X
xinv: islinvel x x'
yinv: islinvel y y'
assoc:= pr1 is: isassoc opp
y' * x' * (x * y) = u

    
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y, x', y': X
xinv: islinvel x x'
yinv: islinvel y y'
assoc:= pr1 is: isassoc opp
y' * x' * x * y = u

    
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y, x', y': X
xinv: islinvel x x'
yinv: islinvel y y'
assoc:= pr1 is: isassoc opp
y' * u * y = u

    
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y, x', y': X
xinv: islinvel x x'
yinv: islinvel y y'
assoc:= pr1 is: isassoc opp
y' * y = u

    exact yinv.
  Qed.

  (** If two elements have right inverses, so does their product. *)
  
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
∏ x y x' y' : X,
isrinvel x x'
→ isrinvel y y' → isrinvel (x * y) (y' * x')

  
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
∏ x y x' y' : X,
isrinvel x x'
→ isrinvel y y' → isrinvel (x * y) (y' * x')

    
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y, x', y': X
xinv: isrinvel x x'
yinv: isrinvel y y'
isrinvel (x * y) (y' * x')

    
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y, x', y': X
xinv: isrinvel x x'
yinv: isrinvel y y'
assoc:= pr1 is: isassoc opp
isrinvel (x * y) (y' * x')

    
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y, x', y': X
xinv: isrinvel x x'
yinv: isrinvel y y'
assoc:= pr1 is: isassoc opp
x * y * (y' * x') = u

    
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y, x', y': X
xinv: isrinvel x x'
yinv: isrinvel y y'
assoc:= pr1 is: isassoc opp
x * y * y' * x' = u

    
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y, x', y': X
xinv: isrinvel x x'
yinv: isrinvel y y'
assoc:= pr1 is: isassoc opp
x * u * x' = u

    
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y, x', y': X
xinv: isrinvel x x'
yinv: isrinvel y y'
assoc:= pr1 is: isassoc opp
x * x' = u

    exact xinv.
  Qed.

  (** This is a similar statement to [grinvop] *)
  
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
∏ x y x' y' : X,
isinvel x x'
→ isinvel y y' → isinvel (x * y) (y' * x')

  
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
∏ x y x' y' : X,
isinvel x x'
→ isinvel y y' → isinvel (x * y) (y' * x')

    
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y, x', y': X
xinv: isinvel x x'
yinv: isinvel y y'
isinvel (x * y) (y' * x')

    
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y, x', y': X
xinv: isinvel x x'
yinv: isinvel y y'
islinvel (x * y) (y' * x')
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y, x', y': X
xinv: isinvel x x'
yinv: isinvel y y'
isrinvel (x * y) (y' * x')

    
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y, x', y': X
xinv: isinvel x x'
yinv: isinvel y y'
islinvel (x * y) (y' * x')
 
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y, x', y': X
xinv: isinvel x x'
yinv: isinvel y y'
islinvel x x'
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y, x', y': X
xinv: isinvel x x'
yinv: isinvel y y'
islinvel y y'

      
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y, x', y': X
xinv: isinvel x x'
yinv: isinvel y y'
islinvel x x'
 exact (dirprod_pr1 xinv).
      
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y, x', y': X
xinv: isinvel x x'
yinv: isinvel y y'
islinvel y y'
 exact (dirprod_pr1 yinv).
    
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y, x', y': X
xinv: isinvel x x'
yinv: isinvel y y'
isrinvel (x * y) (y' * x')
 
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y, x', y': X
xinv: isinvel x x'
yinv: isinvel y y'
isrinvel x x'
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y, x', y': X
xinv: isinvel x x'
yinv: isinvel y y'
isrinvel y y'

      
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y, x', y': X
xinv: isinvel x x'
yinv: isinvel y y'
isrinvel x x'
 exact (dirprod_pr2 xinv).
      
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y, x', y': X
xinv: isinvel x x'
yinv: isinvel y y'
isrinvel y y'
 exact (dirprod_pr2 yinv).
  Defined.

  
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
∏ x y : X,
merely_hasinv x
→ merely_hasinv y → merely_hasinv (x * y)

  
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
∏ x y : X,
merely_hasinv x
→ merely_hasinv y → merely_hasinv (x * y)

    
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y: X
merely_hasinv x
→ merely_hasinv y → merely_hasinv (x * y)

    
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y: X
hasinv x → hasinv y → hasinv (x * y)

    
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y: X
xinv: hasinv x
yinv: hasinv y
hasinv (x * y)

    
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y: X
xinv: hasinv x
yinv: hasinv y
isinvel (x * y)
  (hasinv_to_invel yinv * hasinv_to_invel xinv)

    
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y: X
xinv: hasinv x
yinv: hasinv y
isinvel x (hasinv_to_invel xinv)
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y: X
xinv: hasinv x
yinv: hasinv y
isinvel y (hasinv_to_invel yinv)

    
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y: X
xinv: hasinv x
yinv: hasinv y
isinvel x (hasinv_to_invel xinv)
 exact (pr2 xinv).
    
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, y: X
xinv: hasinv x
yinv: hasinv y
isinvel y (hasinv_to_invel yinv)
 exact (pr2 yinv).
  Defined.

  (** If an element has both left and right inverses, they're equal. *)
  
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, lx, rx: X
lxlinv: islinvel x lx
rxrinv: isrinvel x rx
lx = rx

  
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, lx, rx: X
lxlinv: islinvel x lx
rxrinv: isrinvel x rx
lx = rx

    
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, lx, rx: X
lxlinv: islinvel x lx
rxrinv: isrinvel x rx
lx = rx

    
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, lx, rx: X
lxlinv: islinvel x lx
rxrinv: isrinvel x rx
lx * pr12 is = rx

    
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, lx, rx: X
lxlinv: islinvel x lx
rxrinv: isrinvel x rx
lx * (x * rx) = rx

    
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, lx, rx: X
lxlinv: islinvel x lx
rxrinv: isrinvel x rx
lx * x * rx = rx

    
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x, lx, rx: X
lxlinv: islinvel x lx
rxrinv: isrinvel x rx
u * rx = rx

    apply lunax_is.
  Defined.

End ElementsWithInverses.

Section InverseOperations.
  Context {X : UU} (opp : binop X) (u : X) (inv : X → X).
  Local Notation "x * y" := (opp x y).

  Definition islinv : UU := ∏ x : X, (inv x) * x = u.
  Definition isrinv : UU := ∏ x : X, x * (inv x) = u.
  Definition isinv : UU := islinv × isrinv.
End InverseOperations.

Section ElementsWithInversesSet.
  (** When working with an hSet instead of a general type, many of the above
      statements become propositions *)

  Context {X : hSet} (opp : binop X) (is : ismonoidop opp).
  Local Notation "x * y" := (opp x y).

  Definition isapropislinvel (x x0 : X) : isaprop (islinvel opp is x x0) := setproperty X _ _.
  Definition isapropisrinvel (x x0 : X) : isaprop (isrinvel opp is x x0) := setproperty X _ _.
  Definition isapropisinvel (x x0 : X) : isaprop (isinvel opp is x x0) := isapropdirprod _ _ (isapropislinvel _ _) (isapropisrinvel _ _).

  (** If the operation is left cancellable, right inverses are unique. *)
  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: islcancelable opp x
isaprop (hasrinv opp is x)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: islcancelable opp x
isaprop (hasrinv opp is x)

    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: islcancelable opp x
isPredicate (isrinvel opp is x)
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: islcancelable opp x
∏ x0 y : X,
isrinvel opp is x x0 → isrinvel opp is x y → x0 = y

    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: islcancelable opp x
isPredicate (isrinvel opp is x)
 intro; apply isapropislinvel.
    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: islcancelable opp x
∏ x0 y : X,
isrinvel opp is x x0 → isrinvel opp is x y → x0 = y
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: islcancelable opp x
x', x'': X
islinvx': isrinvel opp is x x'
islinvx'': isrinvel opp is x x''
x' = x''

      
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: islcancelable opp x
x', x'': X
islinvx': isrinvel opp is x x'
islinvx'': isrinvel opp is x x''
isInjective (λ x0 : X, x * x0)
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: islcancelable opp x
x', x'': X
islinvx': isrinvel opp is x x'
islinvx'': isrinvel opp is x x''
x * x' = x * x''

      
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: islcancelable opp x
x', x'': X
islinvx': isrinvel opp is x x'
islinvx'': isrinvel opp is x x''
isInjective (λ x0 : X, x * x0)
 apply incl_injectivity; assumption.
      
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: islcancelable opp x
x', x'': X
islinvx': isrinvel opp is x x'
islinvx'': isrinvel opp is x x''
x * x' = x * x''
 exact (islinvx' @ !islinvx'').
  Defined.

  (** If the operation is right cancellable, left inverses are unique. *)
  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: isrcancelable opp x
isaprop (haslinv opp is x)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: isrcancelable opp x
isaprop (haslinv opp is x)

    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: isrcancelable opp x
isPredicate (islinvel opp is x)
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: isrcancelable opp x
∏ x0 y : X,
islinvel opp is x x0 → islinvel opp is x y → x0 = y

    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: isrcancelable opp x
isPredicate (islinvel opp is x)
 intro; apply isapropisrinvel.
    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: isrcancelable opp x
∏ x0 y : X,
islinvel opp is x x0 → islinvel opp is x y → x0 = y
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: isrcancelable opp x
x', x'': X
isrinvx': islinvel opp is x x'
isrinvx'': islinvel opp is x x''
x' = x''

      
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: isrcancelable opp x
x', x'': X
isrinvx': islinvel opp is x x'
isrinvx'': islinvel opp is x x''
isInjective (λ x0 : X, x0 * x)
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: isrcancelable opp x
x', x'': X
isrinvx': islinvel opp is x x'
isrinvx'': islinvel opp is x x''
x' * x = x'' * x

      
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: isrcancelable opp x
x', x'': X
isrinvx': islinvel opp is x x'
isrinvx'': islinvel opp is x x''
isInjective (λ x0 : X, x0 * x)
 apply incl_injectivity; assumption.
      
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: isrcancelable opp x
x', x'': X
isrinvx': islinvel opp is x x'
isrinvx'': islinvel opp is x x''
x' * x = x'' * x
 exact (isrinvx' @ !isrinvx'').
  Defined.

  (** For the two-sided case, we can just reuse the argument from the
      left-cancellable case. *)
  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: iscancelable opp x
isaprop (hasinv opp is x)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: iscancelable opp x
isaprop (hasinv opp is x)

    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: iscancelable opp x
isPredicate (isinvel opp is x)
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: iscancelable opp x
∏ x0 y : X,
isinvel opp is x x0 → isinvel opp is x y → x0 = y

    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: iscancelable opp x
isPredicate (isinvel opp is x)
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: iscancelable opp x
x0: X
isaprop (islinvel opp is x x0)
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: iscancelable opp x
x0: X
isaprop (isrinvel opp is x x0)

      
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: iscancelable opp x
x0: X
isaprop (islinvel opp is x x0)
 apply isapropislinvel.
      
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: iscancelable opp x
x0: X
isaprop (isrinvel opp is x x0)
 apply isapropisrinvel.
    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: iscancelable opp x
∏ x0 y : X,
isinvel opp is x x0 → isinvel opp is x y → x0 = y
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: iscancelable opp x
x', x'': X
isinvx': isinvel opp is x x'
isinvx'': isinvel opp is x x''
x' = x''

      
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: iscancelable opp x
x', x'': X
isinvx': isinvel opp is x x'
isinvx'': isinvel opp is x x''
isInjective (λ x0 : X, x * x0)
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: iscancelable opp x
x', x'': X
isinvx': isinvel opp is x x'
isinvx'': isinvel opp is x x''
x * x' = x * x''

      
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: iscancelable opp x
x', x'': X
isinvx': isinvel opp is x x'
isinvx'': isinvel opp is x x''
isInjective (λ x0 : X, x * x0)
 apply incl_injectivity; apply (pr1 can).
      
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
x: X
can: iscancelable opp x
x', x'': X
isinvx': isinvel opp is x x'
isinvx'': isinvel opp is x x''
x * x' = x * x''
 exact (pr2 isinvx' @ !pr2 isinvx'').
  Defined.

  (** The subset of elements that have inverses *)

  Definition merely_invertible_elements : hsubtype X := merely_hasinv opp is.

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
can: ∏ x : X, iscancelable opp x
hsubtype X

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
can: ∏ x : X, iscancelable opp x
hsubtype X

    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
can: ∏ x : X, iscancelable opp x
x: X
hProp

    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
can: ∏ x : X, iscancelable opp x
x: X
UU
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
can: ∏ x : X, iscancelable opp x
x: X
isaprop ?X

    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
can: ∏ x : X, iscancelable opp x
x: X
UU
 exact (hasinv opp is x).
    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
can: ∏ x : X, iscancelable opp x
x: X
isaprop (hasinv opp is x)
 apply isaprop_hasinv, can.
  Defined.

  (** If an element has an inverse, then it is cancellable *)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
a, b, c: X
c': haslinv opp is c
c * a = c * b → a = b

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
a, b, c: X
c': haslinv opp is c
c * a = c * b → a = b

    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
a, b, c: X
c': haslinv opp is c
e: c * a = c * b
a = b

    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
a, b, c: X
c': haslinv opp is c
e: c * a = c * b
pr12 is * a = pr12 is * b

    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
a, b, c: X
c': haslinv opp is c
e: c * a = c * b
pr1 c' * c * a = pr1 c' * c * b

    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
a, b, c: X
c': haslinv opp is c
e: c * a = c * b
pr1 c' * (c * a) = pr1 c' * (c * b)

    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
a, b, c: X
c': haslinv opp is c
e: c * a = c * b
c * a = c * b

    assumption.
  Defined.

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
a, b, c: X
c': hasrinv opp is c
a * c = b * c → a = b

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
a, b, c: X
c': hasrinv opp is c
a * c = b * c → a = b

    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
a, b, c: X
c': hasrinv opp is c
e: a * c = b * c
a = b

    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
a, b, c: X
c': hasrinv opp is c
e: a * c = b * c
a * pr12 is = b * pr12 is

    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
a, b, c: X
c': hasrinv opp is c
e: a * c = b * c
a * (c * pr1 c') = b * (c * pr1 c')

    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
a, b, c: X
c': hasrinv opp is c
e: a * c = b * c
a * c * pr1 c' = b * c * pr1 c'

    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
a, b, c: X
c': hasrinv opp is c
e: a * c = b * c
a * c = b * c

    assumption.
  Defined.
End ElementsWithInversesSet.

Section InversesSet.
  (** Similarly, these are propositions for hSets *)
  Context {X : hSet} (opp : binop X) (u : X) (inv : X → X).

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
u: X
inv: X → X
isaprop (islinv opp u inv)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
u: X
inv: X → X
isaprop (islinv opp u inv)

    intros; apply impred; intro; apply setproperty.
  Defined.

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
u: X
inv: X → X
isaprop (isrinv opp u inv)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
u: X
inv: X → X
isaprop (isrinv opp u inv)

    intros; apply impred; intro; apply setproperty.
  Defined.

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
u: X
inv: X → X
isaprop (isinv opp u inv)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
u: X
inv: X → X
isaprop (isinv opp u inv)

    exact (isofhleveldirprod 1 _ _ isapropislinv isapropisrinv).
  Defined.
End InversesSet.

Definition make_isinv {X : UU} {opp : binop X} {un0 : X} {inv0 : X → X} (H1 : islinv opp un0 inv0)
          (H2 : isrinv opp un0 inv0) : isinv opp un0 inv0 := H1 ,, H2.

Definition invstruct {X : UU} (opp : binop X) (is : ismonoidop opp) : UU :=
  ∑ (inv0 : X → X), isinv opp (unel_is is) inv0.

Definition make_invstruct {X : UU} {opp : binop X} {is : ismonoidop opp} (inv0 : X → X)
           (H : isinv opp (unel_is is) inv0) : invstruct opp is := inv0 ,, H.

(** * 2.4. Group operations *)

Definition isgrop {X : UU} (opp : binop X) : UU :=
  ∑ (is : ismonoidop opp), invstruct opp is.

Definition make_isgrop {X : UU} {opp : binop X} (is1 : ismonoidop opp) (is2 : invstruct opp is1) :
  isgrop opp := is1 ,, is2.

Definition pr1isgrop (X : UU) (opp : binop X) : isgrop opp → ismonoidop opp := @pr1 _ _.
Coercion pr1isgrop : isgrop >-> ismonoidop.

Definition grinv_is {X : UU} {opp : binop X} (is : isgrop opp) : X → X := pr1 (pr2 is).

Definition grlinvax_is {X : UU} {opp : binop X} (is : isgrop opp) :
  islinv opp (unel_is is) (pr1 (pr2 is)) := pr1 (pr2 (pr2 is)).

Definition grrinvax_is {X : UU} {opp : binop X} (is : isgrop opp) :
  isrinv opp (unel_is is) (pr1 (pr2 is)) := pr2 (pr2 (pr2 is)).


X: UU
opp: binop X
is: isgrop opp
x0: X
isrinvertible opp x0


X: UU
opp: binop X
is: isgrop opp
x0: X
isrinvertible opp x0

  
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
istr: invstruct opp is
x0: X
isrinvertible opp x0

  
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
istr: invstruct opp is
x0: X
f:= λ x : X, opp x x0: X → X
isrinvertible opp x0

  
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
istr: invstruct opp is
x0: X
f:= λ x : X, opp x x0: X → X
g:= λ x : X, opp x (pr1 istr x0): X → X
isrinvertible opp x0

  
X: UU
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
isun0: isunital opp
istr: invstruct opp (assoc,, isun0)
x0: X
f:= λ x : X, opp x x0: X → X
g:= λ x : X, opp x (pr1 istr x0): X → X
isrinvertible opp x0

  
X: UU
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
isun0: isunital opp
inv0: X → X
axs: isinv opp (unel_is (assoc,, isun0)) inv0
x0: X
f:= λ x : X, opp x x0: X → X
g:= λ x : X, opp x (pr1 (inv0,, axs) x0): X → X
isrinvertible opp x0

  
X: UU
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs: isunit opp un0
inv0: X → X
axs: isinv opp (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs)) inv0
x0: X
f:= λ x : X, opp x x0: X → X
g:= λ x : X, opp x (pr1 (inv0,, axs) x0): X → X
isrinvertible opp x0

  
X: UU
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs: isunit opp un0
inv0: X → X
axs: isinv opp (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs)) inv0
x0: X
f:= λ x : X, opp x x0: X → X
g:= λ x : X, opp x (inv0 x0): X → X
isrinvertible opp x0

  
X: UU
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs: isunit opp un0
inv0: X → X
axs: isinv opp (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs)) inv0
x0: X
f:= λ x : X, opp x x0: X → X
g:= λ x : X, opp x (inv0 x0): X → X
∏ x : X, g (f x) = x
X: UU
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs: isunit opp un0
inv0: X → X
axs: isinv opp (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs)) inv0
x0: X
f:= λ x : X, opp x x0: X → X
g:= λ x : X, opp x (inv0 x0): X → X
egf: ∏ x : X, g (f x) = x
isrinvertible opp x0

  
X: UU
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs: isunit opp un0
inv0: X → X
axs: isinv opp (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs)) inv0
x0: X
f:= λ x : X, opp x x0: X → X
g:= λ x : X, opp x (inv0 x0): X → X
∏ x : X, g (f x) = x

    
X: UU
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs: isunit opp un0
inv0: X → X
axs: isinv opp (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs)) inv0
x0: X
f:= λ x : X, opp x x0: X → X
g:= λ x : X, opp x (inv0 x0): X → X
x: X
g (f x) = x
 
X: UU
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs: isunit opp un0
inv0: X → X
axs: isinv opp (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs)) inv0
x0: X
f:= λ x : X, opp x x0: X → X
g:= λ x : X, opp x (inv0 x0): X → X
x: X
g (opp x x0) = x
 
X: UU
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs: isunit opp un0
inv0: X → X
axs: isinv opp (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs)) inv0
x0: X
f:= λ x : X, opp x x0: X → X
g:= λ x : X, opp x (inv0 x0): X → X
x: X
opp (opp x x0) (inv0 x0) = x

    
X: UU
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs: isunit opp un0
inv0: X → X
axs: isinv opp (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs)) inv0
x0: X
f:= λ x : X, opp x x0: X → X
g:= λ x : X, opp x (inv0 x0): X → X
x: X
opp x (opp x0 (inv0 x0)) = x

    
X: UU
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs: isunit opp un0
inv0: X → X
axs: isinv opp (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs)) inv0
x0: X
f:= λ x : X, opp x x0: X → X
g:= λ x : X, opp x (inv0 x0): X → X
x: X
e:= pr2 axs x0: opp x0 (inv0 x0) = unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs)
opp x (opp x0 (inv0 x0)) = x
 
X: UU
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs: isunit opp un0
inv0: X → X
axs: isinv opp (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs)) inv0
x0: X
f:= λ x : X, opp x x0: X → X
g:= λ x : X, opp x (inv0 x0): X → X
x: X
e:= pr2 axs x0: opp x0 (inv0 x0) = unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs)
opp x (opp x0 (inv0 x0)) = x
 
X: UU
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs: isunit opp un0
inv0: X → X
axs: isinv opp (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs)) inv0
x0: X
f:= λ x : X, opp x x0: X → X
g:= λ x : X, opp x (inv0 x0): X → X
x: X
e:= pr2 axs x0: opp x0 (inv0 x0) = unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs)
opp x (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs)) = x

    apply (pr2 unaxs x).
  
X: UU
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs: isunit opp un0
inv0: X → X
axs: isinv opp (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs)) inv0
x0: X
f:= λ x : X, opp x x0: X → X
g:= λ x : X, opp x (inv0 x0): X → X
egf: ∏ x : X, g (f x) = x
isrinvertible opp x0

  
X: UU
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs: isunit opp un0
inv0: X → X
axs: isinv opp (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs)) inv0
x0: X
f:= λ x : X, opp x x0: X → X
g:= λ x : X, opp x (inv0 x0): X → X
egf: ∏ x : X, g (f x) = x
∏ x : X, f (g x) = x
X: UU
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs: isunit opp un0
inv0: X → X
axs: isinv opp (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs)) inv0
x0: X
f:= λ x : X, opp x x0: X → X
g:= λ x : X, opp x (inv0 x0): X → X
egf: ∏ x : X, g (f x) = x
efg: ∏ x : X, f (g x) = x
isrinvertible opp x0

  
X: UU
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs: isunit opp un0
inv0: X → X
axs: isinv opp (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs)) inv0
x0: X
f:= λ x : X, opp x x0: X → X
g:= λ x : X, opp x (inv0 x0): X → X
egf: ∏ x : X, g (f x) = x
∏ x : X, f (g x) = x

    
X: UU
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs: isunit opp un0
inv0: X → X
axs: isinv opp (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs)) inv0
x0: X
f:= λ x : X, opp x x0: X → X
g:= λ x : X, opp x (inv0 x0): X → X
egf: ∏ x : X, g (f x) = x
x: X
f (g x) = x
 
X: UU
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs: isunit opp un0
inv0: X → X
axs: isinv opp (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs)) inv0
x0: X
f:= λ x : X, opp x x0: X → X
g:= λ x : X, opp x (inv0 x0): X → X
egf: ∏ x : X, g (f x) = x
x: X
opp (g x) x0 = x
 
X: UU
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs: isunit opp un0
inv0: X → X
axs: isinv opp (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs)) inv0
x0: X
f:= λ x : X, opp x x0: X → X
g:= λ x : X, opp x (inv0 x0): X → X
egf: ∏ x : X, g (f x) = x
x: X
opp (opp x (inv0 x0)) x0 = x

    
X: UU

assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs: isunit opp un0
inv0: X → X
axs: isinv opp (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs)) inv0
x0: X
f:= λ x : X, opp x x0: X → X
g:= λ x : X, opp x (inv0 x0): X → X
egf: ∏ x : X, g (f x) = x
x: X
opp x (opp (inv0 x0) x0) = x

un0: X

inv0: X → X
axs: isinv opp (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs)) inv0
x0: X
f:= λ x : X, opp x x0: X → X
g:= λ x : X, opp x (inv0 x0): X → X
egf: ∏ x : X, g (f x) = x
x: X
e:= pr1 axs x0: opp (inv0 x0) x0 = unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs)
opp x (opp (inv0 x0) x0) = x

opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp

x0: X
f:= λ x : X, opp x x0: X → X
g:= λ x : X, opp x (inv0 x0): X → X
egf: ∏ x : X, g (f x) = x

X: UU
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs: isunit opp un0
inv0: X → X
axs: isinv opp (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs)) inv0
x0: X
f:= λ x : X, opp x x0: X → X
g:= λ x : X, opp x (inv0 x0): X → X
egf: ∏ x : X, g (f x) = x
x: X
e:= pr1 axs x0: opp (inv0 x0) x0 = unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs)
opp x (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs)) = x

    apply (pr2 unaxs x).
  
X: UU
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs: isunit opp un0
inv0: X → X
axs: isinv opp (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs)) inv0
x0: X
f:= λ x : X, opp x x0: X → X
g:= λ x : X, opp x (inv0 x0): X → X
egf: ∏ x : X, g (f x) = x
efg: ∏ x : X, f (g x) = x
isrinvertible opp x0

  apply (isweq_iso _ _ egf efg).
Defined.

opp: binop X

X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
isaprop (invstruct opp is)


X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
isaprop (invstruct opp is)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
invstruct opp is → isofhlevel 1 (invstruct opp is)

is: ismonoidop opp
is0: invstruct opp is
isofhlevel 1 (invstruct opp is)

opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
is0: invstruct opp is
un0:= pr12 is: X
isofhlevel 1 (invstruct opp is)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
is0: invstruct opp is
un0:= pr12 is: X
∏ i : X → X,
isaprop
  ((∏ x : X, opp (i x) x = un0)
   × (∏ x : X, opp x (i x) = un0))

is: ismonoidop opp
is0: invstruct opp is
un0:= pr12 is: X
int: ∏ i : X → X,
isaprop ((∏ x : X, opp (i x) x = un0) × (∏ x : X, opp x (i x) = un0))
isofhlevel 1 (invstruct opp is)

is: ismonoidop opp

∏ t : X, isofhlevel 1 (opp (i t) t = un0)

opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
is0: invstruct opp is
un0:= pr12 is: X
i: X → X

X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
is0: invstruct opp is
un0:= pr12 is: X
i: X → X
x: X
∏ x0 x' : opp (i x) x = un0, iscontr (x0 = x')
 apply (setproperty X).

is: ismonoidop opp
is0: invstruct opp is

X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
is0: invstruct opp is
un0:= pr12 is: X
i: X → X
x: X
∏ x0 x' : opp x (i x) = un0, iscontr (x0 = x')
 apply (setproperty X).
  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
is0: invstruct opp is
un0:= pr12 is: X
int: ∏ i : X → X,
isaprop ((∏ x : X, opp (i x) x = un0) × (∏ x : X, opp x (i x) = un0))
isofhlevel 1 (invstruct opp is)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
is0: invstruct opp is
un0:= pr12 is: X
int: ∏ i : X → X,
isaprop ((∏ x : X, opp (i x) x = un0) × (∏ x : X, opp x (i x) = un0))
∏ x1 x2 : X → X,
make_hProp
  ((∏ x : X, opp (x1 x) x = un0)
   × (∏ x : X, opp x (x1 x) = un0)) (int x1)
→ make_hProp
    ((∏ x : X, opp (x2 x) x = un0)
     × (∏ x : X, opp x (x2 x) = un0)) (int x2)
  → x1 = x2

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
is0: invstruct opp is
un0:= pr12 is: X
int: ∏ i : X → X,
isaprop ((∏ x : X, opp (i x) x = un0) × (∏ x : X, opp x (i x) = un0))
inv1, inv2: X → X
make_hProp
  ((∏ x : X, opp (inv1 x) x = un0)
   × (∏ x : X, opp x (inv1 x) = un0)) (int inv1)
→ make_hProp
    ((∏ x : X, opp (inv2 x) x = un0)
     × (∏ x : X, opp x (inv2 x) = un0)) (int inv2)
  → inv1 = inv2
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
is0: invstruct opp is
un0:= pr12 is: X
int: ∏ i : X → X,
isaprop ((∏ x : X, opp (i x) x = un0) × (∏ x : X, opp x (i x) = un0))
inv1, inv2: X → X
(∏ x : X, opp (inv1 x) x = un0)
× (∏ x : X, opp x (inv1 x) = un0)
→ (∏ x : X, opp (inv2 x) x = un0)
  × (∏ x : X, opp x (inv2 x) = un0) → inv1 = inv2
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
is0: invstruct opp is
un0:= pr12 is: X
int: ∏ i : X → X,
isaprop ((∏ x : X, opp (i x) x = un0) × (∏ x : X, opp x (i x) = un0))
inv1, inv2: X → X
ax1: (∏ x : X, opp (inv1 x) x = un0)
× (∏ x : X, opp x (inv1 x) = un0)
(∏ x : X, opp (inv2 x) x = un0)
× (∏ x : X, opp x (inv2 x) = un0) → inv1 = inv2
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
is0: invstruct opp is
un0:= pr12 is: X
int: ∏ i : X → X,
isaprop ((∏ x : X, opp (i x) x = un0) × (∏ x : X, opp x (i x) = un0))
inv1, inv2: X → X
ax1: (∏ x : X, opp (inv1 x) x = un0)
× (∏ x : X, opp x (inv1 x) = un0)
ax2: (∏ x : X, opp (inv2 x) x = un0)
× (∏ x : X, opp x (inv2 x) = un0)
inv1 = inv2
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
is0: invstruct opp is
un0:= pr12 is: X
int: ∏ i : X → X,
isaprop ((∏ x : X, opp (i x) x = un0) × (∏ x : X, opp x (i x) = un0))
inv1, inv2: X → X
ax1: (∏ x : X, opp (inv1 x) x = un0)
× (∏ x : X, opp x (inv1 x) = un0)
ax2: (∏ x : X, opp (inv2 x) x = un0)
× (∏ x : X, opp x (inv2 x) = un0)
homotsec inv1 inv2
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
is0: invstruct opp is
un0:= pr12 is: X
int: ∏ i : X → X,
isaprop ((∏ x : X, opp (i x) x = un0) × (∏ x : X, opp x (i x) = un0))
inv1, inv2: X → X
ax1: (∏ x : X, opp (inv1 x) x = un0)
× (∏ x : X, opp x (inv1 x) = un0)
ax2: (∏ x : X, opp (inv2 x) x = un0)
× (∏ x : X, opp x (inv2 x) = un0)
x0: X
inv1 x0 = inv2 x0

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
is0: invstruct opp is
un0:= pr12 is: X
int: ∏ i : X → X,
isaprop ((∏ x : X, opp (i x) x = un0) × (∏ x : X, opp x (i x) = un0))
inv1, inv2: X → X
ax1: (∏ x : X, opp (inv1 x) x = un0)
× (∏ x : X, opp x (inv1 x) = un0)
ax2: (∏ x : X, opp (inv2 x) x = un0)
× (∏ x : X, opp x (inv2 x) = un0)
x0: X
make_weq (λ x1 : X, opp x1 x0)
  (isweqrmultingr_is (is,, is0) x0) (inv1 x0) =
make_weq (λ x1 : X, opp x1 x0)
  (isweqrmultingr_is (is,, is0) x0) (inv2 x0)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
is0: invstruct opp is
un0:= pr12 is: X
int: ∏ i : X → X,
isaprop ((∏ x : X, opp (i x) x = un0) × (∏ x : X, opp x (i x) = un0))
inv1, inv2: X → X
ax1: (∏ x : X, opp (inv1 x) x = un0)
× (∏ x : X, opp x (inv1 x) = un0)
ax2: (∏ x : X, opp (inv2 x) x = un0)
× (∏ x : X, opp x (inv2 x) = un0)
x0: X
opp (inv1 x0) x0 = opp (inv2 x0) x0
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
is0: invstruct opp is
un0:= pr12 is: X
int: ∏ i : X → X,
isaprop ((∏ x : X, opp (i x) x = un0) × (∏ x : X, opp x (i x) = un0))
inv1, inv2: X → X
ax1: (∏ x : X, opp (inv1 x) x = un0)
× (∏ x : X, opp x (inv1 x) = un0)
ax2: (∏ x : X, opp (inv2 x) x = un0)
× (∏ x : X, opp x (inv2 x) = un0)
x0: X
un0 = opp (inv2 x0) x0
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
is0: invstruct opp is
un0:= pr12 is: X
int: ∏ i : X → X,
isaprop ((∏ x : X, opp (i x) x = un0) × (∏ x : X, opp x (i x) = un0))
inv1, inv2: X → X
ax1: (∏ x : X, opp (inv1 x) x = un0)
× (∏ x : X, opp x (inv1 x) = un0)
ax2: (∏ x : X, opp (inv2 x) x = un0)
× (∏ x : X, opp x (inv2 x) = un0)
x0: X
un0 = un0
 apply idpath.
Defined.


X: hSet
opp: binop X
isaprop (isgrop opp)


X: hSet
opp: binop X
isaprop (isgrop opp)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
isofhlevel 1 (ismonoidop opp)
X: hSet
opp: binop X
∏ x : ismonoidop opp, isofhlevel 1 (invstruct opp x)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
isofhlevel 1 (ismonoidop opp)
 apply isapropismonoidop.
  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
∏ x : ismonoidop opp, isofhlevel 1 (invstruct opp x)
 apply isapropinvstruct.
Defined.

(* (** Unitary monoid where all elements are invertible is a group *)

Definition allinvvertibleinv {X : hSet} {opp : binop X} (is : ismonoidop opp)
  (allinv : ∏ x : X, islinvertible opp x) : X → X
  := λ x : X, invmap (make_weq _ (allinv x)) (unel_is is).

*)

(** The following lemma is an analog of [Bourbaki, Alg. 1, ex. 2, p. 132] *)


X: hSet
opp: binop X
is0: ismonoidop opp
is: ∏ x : X, merely_hasrinv opp is0 x
isgrop opp


X: hSet
opp: binop X
is0: ismonoidop opp
is: ∏ x : X, merely_hasrinv opp is0 x
isgrop opp

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is0: ismonoidop opp
is: ∏ x : X, merely_hasrinv opp is0 x
invstruct opp is0

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
isun0: isunital opp
is: ∏ x : X, merely_hasrinv opp (assoc,, isun0) x
invstruct opp (assoc,, isun0)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
merely_hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x
invstruct opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
invstruct opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
invstruct opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0)
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
invstruct opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
invstruct opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0)
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
invstruct opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
invstruct opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')

    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
x': X
isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')

    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
x': X
(∑ x0 : X, opp x' x0 = un0)
→ make_hProp (isofhlevelf 1 (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x'))
    (isapropisincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x'))
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
x': X
∃ x0 : X, opp x' x0 = un0

    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
x': X
(∑ x0 : X, opp x' x0 = un0)
→ make_hProp (isofhlevelf 1 (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x'))
    (isapropisincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x'))
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
x': X
int1: ∑ x0 : X, opp x' x0 = un0
make_hProp (isofhlevelf 1 (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x'))
  (isapropisincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x'))
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
x': X
int1: ∑ x0 : X, opp x' x0 = un0
isofhlevelf 1 (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
x': X
int1: ∑ x0 : X, opp x' x0 = un0
isaset X
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
x': X
int1: ∑ x0 : X, opp x' x0 = un0
isaset X
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
x': X
int1: ∑ x0 : X, opp x' x0 = un0
∏ x x'0 : X, opp x x' = opp x'0 x' → x = x'0

      
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
x': X
int1: ∑ x0 : X, opp x' x0 = un0
isaset X
 apply (pr2 X).
      
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
x': X
int1: ∑ x0 : X, opp x' x0 = un0
isaset X
 apply (pr2 X).
      
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
x': X
int1: ∑ x0 : X, opp x' x0 = un0
∏ x x'0 : X, opp x x' = opp x'0 x' → x = x'0
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
x': X
int1: ∑ x0 : X, opp x' x0 = un0
a, b: X
opp a x' = opp b x' → a = b
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
x': X
int1: ∑ x0 : X, opp x' x0 = un0
a, b: X
e: opp a x' = opp b x'
a = b

        
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
x': X
int1: ∑ x0 : X, opp x' x0 = un0
a, b: X
e: opp a x' = opp b x'
opp a un0 = b
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
x': X
int1: ∑ x0 : X, opp x' x0 = un0
a, b: X
e: opp a x' = opp b x'
opp a un0 = opp b un0

        
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
x', invx': X
eq: opp x' invx' = un0
a, b: X
e: opp a x' = opp b x'
opp a un0 = opp b un0

        
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
x', invx': X
eq: opp x' invx' = un0
a, b: X
e: opp a x' = opp b x'
opp a (opp x' invx') = opp b (opp x' invx')

        
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
x', invx': X
eq: opp x' invx' = un0
a, b: X
e: opp a x' = opp b x'
opp (opp a x') invx' = opp b (opp x' invx')

        
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
x', invx': X
eq: opp x' invx' = un0
a, b: X
e: opp a x' = opp b x'
opp (opp a x') invx' = opp (opp b x') invx'

        
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
x', invx': X
eq: opp x' invx' = un0
a, b: X
e: opp a x' = opp b x'
opp (opp b x') invx' = opp (opp b x') invx'
 apply idpath.
    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
x': X
∃ x0 : X, opp x' x0 = un0
  apply (is x').
  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
invstruct opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
invstruct opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0

    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
x: X
∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
x: X
hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x
→ ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
x: X
s1: hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x
∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0

    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
x, x': X
eq: isrinvel opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x x'
∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
x, x': X
eq: isrinvel opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x x'
∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
x, x': X
eq: isrinvel opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x x'
opp x' x = un0
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
x, x': X
eq: isrinvel opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x x'
opp x' x = un0

    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
x, x': X
eq: isrinvel opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x x'
opp (opp x' x) x' = opp un0 x'

    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
x, x': X
eq: isrinvel opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x x'
opp x' (opp x x') = opp un0 x'
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
x, x': X
eq: isrinvel opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x x'
opp x' (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0)) = opp un0 x'
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
x, x': X
eq: isrinvel opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x x'
opp x' (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0)) = x'

    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
x, x': X
eq: isrinvel opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x x'
opp x' (pr12 (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0)) = x'
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
x, x': X
eq: isrinvel opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x x'
opp x' un0 = x'
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
x, x': X
eq: isrinvel opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x x'
x' = x'
 apply idpath.
  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
invstruct opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x' x0)
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
l1': ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x' x0)
invstruct opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x' x0)

    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
x': X
isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x' x0)

    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
x': X
(∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x' = un0)
→ make_hProp (isofhlevelf 1 (λ x0 : X, opp x' x0))
    (isapropisincl (λ x0 : X, opp x' x0))
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,

l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
x': X
∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x' = un0

    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
x': X
(∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x' = un0)
→ make_hProp (isofhlevelf 1 (λ x0 : X, opp x' x0))
    (isapropisincl (λ x0 : X, opp x' x0))
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
x': X
int1: ∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x' = un0
make_hProp (isofhlevelf 1 (λ x0 : X, opp x' x0))
  (isapropisincl (λ x0 : X, opp x' x0))

isofhlevelf 1 (λ x0 : X, opp x' x0)
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')

x': X
int1: ∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x' = un0
isaset X
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0

X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
x': X
int1: ∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x' = un0
∏ x x'0 : X, opp x' x = opp x' x'0 → x = x'0

      
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
x': X
int1: ∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x' = un0
isaset X
 apply (pr2 X).

opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')

X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
x': X
int1: ∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x' = un0
a, b: X
opp x' a = opp x' b → a = b
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
x': X
int1: ∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x' = un0
a, b: X
e: opp x' a = opp x' b
a = b

        
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
x': X
int1: ∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x' = un0
a, b: X
e: opp x' a = opp x' b
opp un0 a = b
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
x': X
int1: ∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x' = un0
a, b: X
e: opp x' a = opp x' b
opp un0 a = opp un0 b

        
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
x', invx': X
eq: opp invx' x' = un0
a, b: X
e: opp x' a = opp x' b
opp un0 a = opp un0 b
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
x', invx': X
eq: opp invx' x' = un0
a, b: X
e: opp x' a = opp x' b
opp (opp invx' x') a = opp (opp invx' x') b

        
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
x', invx': X
eq: opp invx' x' = un0
a, b: X
e: opp x' a = opp x' b
opp invx' (opp x' a) = opp (opp invx' x') b

        
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
x', invx': X
eq: opp invx' x' = un0
a, b: X
e: opp x' a = opp x' b
opp invx' (opp x' a) = opp invx' (opp x' b)

        
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
x', invx': X
eq: opp invx' x' = un0
a, b: X
e: opp x' a = opp x' b
opp invx' (opp x' b) = opp invx' (opp x' b)
 apply idpath.
    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
x': X
∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x' = un0
 apply (is' x').

opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
l1': ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x' x0)
invstruct opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0)

opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X

is: ∏ x : X,

is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
l1': ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x' x0)
∏ x : X, isaprop (∑ x0 : X, (opp x0 x = un0)%logic)

is: ∏ x : X,

l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')

X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
l1': ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x' x0)
x: X
∏ x1 x2 : X,
(opp x1 x = un0)%logic
→ (opp x2 x = un0)%logic → x1 = x2
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
l1': ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x' x0)
x, x1, x2: X
(opp x1 x = un0)%logic
→ (opp x2 x = un0)%logic → x1 = x2
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
l1': ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x' x0)
x, x1, x2: X
eq1: (opp x1 x = un0)%logic
eq2: (opp x2 x = un0)%logic
x1 = x2

    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
l1': ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x' x0)
x, x1, x2: X
eq1: (opp x1 x = un0)%logic
eq2: (opp x2 x = un0)%logic
opp x1 x = opp x2 x

    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
l1': ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x' x0)
x, x1, x2: X
eq1: (opp x1 x = un0)%logic
eq2: (opp x2 x = un0)%logic
un0 = opp x2 x
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
l1': ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x' x0)
x, x1, x2: X
eq1: (opp x1 x = un0)%logic
eq2: (opp x2 x = un0)%logic
un0 = un0
 apply idpath.

X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0

X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
l1': ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x' x0)
int: ∏ x : X,
isaprop (∑ x0 : X, (opp x0 x = un0)%logic)
linv0:= λ x : X,
hinhprinv
  (make_hProp
     (∑ x0 : X, (opp x0 x = un0)%logic) 
     (int x)) (is' x): ∏ x : X,
make_hProp (∑ x0 : X, (opp x0 x = un0)%logic)
  (int x)
invstruct opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
l1': ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x' x0)
int: ∏ x : X,
isaprop (∑ x0 : X, (opp x0 x = un0)%logic)
linv0:= λ x : X,
hinhprinv
  (make_hProp (∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0)
     (int x)) (is' x): ∏ x : X, ∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
invstruct opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
l1': ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x' x0)
int: ∏ x : X,
isaprop (∑ x0 : X, (opp x0 x = un0)%logic)
linv0:= λ x : X,
hinhprinv
  (make_hProp (∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0)
     (int x)) (is' x): ∏ x : X, ∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
inv0:= λ x : X, pr1 (linv0 x): X → X
invstruct opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0)
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
l1': ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x' x0)
int: ∏ x : X,
isaprop (∑ x0 : X, (opp x0 x = un0)%logic)
linv0:= λ x : X,
hinhprinv
  (make_hProp (∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0)
     (int x)) (is' x): ∏ x : X, ∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
inv0:= λ x : X, pr1 (linv0 x): X → X
isinv opp (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0)) inv0
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
l1': ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x' x0)
int: ∏ x : X,
isaprop (∑ x0 : X, (opp x0 x = un0)%logic)
linv0:= λ x : X,
hinhprinv
  (make_hProp (∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0)
     (int x)) (is' x): ∏ x : X, ∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
inv0:= λ x : X, pr1 (linv0 x): X → X
isinv opp (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0)) inv0

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
l1': ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x' x0)
int: ∏ x : X,
isaprop (∑ x0 : X, (opp x0 x = un0)%logic)
linv0:= λ x : X,
hinhprinv
  (make_hProp (∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0)
     (int x)) (is' x): ∏ x : X, ∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
inv0:= λ x : X, pr1 (linv0 x): X → X
isrinv opp (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0)) inv0
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
l1': ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x' x0)
int: ∏ x : X,
isaprop (∑ x0 : X, (opp x0 x = un0)%logic)
linv0:= λ x : X,
hinhprinv
  (make_hProp (∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0)
     (int x)) (is' x): ∏ x : X, ∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
inv0:= λ x : X, pr1 (linv0 x): X → X
x: X
opp x (inv0 x) = unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
l1': ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x' x0)
int: ∏ x : X,
isaprop (∑ x0 : X, (opp x0 x = un0)%logic)
linv0:= λ x : X,
hinhprinv
  (make_hProp (∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0)
     (int x)) (is' x): ∏ x : X, ∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
inv0:= λ x : X, pr1 (linv0 x): X → X
x: X
opp (opp x (inv0 x)) x =
opp (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0)) x

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
l1': ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x' x0)
int: ∏ x : X,
isaprop (∑ x0 : X, (opp x0 x = un0)%logic)
linv0:= λ x : X,
hinhprinv
  (make_hProp (∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0)
     (int x)) (is' x): ∏ x : X, ∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
inv0:= λ x : X, pr1 (linv0 x): X → X
x: X
opp x (opp (inv0 x) x) =
opp (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0)) x
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)

hinhprinv
  (make_hProp (∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0)
     (int x)) (is' x): ∏ x : X, ∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
inv0:= λ x : X, pr1 (linv0 x): X → X
x: X
opp x (opp (pr1 (linv0 x)) x) =
opp (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0)) x

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
l1': ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x' x0)
int: ∏ x : X,
isaprop (∑ x0 : X, (opp x0 x = un0)%logic)
linv0:= λ x : X,
hinhprinv
  (make_hProp (∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0)
     (int x)) (is' x): ∏ x : X, ∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
inv0:= λ x : X, pr1 (linv0 x): X → X
x: X
opp x un0 = opp (unel_is (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0)) x
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
l1': ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x' x0)
int: ∏ x : X,
isaprop (∑ x0 : X, (opp x0 x = un0)%logic)
linv0:= λ x : X,
hinhprinv
  (make_hProp (∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0)
     (int x)) (is' x): ∏ x : X, ∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
inv0:= λ x : X, pr1 (linv0 x): X → X
x: X
opp x un0 = opp (pr12 (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0)) x
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
l1': ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x' x0)
int: ∏ x : X,
isaprop (∑ x0 : X, (opp x0 x = un0)%logic)
linv0:= λ x : X,
hinhprinv
  (make_hProp (∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0)
     (int x)) (is' x): ∏ x : X, ∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
inv0:= λ x : X, pr1 (linv0 x): X → X
x: X
opp x un0 = opp un0 x

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
l1': ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x' x0)
int: ∏ x : X,
isaprop (∑ x0 : X, (opp x0 x = un0)%logic)
linv0:= λ x : X,
hinhprinv
  (make_hProp (∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0)
     (int x)) (is' x): ∏ x : X, ∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
inv0:= λ x : X, pr1 (linv0 x): X → X
x: X
opp x un0 = x
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
un0: X
unaxs0: isunit opp un0
is: ∏ x : X,
ishinh_UU (hasrinv opp (assoc,, un0,, unaxs0) x)
l1: ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x')
is': ∏ x : X, ∃ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
l1': ∏ x' : X, isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x' x0)
int: ∏ x : X,
isaprop (∑ x0 : X, (opp x0 x = un0)%logic)
linv0:= λ x : X,
hinhprinv
  (make_hProp (∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0)
     (int x)) (is' x): ∏ x : X, ∑ x0 : X, opp x0 x = un0
inv0:= λ x : X, pr1 (linv0 x): X → X
x: X
x = x
 apply idpath.
Defined.

(** *)

Definition iscomm {X : UU} (opp : binop X) : UU := ∏ x x' : X, opp x x' = opp x' x.


X: hSet
opp: binop X
isaprop (iscomm opp)


X: hSet
opp: binop X
isaprop (iscomm opp)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
∏ t : X, isofhlevel 1 (∏ x' : X, opp t x' = opp x' t)
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
x: X
isofhlevel 1 (∏ x' : X, opp x x' = opp x' x)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
x: X
∏ t : X, isofhlevel 1 (opp x t = opp t x)
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
x, x': X
isofhlevel 1 (opp x x' = opp x' x)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
x, x': X
∏ x0 x'0 : opp x x' = opp x' x, iscontr (x0 = x'0)

  apply (setproperty X).
Defined.

Definition isabmonoidop {X : UU} (opp : binop X) : UU := (ismonoidop opp) × (iscomm opp).

Definition make_isabmonoidop {X : UU} {opp : binop X} (H1 : ismonoidop opp) (H2 : iscomm opp) :
  isabmonoidop opp := H1 ,, H2.

Definition pr1isabmonoidop (X : UU) (opp : binop X) : isabmonoidop opp → ismonoidop opp :=
  @pr1 _ _.
Coercion pr1isabmonoidop : isabmonoidop >-> ismonoidop.

Definition commax_is {X : UU} {opp : binop X} (is : isabmonoidop opp) : iscomm opp := pr2 is.


X: hSet
opp: binop X
isaprop (isabmonoidop opp)


X: hSet
opp: binop X
isaprop (isabmonoidop opp)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
isofhlevel 1 (ismonoidop opp)
X: hSet
opp: binop X
isofhlevel 1 (iscomm opp)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
isofhlevel 1 (iscomm opp)

  apply isapropiscomm.
Defined.


X: UU
opp: binop X
is: isabmonoidop opp
a, b, c, d: X
opp (opp a b) (opp c d) = opp (opp a c) (opp b d)


X: UU
opp: binop X
is: isabmonoidop opp
a, b, c, d: X
opp (opp a b) (opp c d) = opp (opp a c) (opp b d)

  
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
comm: iscomm opp
a, b, c, d: X
opp (opp a b) (opp c d) = opp (opp a c) (opp b d)
 
X: UU
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
unital0: isunital opp
comm: iscomm opp
a, b, c, d: X
opp (opp a b) (opp c d) = opp (opp a c) (opp b d)

  
X: UU
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
unital0: isunital opp
comm: iscomm opp
a, b, c, d: X
opp (opp a b) (opp c d) = opp (opp a c) (opp b d)

  
X: UU
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
unital0: isunital opp
comm: iscomm opp
a, b, c, d: X
opp (opp (opp a b) c) d = opp (opp a c) (opp b d)
 
X: UU
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
unital0: isunital opp
comm: iscomm opp
a, b, c, d: X
opp (opp (opp a b) c) d = opp (opp (opp a c) b) d

  
X: UU
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
unital0: isunital opp
comm: iscomm opp
a, b, c, d: X
opp (opp a (opp b c)) d = opp (opp (opp a c) b) d
 
X: UU
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
unital0: isunital opp
comm: iscomm opp
a, b, c, d: X
opp (opp a (opp b c)) d = opp (opp a (opp c b)) d

  
X: UU
opp: binop X
assoc: isassoc opp
unital0: isunital opp
comm: iscomm opp
a, b, c, d: X
opp (opp a (opp b c)) d = opp (opp a (opp b c)) d
 apply idpath.
Defined.

→ isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x)

is: iscomm opp
x: X
isl: isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x x0)

x: X

isr: isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x)

X: UU
opp: binop X
is: iscomm opp
x: X
f: islcancelable opp x → isrcancelable opp x
isr: isincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x)
x0: X
opp x0 x = opp x x0
 apply is.
  
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: iscomm opp
x: X
f: islcancelable opp x → isrcancelable opp x
g: isrcancelable opp x → islcancelable opp x
islcancelable opp x ≃ isrcancelable opp x

  
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: iscomm opp
x: X
f: islcancelable opp x → isrcancelable opp x
g: isrcancelable opp x → islcancelable opp x
isweq f

  apply (isweqimplimpl f g (isapropisincl (λ x0 : X, opp x x0))
                       (isapropisincl (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x))).
Defined.

x: X

is: iscomm opp
x: X
isl: isweq (λ x0 : X, opp x x0)
z: X
opp x z = opp z x
 apply is.

is: iscomm opp
x: X

 apply isl.

is: iscomm opp

opp: binop X
is: iscomm opp
x: X
f: islinvertible opp x → isrinvertible opp x
isr: isweq (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x)
homotsec (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x) (λ x0 : X, opp x x0)

    
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: iscomm opp
x: X
f: islinvertible opp x → isrinvertible opp x
isr: isweq (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x)
x0: X
opp x0 x = opp x x0
 apply is.
  
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: iscomm opp
x: X
f: islinvertible opp x → isrinvertible opp x
g: isrinvertible opp x → islinvertible opp x
islinvertible opp x ≃ isrinvertible opp x

  
X: UU
opp: binop X
is: iscomm opp
x: X
f: islinvertible opp x → isrinvertible opp x
g: isrinvertible opp x → islinvertible opp x
isweq f

  apply (isweqimplimpl f g (isapropisweq (λ x0 : X, opp x x0))
                       (isapropisweq (λ x0 : X, opp x0 x))).
Defined.

(* Lemma below currently requires X:hSet but should have a proof for X:UU *)


X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: iscomm opp
un0: X
islunit opp un0 ≃ isrunit opp un0


X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: iscomm opp
un0: X
islunit opp un0 ≃ isrunit opp un0

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: iscomm opp
un0: X
islunit opp un0 → isrunit opp un0
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: iscomm opp
un0: X
f: islunit opp un0 → isrunit opp un0
islunit opp un0 ≃ isrunit opp un0

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: iscomm opp
un0: X
islunit opp un0 → isrunit opp un0

    
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: iscomm opp
un0: X
(∏ x : X, opp un0 x = x) → isrunit opp un0
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: iscomm opp
un0: X
(∏ x : X, opp un0 x = x) → ∏ x : X, opp x un0 = x
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: iscomm opp
un0: X
isl: ∏ x : X, opp un0 x = x
∏ x : X, opp x un0 = x
 
X: hSet

is: iscomm opp
un0: X
isl: ∏ x : X, opp un0 x = x
x: X
opp x un0 = x

opp: binop X
is: iscomm opp
un0: X
isl: ∏ x : X, opp un0 x = x
x: X
opp un0 x = x
 apply (isl x).

un0: X

X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: iscomm opp
un0: X
f: islunit opp un0 → isrunit opp un0
g: isrunit opp un0 → islunit opp un0
isweq f

  apply (isweqimplimpl f g (isapropislunit opp un0) (isapropisrunit opp un0)).
Defined.

un0: X

g: isrinv opp un0 inv0 → islinv opp un0 inv0

X: hSet
opp: binop X
is: iscomm opp
un0: X
inv0: X → X
f: islinv opp un0 inv0 → isrinv opp un0 inv0
g: isrinv opp un0 inv0 → islinv opp un0 inv0
isweq f

  apply (isweqimplimpl f g (isapropislinv opp un0 inv0) (isapropisrinv opp un0 inv0)).
Qed.

(** *)

Definition isabgrop {X : UU} (opp : binop X) : UU := (isgrop opp) × (iscomm opp).

Definition make_isabgrop {X : UU} {opp : binop X} (H1 : isgrop opp) (H2 : iscomm opp) :
  isabgrop opp := H1 ,, H2.

Definition pr1isabgrop (X : UU) (opp : binop X) : isabgrop opp → isgrop opp := @pr1 _ _.
Coercion pr1isabgrop : isabgrop >-> isgrop.

Definition isabgroptoisabmonoidop (X : UU) (opp : binop X) : isabgrop opp → isabmonoidop opp :=
  λ is, pr1 (pr1 is) ,, pr2 is.
Coercion isabgroptoisabmonoidop : isabgrop >-> isabmonoidop.


X: hSet
opp: binop X
isaprop (isabgrop opp)


X: hSet
opp: binop X
isaprop (isabgrop opp)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
isofhlevel 1 (isgrop opp)
X: hSet
opp: binop X
isofhlevel 1 (iscomm opp)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
isofhlevel 1 (iscomm opp)

  apply isapropiscomm.
Defined.

(** * 2.5. Standard conditions on a pair of binary operations on a set *)

Definition isldistr {X : UU} (opp1 opp2 : binop X) : UU :=
  ∏ x x' x'' : X, opp2 x'' (opp1 x x') = opp1 (opp2 x'' x) (opp2 x'' x').


X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
isaprop (isldistr opp1 opp2)


X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
isaprop (isldistr opp1 opp2)

  
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
∏ t : X,
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ x' x'' : X,
   opp2 x'' (opp1 t x') =
   opp1 (opp2 x'' t) (opp2 x'' x'))
 
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
x: X
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ x' x'' : X,
   opp2 x'' (opp1 x x') =
   opp1 (opp2 x'' x) (opp2 x'' x'))

  
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
x: X
∏ t : X,
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ x'' : X,
   opp2 x'' (opp1 x t) =
   opp1 (opp2 x'' x) (opp2 x'' t))
 
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
x, x': X
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ x'' : X,
   opp2 x'' (opp1 x x') =
   opp1 (opp2 x'' x) (opp2 x'' x'))

  
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
x, x': X
∏ t : X,
isofhlevel 1
  (opp2 t (opp1 x x') = opp1 (opp2 t x) (opp2 t x'))
 
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
x, x', x'': X
isofhlevel 1
  (opp2 x'' (opp1 x x') =
   opp1 (opp2 x'' x) (opp2 x'' x'))

  
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
x, x', x'': X
∏
x0
 x'0 : opp2 x'' (opp1 x x') =
       opp1 (opp2 x'' x) (opp2 x'' x'),
iscontr (x0 = x'0)
 apply (setproperty X).
Defined.

Definition isrdistr {X : UU} (opp1 opp2 : binop X) : UU :=
  ∏ x x' x'' : X, opp2 (opp1 x x') x'' = opp1 (opp2 x x'') (opp2 x' x'').


X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
isaprop (isrdistr opp1 opp2)


X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
isaprop (isrdistr opp1 opp2)

  
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
∏ t : X,
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ x' x'' : X,
   opp2 (opp1 t x') x'' =
   opp1 (opp2 t x'') (opp2 x' x''))
 
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
x: X
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ x' x'' : X,
   opp2 (opp1 x x') x'' =
   opp1 (opp2 x x'') (opp2 x' x''))

  
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
x: X
∏ t : X,
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ x'' : X,
   opp2 (opp1 x t) x'' =
   opp1 (opp2 x x'') (opp2 t x''))
 
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
x, x': X
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ x'' : X,
   opp2 (opp1 x x') x'' =
   opp1 (opp2 x x'') (opp2 x' x''))

  
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
x, x': X
∏ t : X,
isofhlevel 1
  (opp2 (opp1 x x') t = opp1 (opp2 x t) (opp2 x' t))
 
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
x, x', x'': X
isofhlevel 1
  (opp2 (opp1 x x') x'' =
   opp1 (opp2 x x'') (opp2 x' x''))

  
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
x, x', x'': X
∏
x0
 x'0 : opp2 (opp1 x x') x'' =
       opp1 (opp2 x x'') (opp2 x' x''),
iscontr (x0 = x'0)
 apply (setproperty X).
Defined.

Definition isdistr {X : UU} (opp1 opp2 : binop X) : UU :=
  (isldistr opp1 opp2) × (isrdistr opp1 opp2).


X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
isaprop (isdistr opp1 opp2)


X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
isaprop (isdistr opp1 opp2)

  apply (isofhleveldirprod 1 _ _ (isapropisldistr _ _) (isapropisrdistr _ _)).
Defined.

x, x', x'': X
opp2 (opp1 x x') x'' = opp1 (opp2 x x'') (opp2 x' x'')
