X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
is: iscomm opp2
f: isldistr opp1 opp2 → isrdistr opp1 opp2
g: isrdistr opp1 opp2 → isldistr opp1 opp2
isldistr opp1 opp2 ≃ isrdistr opp1 opp2

  
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
is: iscomm opp2
f: isldistr opp1 opp2 → isrdistr opp1 opp2
g: isrdistr opp1 opp2 → isldistr opp1 opp2
isweq f

  apply (isweqimplimpl f g (isapropisldistr opp1 opp2) (isapropisrdistr opp1 opp2)).
Defined.

(** *)

Definition isabsorb {X : UU} (opp1 opp2 : binop X) : UU :=
  ∏ x y : X, opp1 x (opp2 x y) = x.


X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
isaprop (isabsorb opp1 opp2)


X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
isaprop (isabsorb opp1 opp2)

  
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
x: X
isaprop (∏ y : X, opp1 x (opp2 x y) = x)

  
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
x, y: X
isaprop (opp1 x (opp2 x y) = x)

  apply (setproperty X).
Defined.

(** *)

Definition isrigops {X : UU} (opp1 opp2 : binop X) : UU :=
  (∑ axs : (isabmonoidop opp1) × (ismonoidop opp2),
           (∏ x : X, opp2 (unel_is (pr1 axs)) x = unel_is (pr1 axs))
             × (∏ x : X, opp2 x (unel_is (pr1 axs)) = unel_is (pr1 axs)))
    × (isdistr opp1 opp2).

Definition make_isrigops {X : UU} {opp1 opp2 : binop X} (H1 : isabmonoidop opp1)
           (H2 : ismonoidop opp2) (H3 : ∏ x : X, (opp2 (unel_is H1) x) = (unel_is H1))
           (H4 : ∏ x : X, (opp2 x (unel_is H1)) = (unel_is H1))
           (H5 : isdistr opp1 opp2) : isrigops opp1 opp2 :=
  ((H1 ,, H2) ,, H3 ,, H4) ,, H5.

Definition rigop1axs_is {X : UU} {opp1 opp2 : binop X} :
  isrigops opp1 opp2 → isabmonoidop opp1 := λ is, pr1 (pr1 (pr1 is)).

Definition rigop2axs_is {X : UU} {opp1 opp2 : binop X} : isrigops opp1 opp2 → ismonoidop opp2 :=
  λ is, pr2 (pr1 (pr1 is)).

Definition rigdistraxs_is {X : UU} {opp1 opp2 : binop X} :
  isrigops opp1 opp2 → isdistr opp1 opp2 := λ is,  pr2 is.

Definition rigldistrax_is {X : UU} {opp1 opp2 : binop X} :
  isrigops opp1 opp2 → isldistr opp1 opp2 := λ is, pr1 (pr2 is).

Definition rigrdistrax_is {X : UU} {opp1 opp2 : binop X} :
  isrigops opp1 opp2 → isrdistr opp1 opp2 := λ is, pr2 (pr2 is).

Definition rigunel1_is {X : UU} {opp1 opp2 : binop X} (is : isrigops opp1 opp2) : X :=
  pr1 (pr2 (pr1 (rigop1axs_is is))).

Definition rigunel2_is {X : UU} {opp1 opp2 : binop X} (is : isrigops opp1 opp2) : X :=
  (pr1 (pr2 (rigop2axs_is is))).

Definition rigmult0x_is {X : UU} {opp1 opp2 : binop X} (is : isrigops opp1 opp2) (x : X) :
  opp2 (rigunel1_is is) x = rigunel1_is is := pr1 (pr2 (pr1 is)) x.

Definition rigmultx0_is {X : UU} {opp1 opp2 : binop X} (is : isrigops opp1 opp2) (x : X) :
  opp2 x (rigunel1_is is) = rigunel1_is is := pr2 (pr2 (pr1 is)) x.


X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
isaprop (isrigops opp1 opp2)


X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
isaprop (isrigops opp1 opp2)

  
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
isofhlevel 1
  (∑ axs : isabmonoidop opp1 × ismonoidop opp2,
   (∏ x : X,
    opp2 (unel_is (pr1 axs)) x = unel_is (pr1 axs))
   × (∏ x : X,
      opp2 x (unel_is (pr1 axs)) = unel_is (pr1 axs)))
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
isofhlevel 1 (isdistr opp1 opp2)

   × (∏ x : X,

X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
isofhlevel 1 (isdistr opp1 opp2)
 apply isapropisdistr.
Defined.

(** *)

Definition isringops {X : UU} (opp1 opp2 : binop X) : UU :=
  (isabgrop opp1 × ismonoidop opp2) × isdistr opp1 opp2.

Definition make_isringops {X : UU} {opp1 opp2 : binop X} (H1 : isabgrop opp1) (H2 : ismonoidop opp2)
           (H3 : isdistr opp1 opp2) : isringops opp1 opp2 :=
  (H1 ,, H2) ,, H3.

Definition ringop1axs_is {X : UU} {opp1 opp2 : binop X} : isringops opp1 opp2 → isabgrop opp1 :=
  λ is, pr1 (pr1 is).

Definition ringop2axs_is {X : UU} {opp1 opp2 : binop X} : isringops opp1 opp2 → ismonoidop opp2 :=
  λ is, pr2 (pr1 is).

Definition ringdistraxs_is {X : UU} {opp1 opp2 : binop X} :
  isringops opp1 opp2 → isdistr opp1 opp2 := λ is, pr2 is.

Definition ringldistrax_is {X : UU} {opp1 opp2 : binop X} :
  isringops opp1 opp2 → isldistr opp1 opp2 := λ is, pr1 (pr2 is).

Definition ringrdistrax_is {X : UU} {opp1 opp2 : binop X} :
  isringops opp1 opp2 → isrdistr opp1 opp2 := λ is, pr2 (pr2 is).

Definition ringunel1_is {X : UU} {opp1 opp2 : binop X} (is : isringops opp1 opp2) : X :=
  unel_is (pr1 (pr1 is)).

Definition ringunel2_is {X : UU} {opp1 opp2 : binop X} (is : isringops opp1 opp2) : X :=
  unel_is (pr2 (pr1 is)).


X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
isaprop (isringops opp1 opp2)

opp1, opp2: binop X
isaprop (isringops opp1 opp2)

 apply isapropisdistr.
Defined.

assoc2: isassoc opp2
un2: X
lun2: islunit opp2 un2
run2: isrunit opp2 un2
ldistr0: isldistr opp1 opp2
rdistr0: isrdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
opp2 x (unel_is (pr1 is1)) = unel_is (pr1 is1)

assoc2: isassoc opp2

opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
assoc2: isassoc opp2
un2: X
lun2: islunit opp2 un2
run2: isrunit opp2 un2
ldistr0: isldistr opp1 opp2
rdistr0: isrdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
make_weq (λ x0 : X, opp1 x0 (opp2 x un2))
  (isweqrmultingr_is is1 (opp2 x un2))
  (opp2 x (unel_is (pr1 is1))) =
make_weq (λ x0 : X, opp1 x0 (opp2 x un2))
  (isweqrmultingr_is is1 (opp2 x un2))
  (unel_is (pr1 is1))

  
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
assoc2: isassoc opp2
un2: X
lun2: islunit opp2 un2
run2: isrunit opp2 un2
ldistr0: isldistr opp1 opp2
rdistr0: isrdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
opp1 (opp2 x (unel_is (pr1 is1))) (opp2 x un2) =
opp1 (unel_is (pr1 is1)) (opp2 x un2)

  
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
assoc1: isassoc opp1
un1: X
lun1: islunit opp1 un1
run1: isrunit opp1 un1
inv0: X → X
linv0: islinv opp1
  (unel_is (assoc1,, un1,, lun1,, run1)) inv0
rinv0: isrinv opp1
  (unel_is (assoc1,, un1,, lun1,, run1)) inv0
assoc2: isassoc opp2
un2: X
lun2: islunit opp2 un2
run2: isrunit opp2 un2
ldistr0: isldistr opp1 opp2
rdistr0: isrdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
opp1
  (opp2 x
     (unel_is
        (pr1
           ((assoc1,, un1,, lun1,, run1),,
            inv0,, linv0,, rinv0)))) (opp2 x un2) =
opp1
  (unel_is
     (pr1
        ((assoc1,, un1,, lun1,, run1),,
         inv0,, linv0,, rinv0))) (opp2 x un2)

un1: X

run1: isrunit opp1 un1

  (unel_is (assoc1,, un1,, lun1,, run1)) inv0

  (unel_is (assoc1,, un1,, lun1,, run1)) inv0

un2: X

run2: isrunit opp2 un2

rdistr0: isrdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
opp1
  (opp2 x
     (pr121 ((assoc1,, un1,, lun1,, run1),,
             inv0,, linv0,, rinv0))) (opp2 x un2) =
opp1
  (pr121 ((assoc1,, un1,, lun1,, run1),,
          inv0,, linv0,, rinv0)) (opp2 x un2)

opp1, opp2: binop X
assoc1: isassoc opp1
un1: X

run1: isrunit opp1 un1
inv0: X → X

  (unel_is (assoc1,, un1,, lun1,, run1)) inv0

  (unel_is (assoc1,, un1,, lun1,, run1)) inv0

un2: X
lun2: islunit opp2 un2
run2: isrunit opp2 un2
ldistr0: isldistr opp1 opp2
rdistr0: isrdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
opp1 (opp2 x un1) (opp2 x un2) = opp1 un1 (opp2 x un2)

x: X

x = x
 apply idpath.
Defined.
Opaque multx0_is_l.

opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
assoc2: isassoc opp2
un2: X
lun2: islunit opp2 un2
run2: isrunit opp2 un2
ldistr0: isldistr opp1 opp2
rdistr0: isrdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
make_weq (λ x0 : X, opp1 x0 (opp2 un2 x))
  (isweqrmultingr_is is1 (opp2 un2 x))
  (opp2 (unel_is (pr1 is1)) x) =
make_weq (λ x0 : X, opp1 x0 (opp2 un2 x))
  (isweqrmultingr_is is1 (opp2 un2 x))
  (unel_is (pr1 is1))

  
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
assoc2: isassoc opp2

lun2: islunit opp2 un2
run2: isrunit opp2 un2
ldistr0: isldistr opp1 opp2
rdistr0: isrdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
opp1 (opp2 (unel_is (pr1 is1)) x) (opp2 un2 x) =
opp1 (unel_is (pr1 is1)) (opp2 un2 x)

  
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
assoc1: isassoc opp1
un1: X
lun1: islunit opp1 un1
run1: isrunit opp1 un1
inv0: X → X

  (unel_is (assoc1,, un1,, lun1,, run1)) inv0
rinv0: isrinv opp1
  (unel_is (assoc1,, un1,, lun1,, run1)) inv0

un2: X
lun2: islunit opp2 un2
run2: isrunit opp2 un2
ldistr0: isldistr opp1 opp2
rdistr0: isrdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
opp1
  (opp2
     (unel_is
        (pr1
           ((assoc1,, un1,, lun1,, run1),,
            inv0,, linv0,, rinv0))) x) (opp2 un2 x) =
opp1
  (unel_is
     (pr1
        ((assoc1,, un1,, lun1,, run1),,
         inv0,, linv0,, rinv0))) (opp2 un2 x)

  (unel_is (assoc1,, un1,, lun1,, run1)) inv0

un2: X

opp1

     (pr121 ((assoc1,, un1,, lun1,, run1),,
             inv0,, linv0,, rinv0)) x) (opp2 un2 x) =
opp1

          inv0,, linv0,, rinv0)) (opp2 un2 x)

opp1, opp2: binop X

rdistr0: isrdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
opp1 (opp2 un1 x) (opp2 un2 x) = opp1 un1 (opp2 un2 x)

run2: isrunit opp2 un2
ldistr0: isldistr opp1 opp2
rdistr0: isrdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
opp2 un2 x = x
 
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
assoc1: isassoc opp1
un1: X
lun1: islunit opp1 un1
run1: isrunit opp1 un1
inv0: X → X
linv0: islinv opp1
  (unel_is (assoc1,, un1,, lun1,, run1)) inv0
rinv0: isrinv opp1
  (unel_is (assoc1,, un1,, lun1,, run1)) inv0
assoc2: isassoc opp2
un2: X
lun2: islunit opp2 un2
run2: isrunit opp2 un2
ldistr0: isldistr opp1 opp2
rdistr0: isrdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
x = x
 apply idpath.
Defined.
Opaque mult0x_is_l.

Definition minus1_is_l {X : UU} {opp1 opp2 : binop X} (is1 : isgrop opp1)
           (is2 : ismonoidop opp2) := (grinv_is is1) (unel_is is2).


X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
opp1 (opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x) x =
unel_is (pr1 is1)


X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
opp1 (opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x) x =
unel_is (pr1 is1)

  
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
xinv:= opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x: X
opp1 xinv x = unel_is (pr1 is1)

  
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
xinv:= opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x: X
opp1 xinv (opp2 (pr12 is2) x) = unel_is (pr1 is1)

  
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
xinv:= opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x: X
opp1 (opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x)
  (opp2 (pr12 is2) x) = unel_is (pr1 is1)

  
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
xinv:= opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x: X
opp2 (opp1 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) (pr12 is2)) x =
unel_is (pr1 is1)

  
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
xinv:= opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x: X
opp2 (opp1 (grinv_is is1 (unel_is is2)) (pr12 is2)) x =
unel_is (pr1 is1)
 
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
xinv:= opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x: X
opp2 (opp1 ((pr12 is1) (unel_is is2)) (pr12 is2)) x =
unel_is (pr1 is1)

  
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
xinv:= opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x: X
opp2 (unel_is is1) x = unel_is (pr1 is1)
 
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
xinv:= opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x: X
ismonoidop opp2
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
xinv:= opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x: X
isdistr opp1 opp2

  
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
xinv:= opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x: X
ismonoidop opp2
 apply is2.
  
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
xinv:= opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x: X
isdistr opp1 opp2
 apply is12.
Defined.
Opaque islinvmultwithminus1_is_l.


X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
opp1 x (opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x) =
unel_is (pr1 is1)


X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
opp1 x (opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x) =
unel_is (pr1 is1)

  
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
xinv:= opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x: X
opp1 x xinv = unel_is (pr1 is1)

  
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
xinv:= opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x: X
opp1 (opp2 (pr12 is2) x) xinv = unel_is (pr1 is1)
 
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
xinv:= opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x: X
opp1 (opp2 (pr12 is2) x)
  (opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x) = unel_is (pr1 is1)

  
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
xinv:= opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x: X
opp2 (opp1 (pr12 is2) (minus1_is_l is1 is2)) x =
unel_is (pr1 is1)
 
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
xinv:= opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x: X
opp2 (opp1 (pr12 is2) (grinv_is is1 (unel_is is2))) x =
unel_is (pr1 is1)
 
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
xinv:= opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x: X
opp2 (opp1 (pr12 is2) ((pr12 is1) (unel_is is2))) x =
unel_is (pr1 is1)

  
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
xinv:= opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x: X
opp2 (unel_is is1) x = unel_is (pr1 is1)

  
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
xinv:= opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x: X
ismonoidop opp2

opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
xinv:= opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x: X
isdistr opp1 opp2
 
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
xinv:= opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x: X
isdistr opp1 opp2
 apply is12.
Defined.
Opaque isrinvmultwithminus1_is_l.


X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x = grinv_is is1 x


X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x = grinv_is is1 x

  
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
make_weq (λ x0 : X, opp1 x0 x)
  (isweqrmultingr_is is1 x)
  (opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x) =
make_weq (λ x0 : X, opp1 x0 x)
  (isweqrmultingr_is is1 x) (grinv_is is1 x)

  
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
opp1 (opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x) x =
opp1 (grinv_is is1 x) x
 
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
unel_is (pr1 is1) = opp1 (grinv_is is1 x) x

  
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
unel_is (pr1 is1) = opp1 ((pr12 is1) x) x
 
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
x: X
unel_is (pr1 is1) = unel_is is1
 apply idpath.
Defined.
Opaque isminusmultwithminus1_is_l.


X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
isringops opp1 opp2


X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
isringops opp1 opp2

  
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
assoc1:= pr11 is1: isassoc opp1
isringops opp1 opp2

  
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
assoc1:= pr11 is1: isassoc opp1
isabgrop opp1 × ismonoidop opp2
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
assoc1:= pr11 is1: isassoc opp1
isdistr opp1 opp2

  
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
assoc1:= pr11 is1: isassoc opp1
isabgrop opp1 × ismonoidop opp2
 
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
assoc1:= pr11 is1: isassoc opp1
isabgrop opp1
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
assoc1:= pr11 is1: isassoc opp1
ismonoidop opp2

    
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
assoc1:= pr11 is1: isassoc opp1
isabgrop opp1
 
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
assoc1:= pr11 is1: isassoc opp1
iscomm opp1

      
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
assoc1:= pr11 is1: isassoc opp1
x, y: X
opp1 x y = opp1 y x

      
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
assoc1:= pr11 is1: isassoc opp1
x, y: X
make_weq
  (λ x0 : X,
   opp1 x0 (opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) (opp1 x y)))
  (isweqrmultingr_is is1
     (opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) (opp1 x y)))
  (opp1 x y) =
make_weq
  (λ x0 : X,
   opp1 x0 (opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) (opp1 x y)))
  (isweqrmultingr_is is1
     (opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) (opp1 x y)))
  (opp1 y x)

      
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
assoc1:= pr11 is1: isassoc opp1
x, y: X
opp1 (opp1 x y)
  (opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) (opp1 x y)) =
opp1 (opp1 y x)
  (opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) (opp1 x y))
 
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
assoc1:= pr11 is1: isassoc opp1
x, y: X
unel_is (pr1 is1) =
opp1 (opp1 y x)
  (opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) (opp1 x y))

      
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
assoc1:= pr11 is1: isassoc opp1
x, y: X
unel_is (pr1 is1) =
opp1 (opp1 y x)
  (opp1 (opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x)
     (opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) y))

      
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
assoc1:= pr11 is1: isassoc opp1
x, y: X
unel_is (pr1 is1) =
opp1 (opp1 (opp1 y x) (opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x))
  (opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) y)

      
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
assoc1:= pr11 is1: isassoc opp1
x, y: X
unel_is (pr1 is1) =
opp1 (opp1 y (opp1 x (opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) x)))
  (opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) y)

      
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
assoc1:= pr11 is1: isassoc opp1
x, y: X
unel_is (pr1 is1) =
opp1 (opp1 y (unel_is (pr1 is1)))
  (opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) y)

      
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
assoc1:= pr11 is1: isassoc opp1
x, y: X
pr121 is1 =
opp1 (opp1 y (pr121 is1))
  (opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) y)
 
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
assoc1:= pr11 is1: isassoc opp1
x, y: X
pr121 is1 = opp1 y (opp2 (minus1_is_l is1 is2) y)

      
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
assoc1:= pr11 is1: isassoc opp1
x, y: X
pr121 is1 = unel_is (pr1 is1)

      apply idpath.
    
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
assoc1:= pr11 is1: isassoc opp1
ismonoidop opp2
 apply is2.
  
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is1: isgrop opp1
is2: ismonoidop opp2
is12: isdistr opp1 opp2
assoc1:= pr11 is1: isassoc opp1
isdistr opp1 opp2
 apply is12.
Defined.

Definition ringmultx0_is {X : UU} {opp1 opp2 : binop X} (is : isringops opp1 opp2) :
  ∏ (x : X), opp2 x (unel_is (pr1 (ringop1axs_is is))) = unel_is (pr1 (ringop1axs_is is)) :=
  multx0_is_l (ringop1axs_is is) (ringop2axs_is is) (ringdistraxs_is is).

Definition ringmult0x_is {X : UU} {opp1 opp2 : binop X} (is : isringops opp1 opp2) :
  ∏ (x : X), opp2 (unel_is (pr1 (ringop1axs_is is))) x = unel_is (pr1 (ringop1axs_is is)) :=
  mult0x_is_l (ringop1axs_is is) (ringop2axs_is is) (ringdistraxs_is is).

Definition ringminus1_is {X : UU} {opp1 opp2 : binop X} (is : isringops opp1 opp2) : X :=
  minus1_is_l (ringop1axs_is is) (ringop2axs_is is).

Definition ringmultwithminus1_is {X : UU} {opp1 opp2 : binop X} (is : isringops opp1 opp2) :
  ∏ (x : X),
  opp2 (minus1_is_l (ringop1axs_is is) (ringop2axs_is is)) x = grinv_is (ringop1axs_is is) x :=
  isminusmultwithminus1_is_l (ringop1axs_is is) (ringop2axs_is is) (ringdistraxs_is is).


X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is: isringops opp1 opp2
isrigops opp1 opp2


X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is: isringops opp1 opp2
isrigops opp1 opp2

  
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is: isringops opp1 opp2
∑ axs : isabmonoidop opp1 × ismonoidop opp2,
(∏ x : X,
 opp2 (unel_is (pr1 axs)) x = unel_is (pr1 axs))
× (∏ x : X,
   opp2 x (unel_is (pr1 axs)) = unel_is (pr1 axs))
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is: isringops opp1 opp2
isdistr opp1 opp2

  
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is: isringops opp1 opp2
∑ axs : isabmonoidop opp1 × ismonoidop opp2,
(∏ x : X,
 opp2 (unel_is (pr1 axs)) x = unel_is (pr1 axs))
× (∏ x : X,
   opp2 x (unel_is (pr1 axs)) = unel_is (pr1 axs))
 
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is: isringops opp1 opp2
(∏ x : X,
 opp2
   (unel_is
      (pr1 (ringop1axs_is is,, ringop2axs_is is))) x =
 unel_is (pr1 (ringop1axs_is is,, ringop2axs_is is)))
× (∏ x : X,
   opp2 x
     (unel_is
        (pr1 (ringop1axs_is is,, ringop2axs_is is))) =
   unel_is (pr1 (ringop1axs_is is,, ringop2axs_is is)))

    
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is: isringops opp1 opp2
∏ x : X,
opp2
  (unel_is (pr1 (ringop1axs_is is,, ringop2axs_is is)))
  x =
unel_is (pr1 (ringop1axs_is is,, ringop2axs_is is))
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is: isringops opp1 opp2
∏ x : X,
opp2 x
  (unel_is (pr1 (ringop1axs_is is,, ringop2axs_is is))) =
unel_is (pr1 (ringop1axs_is is,, ringop2axs_is is))

    
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is: isringops opp1 opp2
∏ x : X,
opp2
  (unel_is (pr1 (ringop1axs_is is,, ringop2axs_is is)))
  x =
unel_is (pr1 (ringop1axs_is is,, ringop2axs_is is))
 
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is: isringops opp1 opp2
∏ x : X,
opp2 (unel_is (pr11 (ringop1axs_is is))) x =
unel_is (pr11 (ringop1axs_is is))
 apply (ringmult0x_is).
    
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is: isringops opp1 opp2
∏ x : X,
opp2 x
  (unel_is (pr1 (ringop1axs_is is,, ringop2axs_is is))) =
unel_is (pr1 (ringop1axs_is is,, ringop2axs_is is))
 
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is: isringops opp1 opp2
∏ x : X,
opp2 x (unel_is (pr11 (ringop1axs_is is))) =
unel_is (pr11 (ringop1axs_is is))
 apply (ringmultx0_is).
  
X: UU
opp1, opp2: binop X
is: isringops opp1 opp2
isdistr opp1 opp2
 apply (ringdistraxs_is is).
Defined.
Coercion isringopstoisrigops : isringops >-> isrigops.

(** *)

Definition iscommrigops {X : UU} (opp1 opp2 : binop X) : UU :=
  (isrigops opp1 opp2) × (iscomm opp2).

Definition pr1iscommrigops (X : UU) (opp1 opp2 : binop X) :
  iscommrigops opp1 opp2 → isrigops opp1 opp2 := @pr1 _ _.
Coercion pr1iscommrigops : iscommrigops >-> isrigops.

Definition rigiscommop2_is {X : UU} {opp1 opp2 : binop X} (is : iscommrigops opp1 opp2) :
  iscomm opp2 := pr2 is.


X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
isaprop (iscommrigops opp1 opp2)


X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
isaprop (iscommrigops opp1 opp2)

  
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
isofhlevel 1 (isrigops opp1 opp2)
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
isofhlevel 1 (iscomm opp2)

  
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
isofhlevel 1 (isrigops opp1 opp2)
 apply isapropisrigops.
  
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
isofhlevel 1 (iscomm opp2)
 apply isapropiscomm.
Defined.

(** *)

Definition iscommringops {X : UU} (opp1 opp2 : binop X) : UU :=
  (isringops opp1 opp2) × (iscomm opp2).

Definition pr1iscommringops (X : UU) (opp1 opp2 : binop X) :
  iscommringops opp1 opp2 → isringops opp1 opp2 := @pr1 _ _.
Coercion pr1iscommringops : iscommringops >-> isringops.

Definition ringiscommop2_is {X : UU} {opp1 opp2 : binop X} (is : iscommringops opp1 opp2) :
  iscomm opp2 := pr2 is.


X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
isaprop (iscommringops opp1 opp2)


X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
isaprop (iscommringops opp1 opp2)

  
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
isofhlevel 1 (isringops opp1 opp2)
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
isofhlevel 1 (iscomm opp2)

  
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
isofhlevel 1 (isringops opp1 opp2)
 apply isapropisringops.
  
X: hSet
opp1, opp2: binop X
isofhlevel 1 (iscomm opp2)
 apply isapropiscomm.
Defined.

Definition iscommringopstoiscommrigops (X : UU) (opp1 opp2 : binop X)
           (is : iscommringops opp1 opp2) : iscommrigops opp1 opp2 :=
  isringopstoisrigops _ _ _ (pr1 is) ,, pr2 is.
Coercion iscommringopstoiscommrigops : iscommringops >-> iscommrigops.

(** **** Transfer properties of binary operations relative to weak equivalences *)

(** binop_weq_fwd *)


X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
isassoc opp → isassoc (binop_weq_fwd H opp)


X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
isassoc opp → isassoc (binop_weq_fwd H opp)

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
is: isassoc opp
x, y, z: Y
binop_weq_fwd H opp (binop_weq_fwd H opp x y) z =
binop_weq_fwd H opp x (binop_weq_fwd H opp y z)

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
is: isassoc opp
x, y, z: Y
opp (invmap H (binop_weq_fwd H opp x y)) (invmap H z) =
opp (invmap H x) (invmap H (binop_weq_fwd H opp y z))

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
is: isassoc opp
x, y, z: Y
opp (invmap H (binop_weq_fwd H opp x y)) (invmap H z) =
opp (opp ?Goal0 ?Goal1) ?Goal2
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
is: isassoc opp
x, y, z: Y
opp ?Goal0 (opp ?Goal1 ?Goal2) =
opp (invmap H x) (invmap H (binop_weq_fwd H opp y z))

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
is: isassoc opp
x, y, z: Y
opp (invmap H (binop_weq_fwd H opp x y)) (invmap H z) =
opp (opp ?Goal0 ?Goal1) ?Goal2
 
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
is: isassoc opp
x, y, z: Y
invmap H (binop_weq_fwd H opp x y) = opp ?Goal ?Goal0

    apply homotinvweqweq.
  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
is: isassoc opp
x, y, z: Y
opp (invmap H x) (opp (invmap H y) (invmap H z)) =
opp (invmap H x) (invmap H (binop_weq_fwd H opp y z))
 
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
is: isassoc opp
x, y, z: Y
opp (invmap H y) (invmap H z) =
invmap H (binop_weq_fwd H opp y z)

    apply homotinvweqweq0.
Defined.


X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
islunit opp x0 → islunit (binop_weq_fwd H opp) (H x0)


X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
islunit opp x0 → islunit (binop_weq_fwd H opp) (H x0)

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
is: islunit opp x0
y: Y
binop_weq_fwd H opp (H x0) y = y

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
is: islunit opp x0
y: Y
H (opp (invmap H (H x0)) (invmap H y)) = y

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
is: islunit opp x0
y: Y
opp (invmap H (H x0)) (invmap H y) = ?Goal
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
is: islunit opp x0
y: Y
H ?Goal = y

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
is: islunit opp x0
y: Y
opp (invmap H (H x0)) (invmap H y) = ?Goal
 
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
is: islunit opp x0
y: Y
invmap H (H x0) = ?Goal1
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
is: islunit opp x0
y: Y
opp ?Goal1 (invmap H y) = ?Goal

    
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
is: islunit opp x0
y: Y
invmap H (H x0) = ?Goal1
 apply homotinvweqweq.
    
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
is: islunit opp x0
y: Y
opp x0 (invmap H y) = ?Goal
 apply is.
  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
is: islunit opp x0
y: Y
H (invmap H y) = y
 apply homotweqinvweq.
Defined.


X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
isrunit opp x0 → isrunit (binop_weq_fwd H opp) (H x0)

H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
isrunit opp x0 → isrunit (binop_weq_fwd H opp) (H x0)

H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
is: isrunit opp x0
y: Y
binop_weq_fwd H opp y (H x0) = y

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
is: isrunit opp x0
y: Y
H (opp (invmap H y) (invmap H (H x0))) = y

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
is: isrunit opp x0
y: Y
opp (invmap H y) (invmap H (H x0)) = ?Goal

H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
is: isrunit opp x0
y: Y
H ?Goal = y

H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
is: isrunit opp x0
y: Y
opp (invmap H y) (invmap H (H x0)) = ?Goal
 
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
is: isrunit opp x0
y: Y
invmap H (H x0) = ?Goal1
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
is: isrunit opp x0
y: Y
opp (invmap H y) ?Goal1 = ?Goal

    
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
is: isrunit opp x0
y: Y
invmap H (H x0) = ?Goal1
 apply homotinvweqweq.
    
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
is: isrunit opp x0
y: Y
opp (invmap H y) x0 = ?Goal
 apply is.
  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
is: isrunit opp x0
y: Y
H (invmap H y) = y
 apply homotweqinvweq.
Defined.

x0: X
is: isunit opp x0

opp: binop X
x0: X
is: isunit opp x0

  apply isrunit_weq_fwd, (pr2 is).

opp: binop X
is: isunital opp
isunit (binop_weq_fwd H opp) (H (pr1 is))

  apply isunit_weq_fwd, (pr2 is).
Defined.

opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
isunital (binop_weq_fwd H opp)

  apply isunital_weq_fwd, (pr2 is).

X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
inv: X → X
islinv opp x0 inv
→ islinv (binop_weq_fwd H opp) (H x0)
    (λ y : Y, H (inv (invmap H y)))


X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
inv: X → X
islinv opp x0 inv
→ islinv (binop_weq_fwd H opp) (H x0)
    (λ y : Y, H (inv (invmap H y)))

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
inv: X → X
is: islinv opp x0 inv
y: Y
binop_weq_fwd H opp (H (inv (invmap H y))) y = H x0

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
inv: X → X
is: islinv opp x0 inv
y: Y
H (opp (invmap H (H (inv (invmap H y)))) (invmap H y)) =
H x0

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
inv: X → X
is: islinv opp x0 inv
y: Y
opp (invmap H (H (inv (invmap H y)))) (invmap H y) =
x0

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
inv: X → X
is: islinv opp x0 inv
y: Y
opp (invmap H (H (inv (invmap H y)))) (invmap H y) =
opp (inv ?Goal0) ?Goal0

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
inv: X → X
is: islinv opp x0 inv
y: Y
invmap H (H (inv (invmap H y))) = inv (invmap H y)

  apply homotinvweqweq.
Defined.

H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
inv: X → X
is: isrinv opp x0 inv
y: Y
binop_weq_fwd H opp y (H (inv (invmap H y))) = H x0

opp: binop X
x0: X
inv: X → X
is: isrinv opp x0 inv
y: Y
H (opp (invmap H y) (invmap H (H (inv (invmap H y))))) =
H x0

opp: binop X
x0: X
inv: X → X
is: isrinv opp x0 inv
y: Y
opp (invmap H y) (invmap H (H (inv (invmap H y)))) =
x0

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
inv: X → X
is: isrinv opp x0 inv
y: Y
opp (invmap H y) (invmap H (H (inv (invmap H y)))) =
opp ?Goal0 (inv ?Goal0)

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
inv: X → X
is: isrinv opp x0 inv
y: Y
invmap H (H (inv (invmap H y))) = inv (invmap H y)

  apply homotinvweqweq.
Defined.

H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
inv: X → X
is: isinv opp x0 inv
isrinv (binop_weq_fwd H opp) (H x0)
  (λ y : Y, H (inv (invmap H y)))

H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
x0: X
inv: X → X
is: isinv opp x0 inv
isrinv (binop_weq_fwd H opp) (H x0)
  (λ y : Y, H (inv (invmap H y)))

  apply isrinv_weq_fwd, (pr2 is).
Defined.

X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
invstruct opp is
→ invstruct (binop_weq_fwd H opp)
    (ismonoidop_weq_fwd H opp is)

H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
invstruct opp is
→ invstruct (binop_weq_fwd H opp)
    (ismonoidop_weq_fwd H opp is)

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
inv: invstruct opp is
invstruct (binop_weq_fwd H opp)
  (ismonoidop_weq_fwd H opp is)

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
is: ismonoidop opp
inv: invstruct opp is
isinv (binop_weq_fwd H opp)
  (unel_is (ismonoidop_weq_fwd H opp is))
  (λ y : Y, H (pr1 inv (invmap H y)))

  apply isinv_weq_fwd, (pr2 inv).
Defined.

H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
isgrop opp → isgrop (binop_weq_fwd H opp)

H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
is: isgrop opp
ismonoidop (binop_weq_fwd H opp)
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
is: isgrop opp
(λ is : ismonoidop (binop_weq_fwd H opp),
 invstruct (binop_weq_fwd H opp) is) ?pr1

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
is: isgrop opp
ismonoidop (binop_weq_fwd H opp)
 apply ismonoidop_weq_fwd, (pr1 is).
  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
is: isgrop opp
(λ is : ismonoidop (binop_weq_fwd H opp),
 invstruct (binop_weq_fwd H opp) is)
  (ismonoidop_weq_fwd H opp (pr1 is))
 apply invstruct_weq_fwd, (pr2 is).
Defined.


X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
iscomm opp → iscomm (binop_weq_fwd H opp)


X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
iscomm opp → iscomm (binop_weq_fwd H opp)

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
is: iscomm opp
x, y: Y
binop_weq_fwd H opp x y = binop_weq_fwd H opp y x

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop X
is: iscomm opp
x, y: Y
H (opp (invmap H x) (invmap H y)) =
H (opp (invmap H y) (invmap H x))

  apply maponpaths, is.
Defined.

X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop X
isldistr op1 op2
→ isldistr (binop_weq_fwd H op1) (binop_weq_fwd H op2)


X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop X
isldistr op1 op2
→ isldistr (binop_weq_fwd H op1) (binop_weq_fwd H op2)

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop X
is: isldistr op1 op2
x, y, z: Y
binop_weq_fwd H op2 z (binop_weq_fwd H op1 x y) =
binop_weq_fwd H op1 (binop_weq_fwd H op2 z x)
  (binop_weq_fwd H op2 z y)

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop X
is: isldistr op1 op2
x, y, z: Y
H
  (op2 (invmap H z)
     (invmap H (H (op1 (invmap H x) (invmap H y))))) =
H
  (op1 (invmap H (H (op2 (invmap H z) (invmap H x))))
     (invmap H (H (op2 (invmap H z) (invmap H y)))))

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop X
is: isldistr op1 op2
x, y, z: Y
op2 (invmap H z)
  (invmap H (H (op1 (invmap H x) (invmap H y)))) =
op1 (invmap H (H (op2 (invmap H z) (invmap H x))))
  (invmap H (H (op2 (invmap H z) (invmap H y))))

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop X
is: isldistr op1 op2
x, y, z: Y
op2 (invmap H z)
  (invmap H (H (op1 (invmap H x) (invmap H y)))) =
op2 ?Goal2 (op1 ?Goal0 ?Goal1)
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop X
is: isldistr op1 op2
x, y, z: Y
op1 (op2 ?Goal2 ?Goal0) (op2 ?Goal2 ?Goal1) =
op1 (invmap H (H (op2 (invmap H z) (invmap H x))))
  (invmap H (H (op2 (invmap H z) (invmap H y))))

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop X
is: isldistr op1 op2
x, y, z: Y
op2 (invmap H z)
  (invmap H (H (op1 (invmap H x) (invmap H y)))) =
op2 ?Goal2 (op1 ?Goal0 ?Goal1)
 
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop X
is: isldistr op1 op2
x, y, z: Y
invmap H (H (op1 (invmap H x) (invmap H y))) =
op1 ?Goal ?Goal0

    apply homotinvweqweq.
  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop X
is: isldistr op1 op2
x, y, z: Y
op1 (op2 (invmap H z) (invmap H x))
  (op2 (invmap H z) (invmap H y)) =
op1 (invmap H (H (op2 (invmap H z) (invmap H x))))
  (invmap H (H (op2 (invmap H z) (invmap H y))))
 apply map_on_two_paths ; apply homotinvweqweq0.
Defined.

X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop X
isrdistr op1 op2
→ isrdistr (binop_weq_fwd H op1) (binop_weq_fwd H op2)


X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop X
isrdistr op1 op2
→ isrdistr (binop_weq_fwd H op1) (binop_weq_fwd H op2)

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop X
is: isrdistr op1 op2
x, y, z: Y
binop_weq_fwd H op2 (binop_weq_fwd H op1 x y) z =
binop_weq_fwd H op1 (binop_weq_fwd H op2 x z)
  (binop_weq_fwd H op2 y z)

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop X
is: isrdistr op1 op2
x, y, z: Y
H
  (op2 (invmap H (H (op1 (invmap H x) (invmap H y))))
     (invmap H z)) =
H
  (op1 (invmap H (H (op2 (invmap H x) (invmap H z))))
     (invmap H (H (op2 (invmap H y) (invmap H z)))))

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop X
is: isrdistr op1 op2
x, y, z: Y
op2 (invmap H (H (op1 (invmap H x) (invmap H y))))
  (invmap H z) =
op1 (invmap H (H (op2 (invmap H x) (invmap H z))))
  (invmap H (H (op2 (invmap H y) (invmap H z))))

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop X
is: isrdistr op1 op2
x, y, z: Y
op2 (invmap H (H (op1 (invmap H x) (invmap H y))))
  (invmap H z) = op2 (op1 ?Goal0 ?Goal1) ?Goal2
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop X
is: isrdistr op1 op2
x, y, z: Y
op1 (op2 ?Goal0 ?Goal2) (op2 ?Goal1 ?Goal2) =
op1 (invmap H (H (op2 (invmap H x) (invmap H z))))
  (invmap H (H (op2 (invmap H y) (invmap H z))))

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop X
is: isrdistr op1 op2
x, y, z: Y
op2 (invmap H (H (op1 (invmap H x) (invmap H y))))
  (invmap H z) = op2 (op1 ?Goal0 ?Goal1) ?Goal2

H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop X
is: isrdistr op1 op2
x, y, z: Y
invmap H (H (op1 (invmap H x) (invmap H y))) =
op1 ?Goal ?Goal0

    apply homotinvweqweq.
  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop X
is: isrdistr op1 op2
x, y, z: Y
op1 (op2 (invmap H x) (invmap H z))
  (op2 (invmap H y) (invmap H z)) =
op1 (invmap H (H (op2 (invmap H x) (invmap H z))))
  (invmap H (H (op2 (invmap H y) (invmap H z))))
 apply map_on_two_paths ; apply homotinvweqweq0.
Defined.

is: isabsorb op1 op2
x, y: Y

is: isabsorb op1 op2
x, y: Y
H
  (op1 (invmap H x)
     (invmap H (H (op2 (invmap H x) (invmap H y))))) =
x

H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop X
is: isabsorb op1 op2

H
  (op1 (invmap H x)

x, y: Y
op1 (invmap H x)
  (invmap H (H (op2 (invmap H x) (invmap H y)))) =
op1 (invmap H x) (op2 (invmap H x) ?Goal0)

H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop X
is: isabsorb op1 op2
x, y: Y
invmap H (H (op2 (invmap H x) (invmap H y))) =
op2 (invmap H x) ?Goal

  apply (homotinvweqweq H).
Defined.

op1, op2: binop X

X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop X
is: isrigops op1 op2
∑
axs : isabmonoidop (binop_weq_fwd H op1)
      × ismonoidop (binop_weq_fwd H op2),
(∏ x : Y,
 binop_weq_fwd H op2 (unel_is (pr1 axs)) x =
 unel_is (pr1 axs))
× (∏ x : Y,
   binop_weq_fwd H op2 x (unel_is (pr1 axs)) =
   unel_is (pr1 axs))

H: X ≃ Y

      × ismonoidop (binop_weq_fwd H op2),
(∏ x : Y,
 binop_weq_fwd H op2 (unel_is (pr1 axs)) x =
 unel_is (pr1 axs))
× (∏ x : Y,
   binop_weq_fwd H op2 x (unel_is (pr1 axs)) =
   unel_is (pr1 axs))

× ismonoidop (binop_weq_fwd H op2)
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop X
is: isrigops op1 op2
(λ axs : isabmonoidop (binop_weq_fwd H op1)
         × ismonoidop (binop_weq_fwd H op2),
 (∏ x : Y,
  binop_weq_fwd H op2 (unel_is (pr1 axs)) x =
  unel_is (pr1 axs))
 × (∏ x : Y,
    binop_weq_fwd H op2 x (unel_is (pr1 axs)) =
    unel_is (pr1 axs))) ?pr1

H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop X

ismonoidop (binop_weq_fwd H op2)

      apply ismonoidop_weq_fwd, (pr2 (pr1 (pr1 is))).
    
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop X
is: isrigops op1 op2
(λ axs : isabmonoidop (binop_weq_fwd H op1)
         × ismonoidop (binop_weq_fwd H op2),
 (∏ x : Y,
  binop_weq_fwd H op2 (unel_is (pr1 axs)) x =
  unel_is (pr1 axs))
 × (∏ x : Y,
    binop_weq_fwd H op2 x (unel_is (pr1 axs)) =
    unel_is (pr1 axs)))
  (isabmonoidop_weq_fwd H op1 (pr111 is),,
   ismonoidop_weq_fwd H op2 (pr211 is))

H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop X
is: isrigops op1 op2
∏ x : Y,
binop_weq_fwd H op2
  (unel_is (ismonoidop_weq_fwd H op1 (pr111 (pr1 is))))
  x =
unel_is (ismonoidop_weq_fwd H op1 (pr111 (pr1 is)))

  (invmap H
     (unel_is

  (invmap H x) = pr121 (pr111 is)

  (invmap H

is: isrigops op1 op2

  (unel_is (ismonoidop_weq_fwd H op1 (pr111 (pr1 is)))) =

(** binop_weq_bck *)


X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop Y
isassoc opp → isassoc (binop_weq_bck H opp)


X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop Y
isassoc opp → isassoc (binop_weq_bck H opp)

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop Y
is: isassoc opp
x, y, z: X
binop_weq_bck H opp (binop_weq_bck H opp x y) z =
binop_weq_bck H opp x (binop_weq_bck H opp y z)

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop Y
is: isassoc opp
x, y, z: X
opp (H (binop_weq_bck H opp x y)) (H z) =
opp (H x) (H (binop_weq_bck H opp y z))

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop Y
is: isassoc opp
x, y, z: X
opp (H (binop_weq_bck H opp x y)) (H z) =
opp (opp ?Goal0 ?Goal1) ?Goal2
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop Y
is: isassoc opp
x, y, z: X
opp ?Goal0 (opp ?Goal1 ?Goal2) =
opp (H x) (H (binop_weq_bck H opp y z))

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop Y
is: isassoc opp
x, y, z: X
opp (H (binop_weq_bck H opp x y)) (H z) =
opp (opp ?Goal0 ?Goal1) ?Goal2
 
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop Y
is: isassoc opp
x, y, z: X
H (binop_weq_bck H opp x y) = opp ?Goal ?Goal0

    apply homotweqinvweq.
  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop Y
is: isassoc opp
x, y, z: X
opp (H x) (opp (H y) (H z)) =
opp (H x) (H (binop_weq_bck H opp y z))
 
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop Y
is: isassoc opp
x, y, z: X
opp (H y) (H z) = H (binop_weq_bck H opp y z)

    
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop Y
is: isassoc opp
x, y, z: X
H (binop_weq_bck H opp y z) = opp (H y) (H z)

    apply homotweqinvweq.
Defined.

X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop Y
x0: Y
islunit opp x0
→ islunit (binop_weq_bck H opp) (invmap H x0)

H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop Y
x0: Y
islunit opp x0
→ islunit (binop_weq_bck H opp) (invmap H x0)

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
opp: binop Y
x0: Y
is: islunit opp x0
y: X
binop_weq_bck H opp (invmap H x0) y = y

→ isldistr (binop_weq_bck H op1) (binop_weq_bck H op2)

H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop Y
isldistr op1 op2
→ isldistr (binop_weq_bck H op1) (binop_weq_bck H op2)

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop Y
is: isldistr op1 op2
x, y, z: X
binop_weq_bck H op2 z (binop_weq_bck H op1 x y) =
binop_weq_bck H op1 (binop_weq_bck H op2 z x)
  (binop_weq_bck H op2 z y)

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop Y
is: isldistr op1 op2
x, y, z: X
invmap H (op2 (H z) (H (invmap H (op1 (H x) (H y))))) =
invmap H
  (op1 (H (invmap H (op2 (H z) (H x))))
     (H (invmap H (op2 (H z) (H y)))))

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop Y
is: isldistr op1 op2
x, y, z: X
op2 (H z) (H (invmap H (op1 (H x) (H y)))) =
op1 (H (invmap H (op2 (H z) (H x))))
  (H (invmap H (op2 (H z) (H y))))

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop Y
is: isldistr op1 op2
x, y, z: X
op2 (H z) (H (invmap H (op1 (H x) (H y)))) =
op2 ?Goal2 (op1 ?Goal0 ?Goal1)
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop Y
is: isldistr op1 op2
x, y, z: X
op1 (op2 ?Goal2 ?Goal0) (op2 ?Goal2 ?Goal1) =
op1 (H (invmap H (op2 (H z) (H x))))
  (H (invmap H (op2 (H z) (H y))))

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop Y
is: isldistr op1 op2
x, y, z: X
op2 (H z) (H (invmap H (op1 (H x) (H y)))) =
op2 ?Goal2 (op1 ?Goal0 ?Goal1)
 
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop Y
is: isldistr op1 op2
x, y, z: X
H (invmap H (op1 (H x) (H y))) = op1 ?Goal ?Goal0

    apply homotweqinvweq.
  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop Y
is: isldistr op1 op2
x, y, z: X
op1 (op2 (H z) (H x)) (op2 (H z) (H y)) =
op1 (H (invmap H (op2 (H z) (H x))))
  (H (invmap H (op2 (H z) (H y))))
 apply map_on_two_paths;
    exact (!homotweqinvweq _ _).
Defined.

H: X ≃ Y

→ isrdistr (binop_weq_bck H op1) (binop_weq_bck H op2)

→ isrdistr (binop_weq_bck H op1) (binop_weq_bck H op2)

H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop Y
is: isrdistr op1 op2
x, y, z: X
binop_weq_bck H op2 (binop_weq_bck H op1 x y) z =
binop_weq_bck H op1 (binop_weq_bck H op2 x z)
  (binop_weq_bck H op2 y z)

H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop Y

x, y, z: X
invmap H (op2 (H (invmap H (op1 (H x) (H y)))) (H z)) =

  (op1 (H (invmap H (op2 (H x) (H z))))
     (H (invmap H (op2 (H y) (H z)))))

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop Y
is: isrdistr op1 op2
x, y, z: X
op2 (H (invmap H (op1 (H x) (H y)))) (H z) =
op1 (H (invmap H (op2 (H x) (H z))))
  (H (invmap H (op2 (H y) (H z))))

  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop Y
is: isrdistr op1 op2
x, y, z: X
op2 (H (invmap H (op1 (H x) (H y)))) (H z) =
op2 (op1 ?Goal0 ?Goal1) ?Goal2
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop Y
is: isrdistr op1 op2
x, y, z: X
op1 (op2 ?Goal0 ?Goal2) (op2 ?Goal1 ?Goal2) =
op1 (H (invmap H (op2 (H x) (H z))))
  (H (invmap H (op2 (H y) (H z))))

  
X, Y: UU

op1, op2: binop Y
is: isrdistr op1 op2
x, y, z: X

op2 (op1 ?Goal0 ?Goal1) ?Goal2

op1, op2: binop Y
is: isrdistr op1 op2
x, y, z: X
H (invmap H (op1 (H x) (H y))) = op1 ?Goal ?Goal0

    apply homotweqinvweq.
  
X, Y: UU
H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop Y
is: isrdistr op1 op2
x, y, z: X
op1 (op2 (H x) (H z)) (op2 (H y) (H z)) =
op1 (H (invmap H (op2 (H x) (H z))))
  (H (invmap H (op2 (H y) (H z))))
 apply map_on_two_paths; exact (!homotweqinvweq _ _).
Defined.

H: X ≃ Y
op1, op2: binop Y
is: isdistr op1 op2
isrdistr (binop_weq_bck H op1) (binop_weq_bck H op2)

  apply isrdistr_weq_bck, (pr2 is).
Defined.

→ isabsorb (binop_weq_bck H op1) (binop_weq_bck H op2)

x

H: X ≃ Y

x, y: X

op1 (H x) (op2 (H x) ?Goal0)

x, y: X
H (invmap H (op2 (H x) (H y))) = op2 (H x) ?Goal

  apply (homotweqinvweq H).
Defined.

   unel_is (pr1 axs))

(** * 3. Sets with one binary operation *)

(** * 3.1. General definitions *)

Definition setwithbinop : UU := ∑ (X : hSet), binop X.

Definition make_setwithbinop (X : hSet) (opp : binop X) : setwithbinop := X ,, opp.

Definition pr1setwithbinop : setwithbinop → hSet := @pr1 _ (λ X : hSet, binop X).
Coercion pr1setwithbinop : setwithbinop >-> hSet.

Definition op {X : setwithbinop} : binop X := pr2 X.


X: hSet
isaset (binop X)


X: hSet
isaset (binop X)

  
X: hSet
∏ t : X, isaset ((λ _ : X, X → X) t)
 
X: hSet
t1: X
isaset ((λ _ : X, X → X) t1)

  
X: hSet
t1: X
∏ t : X, isaset ((λ _ : X, X) t)
 
X: hSet
t1, t2: X
isaset ((λ _ : X, X) t2)

  use setproperty.
Qed.

Declare Scope addoperation_scope.
Delimit Scope addoperation_scope with addoperation.
Notation "x + y" := (op x y) : addoperation_scope.
Declare Scope multoperation_scope.
Delimit Scope multoperation_scope with multoperation.
Notation "x * y" := (op x y) : multoperation_scope.

(* The reverse/opposite binary operation where the arguments are flipped. *)
Definition setwithbinop_rev (X : setwithbinop) : setwithbinop :=
  make_setwithbinop X (λ x y, op y x).

(** * 3.2. Functions compatible with a binary operation (homomorphism) and their properties *)

Definition isbinopfun {X Y : setwithbinop} (f : X → Y) : UU :=
  ∏ x x' : X, f (op x x') = op (f x) (f x').

Definition make_isbinopfun {X Y : setwithbinop} {f : X → Y}
           (H : ∏ x x' : X, f (op x x') = op (f x) (f x')) : isbinopfun f := H.


X, Y: setwithbinop
f: X → Y
isaprop (isbinopfun f)


X, Y: setwithbinop
f: X → Y
isaprop (isbinopfun f)

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: X → Y
∏ t : X,
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ x' : X,
   f (t * x')%multoperation =
   (f t * f x')%multoperation)
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: X → Y
x: X
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ x' : X,
   f (x * x')%multoperation =
   (f x * f x')%multoperation)

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: X → Y
x: X
∏ t : X,
isofhlevel 1
  (f (x * t)%multoperation = (f x * f t)%multoperation)
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: X → Y
x, x': X
isofhlevel 1
  (f (x * x')%multoperation =
   (f x * f x')%multoperation)

  apply (setproperty Y).
Defined.

g: B → C

isbinopfun (g ∘ f) → isbinopfun f → isbinopfun g

g: B → C

isbinopfun (g ∘ f) → isbinopfun f → isbinopfun g

g: B → C

H1: isbinopfun (g ∘ f)

isbinopfun g

g (x * x')%multoperation = (g x * g x')%multoperation

g (b1 * b2)%multoperation =
(g b1 * g b2)%multoperation

  
A, B, C: setwithbinop
f: A → B
g: B → C
H: issurjective f
H1: isbinopfun (g ∘ f)
H2: isbinopfun f
b1, b2: B
H1': hfiber f b1
H2': hfiber f b2
g (f (hfiberpr1 f b1 H1') * b2)%multoperation =
(g (f (hfiberpr1 f b1 H1')) * g b2)%multoperation
 
A, B, C: setwithbinop
f: A → B
g: B → C
H: issurjective f
H1: isbinopfun (g ∘ f)
H2: isbinopfun f
b1, b2: B
H1': hfiber f b1
H2': hfiber f b2
g
  (f (hfiberpr1 f b1 H1') * f (hfiberpr1 f b2 H2'))%multoperation =
(g (f (hfiberpr1 f b1 H1')) *
 g (f (hfiberpr1 f b2 H2')))%multoperation

  
A, B, C: setwithbinop
f: A → B
g: B → C
H: issurjective f
H1: isbinopfun (g ∘ f)
H2: isbinopfun f
b1, b2: B
H1': hfiber f b1
H2': hfiber f b2
g
  (f
     (hfiberpr1 f b1 H1' * hfiberpr1 f b2 H2')%multoperation) =
(g (f (hfiberpr1 f b1 H1')) *
 g (f (hfiberpr1 f b2 H2')))%multoperation

  apply H1.
Qed.

Definition binopfun (X Y : setwithbinop) : UU := ∑ (f : X → Y), isbinopfun f.

Definition make_binopfun {X Y : setwithbinop} (f : X → Y) (is : isbinopfun f) : binopfun X Y := f ,, is.

Definition pr1binopfun (X Y : setwithbinop) : binopfun X Y → (X → Y) := @pr1 _ _.
Coercion pr1binopfun : binopfun >-> Funclass.

Definition binopfunisbinopfun {X Y : setwithbinop} (f : binopfun X Y) : isbinopfun f := pr2 f.


X, Y: setwithbinop
isaset (binopfun X Y)


X, Y: setwithbinop
isaset (binopfun X Y)

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
isaset (X → Y)
X, Y: setwithbinop
isincl (pr1binopfun X Y)

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
isaset (X → Y)

X → isofhlevel 2 Y

t: X
isofhlevel 2 Y

    apply (setproperty Y).
  
X, Y: setwithbinop
isincl (pr1binopfun X Y)
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
∏ x : X → Y, isaprop (isbinopfun x)
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
x: X → Y
isaprop (isbinopfun x)

    apply isapropisbinopfun.
Defined.


X, Y: setwithbinop
f, g: binopfun X Y
H: (f : X → Y) = g
f = g

f, g: binopfun X Y
H: (f : X → Y) = g
f = g

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
f, g: binopfun X Y
H: (f : X → Y) = g
isPredicate isbinopfun
X, Y: setwithbinop
f, g: binopfun X Y
H: (f : X → Y) = g
pr1 f = pr1 g

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
f, g: binopfun X Y
H: (f : X → Y) = g
isPredicate isbinopfun
 exact isapropisbinopfun.
  
X, Y: setwithbinop
f, g: binopfun X Y
H: (f : X → Y) = g
pr1 f = pr1 g
 exact H.
Qed.

f = g ≃ (∏ x : X, f x = g x)

f = g ≃ (∏ x : X, f x = g x)

f = g → ∏ x : X, f x = g x
X, Y: setwithbinop
f, g: binopfun X Y
(∏ x : X, f x = g x) → f = g

isaprop (f = g)
X, Y: setwithbinop

f = g → ∏ x : X, f x = g x

e: f = g
x: X
f x = g x

    exact (maponpaths (λ (f : binopfun _ _), f x) e).

f, g: binopfun X Y
(∏ x : X, f x = g x) → f = g

f, g: binopfun X Y
e: ∏ x : X, f x = g x
f = g

e: ∏ x : X, f x = g x
f = g

e: ∏ x : X, f x = g x
homotsec f g

    exact e.
  
X, Y: setwithbinop
f, g: binopfun X Y
isaprop (f = g)
 abstract apply isasetbinopfun.
  
X, Y: setwithbinop
f, g: binopfun X Y
isaprop (∏ x : X, f x = g x)
 abstract (
      apply impred_isaprop;
      intro;
      apply setproperty
    ).
Defined.


X, Y, Z: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
g: binopfun Y Z
isbinopfun (g ∘ f)


X, Y, Z: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
g: binopfun Y Z
isbinopfun (g ∘ f)

  
X, Y, Z: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
g: binopfun Y Z
axf:= binopfunisbinopfun f: isbinopfun f
isbinopfun (g ∘ f)
 
X, Y, Z: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
g: binopfun Y Z
axf:= binopfunisbinopfun f: isbinopfun f
axg:= binopfunisbinopfun g: isbinopfun g
isbinopfun (g ∘ f)

  
X, Y, Z: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
g: binopfun Y Z
axf:= binopfunisbinopfun f: isbinopfun f
axg:= binopfunisbinopfun g: isbinopfun g
a, b: X
(g ∘ f) (a * b)%multoperation =
((g ∘ f) a * (g ∘ f) b)%multoperation
 
X, Y, Z: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
g: binopfun Y Z
axf:= binopfunisbinopfun f: isbinopfun f
axg:= binopfunisbinopfun g: isbinopfun g
a, b: X
g (f (a * b)%multoperation) =
(g (f a) * g (f b))%multoperation

  
X, Y, Z: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
g: binopfun Y Z
axf:= binopfunisbinopfun f: isbinopfun f
axg:= binopfunisbinopfun g: isbinopfun g
a, b: X
g (f a * f b)%multoperation =
(g (f a) * g (f b))%multoperation
 
X, Y, Z: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
g: binopfun Y Z
axf:= binopfunisbinopfun f: isbinopfun f
axg:= binopfunisbinopfun g: isbinopfun g
a, b: X
(g (f a) * g (f b))%multoperation =
(g (f a) * g (f b))%multoperation

  apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition binopfuncomp {X Y Z : setwithbinop} (f : binopfun X Y) (g : binopfun Y Z) :
  binopfun X Z := make_binopfun (g ∘ f) (isbinopfuncomp f g).

Definition binopmono (X Y : setwithbinop) : UU := ∑ (f : incl X Y), isbinopfun (pr1 f).

Definition make_binopmono {X Y : setwithbinop} (f : incl X Y) (is : isbinopfun f) :
  binopmono X Y := f ,, is.

Definition pr1binopmono (X Y : setwithbinop) : binopmono X Y → incl X Y := @pr1 _ _.
Coercion pr1binopmono : binopmono >-> incl.

Definition binopincltobinopfun (X Y : setwithbinop) :
  binopmono X Y → binopfun X Y := λ f, make_binopfun (pr1 (pr1 f)) (pr2 f).
Coercion binopincltobinopfun : binopmono >-> binopfun.

Definition binopmonocomp {X Y Z : setwithbinop} (f : binopmono X Y) (g : binopmono Y Z) :
  binopmono X Z := make_binopmono (inclcomp (pr1 f) (pr1 g)) (isbinopfuncomp f g).

Definition binopiso (X Y : setwithbinop) : UU := ∑ (f : X ≃ Y), isbinopfun f.

Definition make_binopiso {X Y : setwithbinop} (f : X ≃ Y) (is : isbinopfun f) :
  binopiso X Y := f ,, is.

Definition pr1binopiso (X Y : setwithbinop) : binopiso X Y → X ≃ Y := @pr1 _ _.
Coercion pr1binopiso : binopiso >-> weq.


X, Y: setwithbinop
isaset (binopiso X Y)


X, Y: setwithbinop
isaset (binopiso X Y)

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
isaset (X ≃ Y)
X, Y: setwithbinop
∏ x : X ≃ Y, isaset ((λ x0 : X ≃ Y, isbinopfun x0) x)

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
isaset (X ≃ Y)
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
isaset (X → Y)
X, Y: setwithbinop
∏ x : X → Y, isaset (isweq x)

    
X, Y: setwithbinop
isaset (X → Y)
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
∏ t : X, isaset ((λ _ : X, Y) t)
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
t: X
isaset ((λ _ : X, Y) t)
 use setproperty.
    
X, Y: setwithbinop
∏ x : X → Y, isaset (isweq x)
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
x: X → Y
isaset (isweq x)
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
x: X → Y
isaprop (isweq x)
 use isapropisweq.
  
X, Y: setwithbinop
∏ x : X ≃ Y, isaset ((λ x0 : X ≃ Y, isbinopfun x0) x)
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
w: X ≃ Y
isaset ((λ x : X ≃ Y, isbinopfun x) w)
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
w: X ≃ Y
isaprop (isbinopfun w)
 use isapropisbinopfun.
Qed.

Definition binopisotobinopmono (X Y : setwithbinop) :
  binopiso X Y → binopmono X Y := λ f, make_binopmono (weqtoincl (pr1 f)) (pr2 f).
Coercion binopisotobinopmono : binopiso >-> binopmono.

Definition binopisocomp {X Y Z : setwithbinop} (f : binopiso X Y) (g : binopiso Y Z) :
  binopiso X Z := make_binopiso (weqcomp (pr1 f) (pr1 g)) (isbinopfuncomp f g).


X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
isbinopfun (invmap (pr1 f))


X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
isbinopfun (invmap (pr1 f))

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
axf:= pr2 f: (λ f : X ≃ Y, isbinopfun f) (pr1 f)
isbinopfun (invmap (pr1 f))
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
axf:= pr2 f: (λ f : X ≃ Y, isbinopfun f) (pr1 f)
a, b: Y
invmap (pr1 f) (a * b)%multoperation =
(invmap (pr1 f) a * invmap (pr1 f) b)%multoperation

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
axf:= pr2 f: (λ f : X ≃ Y, isbinopfun f) (pr1 f)
a, b: Y
pr1 f (invmap (pr1 f) (a * b)%multoperation) =
pr1 f
  (invmap (pr1 f) a * invmap (pr1 f) b)%multoperation

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
axf:= pr2 f: (λ f : X ≃ Y, isbinopfun f) (pr1 f)
a, b: Y
(a * b)%multoperation =
pr1 f
  (invmap (pr1 f) a * invmap (pr1 f) b)%multoperation

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
axf:= pr2 f: (λ f : X ≃ Y, isbinopfun f) (pr1 f)
a, b: Y
(a * b)%multoperation =
(pr1 f (invmap (pr1 f) a) * pr1 f (invmap (pr1 f) b))%multoperation

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
axf:= pr2 f: (λ f : X ≃ Y, isbinopfun f) (pr1 f)
a, b: Y
(a * b)%multoperation =
(a * pr1 f (invmap (pr1 f) b))%multoperation

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
axf:= pr2 f: (λ f : X ≃ Y, isbinopfun f) (pr1 f)
a, b: Y
(a * b)%multoperation = (a * b)%multoperation

  apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition invbinopiso {X Y : setwithbinop} (f : binopiso X Y) :
  binopiso Y X := make_binopiso (invweq (pr1 f)) (isbinopfuninvmap f).


X: setwithbinop
binopiso X X


X: setwithbinop
binopiso X X

  
X: setwithbinop
X ≃ X
X: setwithbinop
isbinopfun ?f

  
X: setwithbinop
X ≃ X
 exact (idweq X).
  
X: setwithbinop
isbinopfun (idweq X)
 
X: setwithbinop
x1, x2: X
idweq X (x1 * x2)%multoperation =
(idweq X x1 * idweq X x2)%multoperation
 use idpath.
Defined.


(** **** (X = Y) ≃ (binopiso X Y)
   The idea is to use the composition (X = Y) ≃ (X ╝ Y) ≃ (binopiso X Y)
*)

Definition setwithbinop_univalence_weq1 (X Y : setwithbinop) : (X = Y) ≃ (X ╝ Y) :=
  total2_paths_equiv _ X Y.


X, Y: setwithbinop
X ╝ Y ≃ binopiso X Y


X, Y: setwithbinop
X ╝ Y ≃ binopiso X Y

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
pr1 X = pr1 Y ≃ (X ≃ Y)
X, Y: setwithbinop
∏ x : pr1 X = pr1 Y,
(λ x0 : pr1 X = pr1 Y,
 transportf (λ x1 : hSet, (λ X : hSet, binop X) x1) x0
   (pr2 X) = pr2 Y) x
≃ (λ x0 : X ≃ Y, isbinopfun x0) (?w x)

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
pr1 X = pr1 Y ≃ (X ≃ Y)
 use hSet_univalence.
  
X, Y: setwithbinop
∏ x : pr1 X = pr1 Y,
(λ x0 : pr1 X = pr1 Y,
 transportf (λ x1 : hSet, (λ X : hSet, binop X) x1) x0
   (pr2 X) = pr2 Y) x
≃ (λ x0 : X ≃ Y, isbinopfun x0)
    (hSet_univalence (pr1 X) (pr1 Y) x)
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
e: pr1 X = pr1 Y
(λ x : pr1 X = pr1 Y,
 transportf (λ x0 : hSet, (λ X : hSet, binop X) x0) x
   (pr2 X) = pr2 Y) e
≃ (λ x : X ≃ Y, isbinopfun x)
    (hSet_univalence (pr1 X) (pr1 Y) e)
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
e: pr1 X = pr1 Y
isbinopfun (hSet_univalence (pr1 X) (pr1 Y) e)
≃ transportf (λ x : hSet, (λ X : hSet, binop X) x) e
    (pr2 X) = pr2 Y
 
X: hSet
Xop: binop X
Y: setwithbinop
e: pr1 (X,, Xop) = pr1 Y
isbinopfun (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 Y) e)
≃ transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x) e (pr2 (X,, Xop)) =
  pr2 Y
 
X: hSet
Xop: binop X
Y: hSet
Yop: binop Y
e: pr1 (X,, Xop) = pr1 (Y,, Yop)
isbinopfun
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (Y,, Yop)) e)
≃ transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x) e (pr2 (X,, Xop)) =
  pr2 (Y,, Yop)
 
X: hSet
Xop: binop X
Y: hSet
Yop: binop Y
e: X = Y
isbinopfun
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (Y,, Yop)) e)
≃ transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x) e (pr2 (X,, Xop)) =
  pr2 (Y,, Yop)

    
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X
isbinopfun
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X))
≃ transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x) (idpath X)
    (pr2 (X,, Xop)) = pr2 (X,, Yop)
 
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X
isbinopfun
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X))
→ transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x) (idpath X)
    (pr2 (X,, Xop)) = pr2 (X,, Yop)
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X
transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x) (idpath X)
  (pr2 (X,, Xop)) = pr2 (X,, Yop)
→ isbinopfun
    (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
       (idpath X))
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X
isaprop
  (isbinopfun
     (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
        (idpath X)))
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X
isaprop
  (transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x) (idpath X)
     (pr2 (X,, Xop)) = pr2 (X,, Yop))

    
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X
isbinopfun
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X))
→ transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x) (idpath X)
    (pr2 (X,, Xop)) = pr2 (X,, Yop)
 
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X
i: isbinopfun
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X))
transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x) (idpath X)
  (pr2 (X,, Xop)) = pr2 (X,, Yop)

      
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X
i: isbinopfun
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X))
homotsec
  (transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x) (idpath X)
     (pr2 (X,, Xop))) (pr2 (X,, Yop))
 
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X
i: isbinopfun
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X))
x1: pr1 (X,, Yop)
transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x) (idpath X)
  (pr2 (X,, Xop)) x1 = pr2 (X,, Yop) x1

      
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X
i: isbinopfun
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X))
x1: pr1 (X,, Yop)
homotsec
  (transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x) (idpath X)
     (pr2 (X,, Xop)) x1) (pr2 (X,, Yop) x1)
 
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X
i: isbinopfun
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X))
x1, x2: pr1 (X,, Yop)
transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x) (idpath X)
  (pr2 (X,, Xop)) x1 x2 = pr2 (X,, Yop) x1 x2

      exact (i x1 x2).
    
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X
transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x) (idpath X)
  (pr2 (X,, Xop)) = pr2 (X,, Yop)
→ isbinopfun
    (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
       (idpath X))
 
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X
e: transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x) (idpath X)
  (pr2 (X,, Xop)) = pr2 (X,, Yop)
isbinopfun
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X))
 
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X
e: Xop = Yop
isbinopfun
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X))
 
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X
e: Xop = Yop
x1, x2: X,, Xop
hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
  (idpath X) (x1 * x2)%multoperation =
(hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
   (idpath X) x1 *
 hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
   (idpath X) x2)%multoperation
 
X: hSet
Xop: binop X
x1, x2: X,, Xop
hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Xop))
  (idpath X) (x1 * x2)%multoperation =
(hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Xop))
   (idpath X) x1 *
 hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Xop))
   (idpath X) x2)%multoperation
 use idpath.
    
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X
isaprop
  (isbinopfun
     (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
        (idpath X)))
 use isapropisbinopfun.
    
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X
isaprop
  (transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x) (idpath X)
     (pr2 (X,, Xop)) = pr2 (X,, Yop))
 use isasetbinoponhSet.
Defined.


X, Y: setwithbinop
X = Y → binopiso X Y


X, Y: setwithbinop
X = Y → binopiso X Y

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
e: X = Y
binopiso X Y
 
X: setwithbinop
binopiso X X
 exact (idbinopiso X).
Defined.


X, Y: setwithbinop
isweq (setwithbinop_univalence_map X Y)


X, Y: setwithbinop
isweq (setwithbinop_univalence_map X Y)

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
X = Y → binopiso X Y
X, Y: setwithbinop
homotsec ?f1 (setwithbinop_univalence_map X Y)
X, Y: setwithbinop
isweq ?f1

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
X = Y → binopiso X Y
 exact (weqcomp (setwithbinop_univalence_weq1 X Y) (setwithbinop_univalence_weq2 X Y)).
  
X, Y: setwithbinop
homotsec
  (setwithbinop_univalence_weq2 X Y
   ∘ setwithbinop_univalence_weq1 X Y)%weq
  (setwithbinop_univalence_map X Y)
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
e: X = Y
(setwithbinop_univalence_weq2 X Y
 ∘ setwithbinop_univalence_weq1 X Y)%weq e =
setwithbinop_univalence_map X Y e
 
X: setwithbinop
(setwithbinop_univalence_weq2 X X
 ∘ setwithbinop_univalence_weq1 X X)%weq (idpath X) =
setwithbinop_univalence_map X X (idpath X)
 use weqcomp_to_funcomp_app.
  
X, Y: setwithbinop
isweq
  (setwithbinop_univalence_weq2 X Y
   ∘ setwithbinop_univalence_weq1 X Y)%weq
 use weqproperty.
Defined.
Opaque setwithbinop_univalence_isweq.

Definition setwithbinop_univalence (X Y : setwithbinop) : (X = Y) ≃ (binopiso X Y)
  := make_weq
    (setwithbinop_univalence_map X Y)
    (setwithbinop_univalence_isweq X Y).


(** **** hfiber and binop*)

A, B: setwithbinop
f: binopfun A B
b1, b2: B
hf1: hfiber (pr1 f) b1
hf2: hfiber (pr1 f) b2
pr1 f (pr1 hf1 * pr1 hf2)%multoperation =
(b1 * b2)%multoperation


A, B: setwithbinop
f: binopfun A B
b1, b2: B
hf1: hfiber (pr1 f) b1
hf2: hfiber (pr1 f) b2
pr1 f (pr1 hf1 * pr1 hf2)%multoperation =
(b1 * b2)%multoperation

  
A, B: setwithbinop
f: binopfun A B
b1, b2: B
hf1: hfiber (pr1 f) b1
hf2: hfiber (pr1 f) b2
(f (pr1 hf1) * f (pr1 hf2))%multoperation =
(b1 * b2)%multoperation

  
A, B: setwithbinop
f: binopfun A B
b1, b2: B
hf1: hfiber (pr1 f) b1
hf2: hfiber (pr1 f) b2
(f (pr1 hf1) * f (pr1 hf2))%multoperation =
(pr1 f (hfiberpr1 (pr1 f) b1 hf1) * b2)%multoperation
 
A, B: setwithbinop
f: binopfun A B
b1, b2: B
hf1: hfiber (pr1 f) b1
hf2: hfiber (pr1 f) b2
(f (pr1 hf1) * f (pr1 hf2))%multoperation =
(pr1 f (hfiberpr1 (pr1 f) b1 hf1) *
 pr1 f (hfiberpr1 (pr1 f) b2 hf2))%multoperation
 use idpath.
Qed.

Definition hfiberbinop {A B : setwithbinop} (f : binopfun A B) (b1 b2 : B)
           (hf1 : hfiber (pr1 f) b1) (hf2 : hfiber (pr1 f) b2) :
  hfiber (pr1 f) (@op B b1 b2) :=
  make_hfiber (pr1 f) (@op A (pr1 hf1) (pr1 hf2)) (hfiberbinop_path f b1 b2 hf1 hf2).


(** * 3.3. Transport of properties of a binary operation *)


X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopmono X Y
x: X
is: islcancelable op (f x)
islcancelable op x


X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopmono X Y
x: X
is: islcancelable op (f x)
islcancelable op x

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopmono X Y
x: X
is: islcancelable op (f x)
isincl (λ x0 : X, (x * x0)%multoperation)

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopmono X Y
x: X
is: islcancelable op (f x)
isincl (f ∘ (λ x0 : X, (x * x0)%multoperation))

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopmono X Y
x: X
is: islcancelable op (f x)
homotsec ((λ y0 : Y, (f x * y0)%multoperation) ∘ f)
  (f ∘ (λ x0 : X, (x * x0)%multoperation))
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopmono X Y
x: X

h: homotsec
  ((λ y0 : Y, (f x * y0)%multoperation) ∘ f)
  (f ∘ (λ x0 : X, (x * x0)%multoperation))
isincl (f ∘ (λ x0 : X, (x * x0)%multoperation))

x: X
is: islcancelable op (f x)
x0: X
(f x * f x0)%multoperation = f (x * x0)%multoperation

X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopmono X Y
is: isassoc op
isassoc op


X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopmono X Y
is: isassoc op
isassoc op

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopmono X Y
is: isassoc op
axf:= pr2 f: (λ f : incl X Y, isbinopfun (pr1 f)) (pr1 f)
isassoc op
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopmono X Y
is: isassoc op
axf:= pr2 f: isbinopfun (pr11 f)
isassoc op
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopmono X Y
is: isassoc op
axf:= pr2 f: isbinopfun (pr11 f)
a, b, c: X
(a * b * c)%multoperation =
(a * (b * c))%multoperation

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopmono X Y
is: isassoc op
axf:= pr2 f: isbinopfun (pr11 f)
a, b, c: X
(pr11 f) (a * b * c)%multoperation =
(pr11 f) (a * (b * c))%multoperation

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopmono X Y
is: isassoc op
axf:= pr2 f: isbinopfun (pr11 f)
a, b, c: X
((pr11 f) (a * b) * (pr11 f) c)%multoperation =
(pr11 f) (a * (b * c))%multoperation
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopmono X Y
is: isassoc op
axf:= pr2 f: isbinopfun (pr11 f)
a, b, c: X
((pr11 f) a * (pr11 f) b * (pr11 f) c)%multoperation =
(pr11 f) (a * (b * c))%multoperation

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopmono X Y
is: isassoc op
axf:= pr2 f: isbinopfun (pr11 f)
a, b, c: X
((pr11 f) a * (pr11 f) b * (pr11 f) c)%multoperation =
((pr11 f) a * (pr11 f) (b * c))%multoperation
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopmono X Y
is: isassoc op
axf:= pr2 f: isbinopfun (pr11 f)
a, b, c: X
((pr11 f) a * (pr11 f) b * (pr11 f) c)%multoperation =
((pr11 f) a * ((pr11 f) b * (pr11 f) c))%multoperation
 apply is.
Qed.


X, Y: setwithbinop

is: iscomm op
iscomm op

iscomm op
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopmono X Y
is: iscomm op
axf:= pr2 f: isbinopfun (pr11 f)
iscomm op
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopmono X Y
is: iscomm op
axf:= pr2 f: isbinopfun (pr11 f)
a, b: X
(a * b)%multoperation = (b * a)%multoperation

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopmono X Y
is: iscomm op
axf:= pr2 f: isbinopfun (pr11 f)
a, b: X
(pr11 f) (a * b)%multoperation =
(pr11 f) (b * a)%multoperation

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopmono X Y
is: iscomm op
axf:= pr2 f: isbinopfun (pr11 f)
a, b: X
((pr11 f) a * (pr11 f) b)%multoperation =
(pr11 f) (b * a)%multoperation
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopmono X Y
is: iscomm op
axf:= pr2 f: isbinopfun (pr11 f)
a, b: X
((pr11 f) a * (pr11 f) b)%multoperation =
((pr11 f) b * (pr11 f) a)%multoperation
 apply is.
Qed.

Notation isassocisob := isassocmonob.
Notation iscommisob := iscommmonob.


X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
is: isassoc op
isassoc op


X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
is: isassoc op
isassoc op

  apply (isassocmonob (invbinopiso f) is).
Qed.


X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
is: iscomm op
iscomm op


X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
is: iscomm op
iscomm op

  apply (iscommmonob (invbinopiso f) is).
Qed.


X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
unx: X
is: isunit op unx
isunit op (f unx)


X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
unx: X
is: isunit op unx
isunit op (f unx)

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
unx: X
is: isunit op unx
axf:= pr2 f: (λ f : X ≃ Y, isbinopfun f) (pr1 f)
isunit op (f unx)
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
unx: X
is: isunit op unx
axf:= pr2 f: (λ f : X ≃ Y, isbinopfun f) (pr1 f)
islunit op (f unx)
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
unx: X
is: isunit op unx
axf:= pr2 f: (λ f : X ≃ Y, isbinopfun f) (pr1 f)
isrunit op (f unx)

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
unx: X
is: isunit op unx
axf:= pr2 f: (λ f : X ≃ Y, isbinopfun f) (pr1 f)
islunit op (f unx)
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
unx: X
is: isunit op unx
axf:= pr2 f: (λ f : X ≃ Y, isbinopfun f) (pr1 f)
a: Y
(f unx * a)%multoperation = a
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
unx: X
is: isunit op unx
axf:= pr2 f: (λ f : X ≃ Y, isbinopfun f) (pr1 f)
a: Y
(pr1 f unx * a)%multoperation = a

    
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
unx: X
is: isunit op unx
axf:= pr2 f: (λ f : X ≃ Y, isbinopfun f) (pr1 f)
a: Y
pr1 (invbinopiso f) (pr1 f unx * a)%multoperation =
pr1 (invbinopiso f) a

    
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
unx: X
is: isunit op unx
axf:= pr2 f: (λ f : X ≃ Y, isbinopfun f) (pr1 f)
a: Y
(pr1 (invbinopiso f) (pr1 f unx) *
 pr1 (invbinopiso f) a)%multoperation =
pr1 (invbinopiso f) a
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
unx: X
is: isunit op unx
axf:= pr2 f: (λ f : X ≃ Y, isbinopfun f) (pr1 f)
a: Y
(invmap (pr1 f) (pr1 f unx) * invmap (pr1 f) a)%multoperation =
invmap (pr1 f) a

    
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
unx: X
is: isunit op unx
axf:= pr2 f: (λ f : X ≃ Y, isbinopfun f) (pr1 f)
a: Y
(unx * invmap (pr1 f) a)%multoperation =
invmap (pr1 f) a
 apply (pr1 is).
  
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
unx: X
is: isunit op unx
axf:= pr2 f: (λ f : X ≃ Y, isbinopfun f) (pr1 f)
isrunit op (f unx)
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
unx: X
is: isunit op unx
axf:= pr2 f: (λ f : X ≃ Y, isbinopfun f) (pr1 f)
a: Y
(a * f unx)%multoperation = a
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
unx: X
is: isunit op unx
axf:= pr2 f: (λ f : X ≃ Y, isbinopfun f) (pr1 f)
a: Y
(a * pr1 f unx)%multoperation = a

    
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
unx: X
is: isunit op unx
axf:= pr2 f: (λ f : X ≃ Y, isbinopfun f) (pr1 f)
a: Y
pr1 (invbinopiso f) (a * pr1 f unx)%multoperation =
pr1 (invbinopiso f) a

    
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
unx: X
is: isunit op unx
axf:= pr2 f: (λ f : X ≃ Y, isbinopfun f) (pr1 f)
a: Y
(pr1 (invbinopiso f) a *
 pr1 (invbinopiso f) (pr1 f unx))%multoperation =
pr1 (invbinopiso f) a
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
unx: X
is: isunit op unx
axf:= pr2 f: (λ f : X ≃ Y, isbinopfun f) (pr1 f)
a: Y
(invmap (pr1 f) a * invmap (pr1 f) (pr1 f unx))%multoperation =
invmap (pr1 f) a

    
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
unx: X
is: isunit op unx
axf:= pr2 f: (λ f : X ≃ Y, isbinopfun f) (pr1 f)
a: Y
(invmap (pr1 f) a * unx)%multoperation =
invmap (pr1 f) a
 apply (pr2 is).
Qed.

Definition isunitalisof {X Y : setwithbinop} (f : binopiso X Y) (is : isunital (@op X)) :
  isunital (@op Y) := make_isunital (f (pr1 is)) (isunitisof f (pr1 is) (pr2 is)).


X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
uny: Y
is: isunit op uny
isunit op (invmap f uny)


X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
uny: Y
is: isunit op uny
isunit op (invmap f uny)

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
uny: Y
is: isunit op uny
int:= isunitisof (invbinopiso f): ∏ unx : Y, isunit op unx → isunit op (invbinopiso f unx)
isunit op (invmap f uny)
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
uny: Y
is: isunit op uny
int:= isunitisof (invbinopiso f): ∏ unx : Y, isunit op unx → isunit op (invbinopiso f unx)
isunit op (invmap f uny)
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
uny: Y
is: isunit op uny
int:= isunitisof (invbinopiso f): ∏ unx : Y, isunit op unx → isunit op (invmap (pr1 f) unx)
isunit op (invmap f uny)

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
uny: Y
is: isunit op uny
int:= isunitisof (invbinopiso f): ∏ unx : Y, isunit op unx → isunit op (invmap (pr1 f) unx)
isunit op uny
 apply is.
Qed.

Definition isunitalisob {X Y : setwithbinop} (f : binopiso X Y) (is : isunital (@op Y)) :
  isunital (@op X) := make_isunital ((invmap f) (pr1 is)) (isunitisob f (pr1 is) (pr2 is)).

Definition ismonoidopisof {X Y : setwithbinop} (f : binopiso X Y) (is : ismonoidop (@op X)) :
  ismonoidop (@op Y) := isassocisof f (pr1 is) ,, isunitalisof f (pr2 is).

Definition ismonoidopisob {X Y : setwithbinop} (f : binopiso X Y) (is : ismonoidop (@op Y)) :
  ismonoidop (@op X) := isassocisob f (pr1 is) ,, isunitalisob f (pr2 is).

f: binopiso X Y
unx: X
invx: X → X
is: isinv op unx invx
isinv op (pr1 f unx) (pr1 f ∘ invx ∘ invmap (pr1 f))

unx: X
invx: X → X
is: isinv op unx invx
isinv op (pr1 f unx) (pr1 f ∘ invx ∘ invmap (pr1 f))

  (pr1 (invbinopiso f))

a: Y

unx

Qed.

Definition isgropisof {X Y : setwithbinop} (f : binopiso X Y) (is : isgrop (@op X)) :
  isgrop (@op Y) := ismonoidopisof f is ,,
                    (f ∘ grinv_is is ∘ invmap f) ,,
                    isinvisof f (unel_is is) (grinv_is is) (pr2 (pr2 is)).


X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
uny: Y
invy: Y → Y
is: isinv op uny invy
isinv op (invmap (pr1 f) uny) (invmap f ∘ invy ∘ f)


X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopiso X Y
uny: Y
invy: Y → Y
is: isinv op uny invy
isinv op (invmap (pr1 f) uny) (invmap f ∘ invy ∘ f)

  apply (isinvisof (invbinopiso f) uny invy is).
Qed.

Definition isgropisob {X Y : setwithbinop} (f : binopiso X Y) (is : isgrop (@op Y)) :
  isgrop (@op X) := ismonoidopisob f is ,,
                    invmap f ∘ grinv_is is ∘ f ,,
                    isinvisob f (unel_is is) (grinv_is is) (pr2 (pr2 is)).

Definition isabmonoidopisof {X Y : setwithbinop} (f : binopiso X Y) (is : isabmonoidop (@op X)) :
  isabmonoidop (@op Y) := ismonoidopisof f is ,, iscommisof f (commax_is is).

Definition isabmonoidopisob {X Y : setwithbinop} (f : binopiso X Y) (is : isabmonoidop (@op Y)) :
  isabmonoidop (@op X) := ismonoidopisob f is ,, iscommisob f (commax_is is).

Definition isabgropisof {X Y : setwithbinop} (f : binopiso X Y) (is : isabgrop (@op X)) :
  isabgrop (@op Y) := isgropisof f is ,, iscommisof f (commax_is is).

Definition isabgropisob {X Y : setwithbinop} (f : binopiso X Y) (is : isabgrop (@op Y)) :
  isabgrop (@op X) := isgropisob f is ,, iscommisob f (commax_is is).


(** * 3.4. Subobject *)

Definition issubsetwithbinop {X : hSet} (opp : binop X) (A : hsubtype X) : UU :=
  ∏ a a' : A, A (opp (pr1 a) (pr1 a')).


X: hSet
opp: binop X
A: hsubtype X
isaprop (issubsetwithbinop opp A)


X: hSet
opp: binop X
A: hsubtype X
isaprop (issubsetwithbinop opp A)

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
A: hsubtype X
∏ t : A,
isofhlevel 1 (∏ a' : A, A (opp (pr1 t) (pr1 a')))
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
A: hsubtype X
a: A
isofhlevel 1 (∏ a' : A, A (opp (pr1 a) (pr1 a')))

  
X: hSet
opp: binop X
A: hsubtype X
a: A
∏ t : A, isofhlevel 1 (A (opp (pr1 a) (pr1 t)))
 
X: hSet
opp: binop X
A: hsubtype X
a, a': A
isofhlevel 1 (A (opp (pr1 a) (pr1 a')))

  apply (pr2 (A (opp (pr1 a) (pr1 a')))).
Defined.

Definition subsetswithbinop (X : setwithbinop) : UU :=
  ∑ (A : hsubtype X), issubsetwithbinop (@op X) A.

Definition make_subsetswithbinop
  {X : setwithbinop}
  (t : hsubtype X)
  (H : issubsetwithbinop op t)
  : subsetswithbinop X
  := t ,, H.

Definition subsetswithbinopconstr {X : setwithbinop} :
  ∏ (t : hsubtype X), (λ A : hsubtype X, issubsetwithbinop op A) t →
                       ∑ A : hsubtype X, issubsetwithbinop op A := @make_subsetswithbinop X.

Definition pr1subsetswithbinop (X : setwithbinop) : subsetswithbinop X → hsubtype X :=
  @pr1 _ (λ A : hsubtype X, issubsetwithbinop (@op X) A).
Coercion pr1subsetswithbinop : subsetswithbinop >-> hsubtype.

Definition pr2subsetswithbinop {X : setwithbinop} (Y : subsetswithbinop X) :
  issubsetwithbinop (@op X) (pr1subsetswithbinop X Y) := pr2 Y.


X: setwithbinop
subsetswithbinop X


X: setwithbinop
subsetswithbinop X

  
X: setwithbinop
issubsetwithbinop op (λ _ : X, htrue)
 
X: setwithbinop
x, x': λ _ : X, htrue
htrue
 apply tt.
Defined.

setwithbinop

setwithbinop

:
hSet: hSet
setwithbinop

:

binop aset

(isasetsubset (pr1carrier A) (setproperty X) (isinclpr1carrier A))
:

 make_carrier A
   (pr1carrier A a * pr1carrier A a')%multoperation
   (pr2 A a a'))
:
A → A → A: A → A → A
binop aset

X: setwithbinop
A: subsetswithbinop X
aset:= make_hSet A
(isasetsubset (pr1carrier A) (setproperty X) (isinclpr1carrier A))
:
hSet: hSet
subopp:= (λ a a' : A,
 make_carrier A
   (pr1carrier A a * pr1carrier A a')%multoperation
   (pr2 A a a'))
:
A → A → A: A → A → A
A → A → A
 apply subopp.
Defined.
Coercion carrierofasubsetwithbinop : subsetswithbinop >-> setwithbinop.


(** * 3.5. Relations compatible with a binary operation and quotient objects *)

Definition isbinophrel {X : setwithbinop} (R : hrel X) : UU :=
  (∏ a b c : X, R a b → R (op c a) (op c b)) × (∏ a b c : X, R a b → R (op a c) (op b c)).

Definition make_isbinophrel {X : setwithbinop} {R : hrel X}
           (H1 : ∏ a b c : X, R a b → R (op c a) (op c b))
           (H2 : ∏ a b c : X, R a b → R (op a c) (op b c)) : isbinophrel R :=
  H1 ,, H2.


X: setwithbinop
L, R: hrel X
lg: hrellogeq L R
isl: isbinophrel L
isbinophrel R

L, R: hrel X
lg: hrellogeq L R
isl: isbinophrel L
isbinophrel R

  
X: setwithbinop
L, R: hrel X
lg: hrellogeq L R
isl: isbinophrel L
∏ a b c : X,
R a b → R (c * a)%multoperation (c * b)%multoperation

isl: isbinophrel L
∏ a b c : X,
R a b → R (a * c)%multoperation (b * c)%multoperation

    apply ((pr1 (lg _ _) ((pr1 isl) _ _ _ (pr2 (lg  _ _) rab)))).

  (∏ b c : X,
   R a b
   → R (a * c)%multoperation (b * c)%multoperation)

a, b, c, d: X

R (a * c)%multoperation (b * d)%multoperation
 
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
ist: istrans R
isb: isbinophrel R
a, b, c, d: X
rab: R a b
rcd: R c d
racbc:= pr2 isb a b c rab: R (a * c)%multoperation (b * c)%multoperation
rbcbd:= pr1 isb c d b rcd: R (b * c)%multoperation (b * d)%multoperation
R (a * c)%multoperation (b * d)%multoperation

  apply (ist _ _ _ racbc rbcbd).
Defined.

a, b, c: X
rab: R a b
R (a * c)%multoperation (b * c)%multoperation
 apply (isb a b c c rab (isr c)).
Defined.

Definition binophrel (X : setwithbinop) : UU := ∑ (R : hrel X), isbinophrel R.

Definition make_binophrel {X : setwithbinop} (t : hrel X) (H : isbinophrel t)
  : binophrel X
  := t ,, H.

Definition pr1binophrel (X : setwithbinop) : binophrel X → hrel X :=
  @pr1 _ (λ R : hrel X, isbinophrel R).
Coercion pr1binophrel : binophrel >-> hrel.

Definition binophrel_resp_left {X : setwithbinop} (R : binophrel X)
           {a b : X} (c : X) (r : R a b) : R (op c a) (op c b) :=
  pr1 (pr2 R) a b c r.

Definition binophrel_resp_right {X : setwithbinop} (R : binophrel X)
           {a b : X} (c : X) (r : R a b) : R (op a c) (op b c) :=
  pr2 (pr2 R) a b c r.

Definition binoppo (X : setwithbinop) : UU := ∑ (R : po X), isbinophrel R.

Definition make_binoppo {X : setwithbinop} (t : po X) (H : isbinophrel t)
  : binoppo X
  := t ,, H.

Definition pr1binoppo (X : setwithbinop) : binoppo X → po X := @pr1 _ (λ R : po X, isbinophrel R).
Coercion pr1binoppo : binoppo >-> po.

Definition binopeqrel (X : setwithbinop) : UU := ∑ (R : eqrel X), isbinophrel R.

Definition make_binopeqrel {X : setwithbinop} (t : eqrel X) (H : isbinophrel t)
  : binopeqrel X
  := t ,, H.

Definition pr1binopeqrel (X : setwithbinop) : binopeqrel X → eqrel X :=
  @pr1 _ (λ R : eqrel X, isbinophrel R).
Coercion pr1binopeqrel : binopeqrel >-> eqrel.

Definition binopeqrel_resp_left {X : setwithbinop} (R : binopeqrel X)
           {a b : X} (c : X) (r : R a b) : R (op c a) (op c b) :=
  pr1 (pr2 R) a b c r.

Definition binopeqrel_resp_right {X : setwithbinop} (R : binopeqrel X)
           {a b : X} (c : X) (r : R a b) : R (op a c) (op b c) :=
  pr2 (pr2 R) a b c r.


X: setwithbinop
R: binopeqrel X
setwithbinop


X: setwithbinop
R: binopeqrel X
setwithbinop

  
X: setwithbinop
R: binopeqrel X
binop (setquotinset R)

qt:= setquot R: UU
binop (setquotinset R)

qtset:= setquotinset R: hSet

iscomp: iscomprelrelfun2 R R op
qtmlt:= setquotfun2 R R op iscomp: setquot R → setquot R → setquot R
binop qtset

  
X: setwithbinop
R: binopeqrel X
qt:= setquot R: UU
qtset:= setquotinset R: hSet
iscomp: iscomprelrelfun2 R R op
qtmlt:= setquotfun2 R R op iscomp: setquot R → setquot R → setquot R
binop (setquot R)
 
X: setwithbinop
R: binopeqrel X
qt:= setquot R: UU
qtset:= setquotinset R: hSet
iscomp: iscomprelrelfun2 R R op
qtmlt:= setquotfun2 R R op iscomp: setquot R → setquot R → setquot R
setquot R → setquot R → setquot R
 apply qtmlt.
Defined.

Definition ispartbinophrel {X : setwithbinop} (S : hsubtype X) (R : hrel X) : UU :=
  (∏ a b c : X, S c → R a b → R (op c a) (op c b)) ×
  (∏ a b c : X, S c → R a b → R (op a c) (op b c)).


X: setwithbinop
S: hsubtype X
R: hrel X
isaprop (ispartbinophrel S R)


X: setwithbinop
S: hsubtype X
R: hrel X
isaprop (ispartbinophrel S R)

  apply isapropdirprod ;
  apply impred_isaprop ; intros a ;
  apply impred_isaprop ; intros b ;
  apply impred_isaprop ; intros c ;
  apply isapropimpl, isapropimpl, propproperty.
Defined.

d2: isbinophrel L

 → L (c * a)%multoperation (c * b)%multoperation)

   → L (a * c)%multoperation
       (b * c)%multoperation)
