(* The binophrel generated by an arbitrary hrel *)
Local Notation "A ⇒ B" := (himpl A B).
Definition generated_binophrel_hrel {X : setwithbinop} (R : hrel X) : hrel X :=
  λ x x',  ∀(R' : binophrel X), (∏ x₁ x₂, R x₁ x₂ → R' x₁ x₂) ⇒ R' x x'.


X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
isbinophrel (generated_binophrel_hrel R)


X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
isbinophrel (generated_binophrel_hrel R)

  
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
∏ a b c : X,
generated_binophrel_hrel R a b
→ generated_binophrel_hrel R (c * a)%multoperation
    (c * b)%multoperation
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
∏ a b c : X,
generated_binophrel_hrel R a b
→ generated_binophrel_hrel R (a * c)%multoperation
    (b * c)%multoperation

  
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
∏ a b c : X,
generated_binophrel_hrel R a b
→ generated_binophrel_hrel R (c * a)%multoperation
    (c * b)%multoperation
 
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
a, b, c: X
H: generated_binophrel_hrel R a b
R': binophrel X
H2: ∏ x₁ x₂ : X, R x₁ x₂ → R' x₁ x₂
R' (c * a)%multoperation (c * b)%multoperation
 
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
a, b, c: X
H: generated_binophrel_hrel R a b
R': binophrel X
H2: ∏ x₁ x₂ : X, R x₁ x₂ → R' x₁ x₂
R' a b
 exact (H R' H2).
  
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
∏ a b c : X,
generated_binophrel_hrel R a b
→ generated_binophrel_hrel R (a * c)%multoperation
    (b * c)%multoperation
 
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
a, b, c: X
H: generated_binophrel_hrel R a b
R': binophrel X
H2: ∏ x₁ x₂ : X, R x₁ x₂ → R' x₁ x₂
R' (a * c)%multoperation (b * c)%multoperation
 
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
a, b, c: X
H: generated_binophrel_hrel R a b
R': binophrel X
H2: ∏ x₁ x₂ : X, R x₁ x₂ → R' x₁ x₂
R' a b
 exact (H R' H2).
Defined.

Definition generated_binophrel {X : setwithbinop} (R : hrel X) : binophrel X :=
  make_binophrel (generated_binophrel_hrel R) (isbinophrel_generated_binophrel R).


X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
x, x': X
r: R x x'
generated_binophrel R x x'


X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
x, x': X
r: R x x'
generated_binophrel R x x'

  
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
x, x': X
r: R x x'
R': binophrel X
H: ∏ x₁ x₂ : X, R x₁ x₂ → R' x₁ x₂
R' x x'
 exact (H x x' r).
Defined.

(* The binopeqrel generated by an arbitrary hrel *)
Definition generated_binopeqrel_hrel {X : setwithbinop} (R : hrel X) : hrel X :=
  λ x x',  ∀(R' : binopeqrel X), (∏ x₁ x₂, R x₁ x₂ → R' x₁ x₂) ⇒ R' x x'.


X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
isbinophrel (generated_binopeqrel_hrel R)


X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
isbinophrel (generated_binopeqrel_hrel R)

  
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
∏ a b c : X,
generated_binopeqrel_hrel R a b
→ generated_binopeqrel_hrel R (c * a)%multoperation
    (c * b)%multoperation
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
∏ a b c : X,
generated_binopeqrel_hrel R a b
→ generated_binopeqrel_hrel R (a * c)%multoperation
    (b * c)%multoperation

  
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
∏ a b c : X,
generated_binopeqrel_hrel R a b
→ generated_binopeqrel_hrel R (c * a)%multoperation
    (c * b)%multoperation
 
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
a, b, c: X
H: generated_binopeqrel_hrel R a b
R': binopeqrel X
H2: ∏ x₁ x₂ : X, R x₁ x₂ → R' x₁ x₂
R' (c * a)%multoperation (c * b)%multoperation
 
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
a, b, c: X
H: generated_binopeqrel_hrel R a b
R': binopeqrel X
H2: ∏ x₁ x₂ : X, R x₁ x₂ → R' x₁ x₂
R' a b
 exact (H R' H2).
  
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
∏ a b c : X,
generated_binopeqrel_hrel R a b
→ generated_binopeqrel_hrel R (a * c)%multoperation
    (b * c)%multoperation
 
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
a, b, c: X
H: generated_binopeqrel_hrel R a b
R': binopeqrel X
H2: ∏ x₁ x₂ : X, R x₁ x₂ → R' x₁ x₂
R' (a * c)%multoperation (b * c)%multoperation
 
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
a, b, c: X
H: generated_binopeqrel_hrel R a b
R': binopeqrel X
H2: ∏ x₁ x₂ : X, R x₁ x₂ → R' x₁ x₂
R' a b
 exact (H R' H2).
Defined.


X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
iseqrel (generated_binopeqrel_hrel R)


X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
iseqrel (generated_binopeqrel_hrel R)

  
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
istrans (generated_binopeqrel_hrel R)
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
isrefl (generated_binopeqrel_hrel R)
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
issymm (generated_binopeqrel_hrel R)

  
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
istrans (generated_binopeqrel_hrel R)
 
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
x1, x2, x3: X
H1: generated_binopeqrel_hrel R x1 x2
H2: generated_binopeqrel_hrel R x2 x3
R': binopeqrel X
HR: ∏ x₁ x₂ : X, R x₁ x₂ → R' x₁ x₂
R' x1 x3
 
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
x1, x2, x3: X
H1: generated_binopeqrel_hrel R x1 x2
H2: generated_binopeqrel_hrel R x2 x3
R': binopeqrel X
HR: ∏ x₁ x₂ : X, R x₁ x₂ → R' x₁ x₂
R' x1 ?x2
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
x1, x2, x3: X
H1: generated_binopeqrel_hrel R x1 x2
H2: generated_binopeqrel_hrel R x2 x3
R': binopeqrel X
HR: ∏ x₁ x₂ : X, R x₁ x₂ → R' x₁ x₂
R' ?x2 x3

    
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
x1, x2, x3: X
H1: generated_binopeqrel_hrel R x1 x2
H2: generated_binopeqrel_hrel R x2 x3
R': binopeqrel X
HR: ∏ x₁ x₂ : X, R x₁ x₂ → R' x₁ x₂
R' x1 ?x2
 exact (H1 R' HR).
    
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
x1, x2, x3: X
H1: generated_binopeqrel_hrel R x1 x2
H2: generated_binopeqrel_hrel R x2 x3
R': binopeqrel X
HR: ∏ x₁ x₂ : X, R x₁ x₂ → R' x₁ x₂
R' x2 x3
 exact (H2 R' HR).
  
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
isrefl (generated_binopeqrel_hrel R)
 
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
x: X
R': binopeqrel X
HR: ∏ x₁ x₂ : X, R x₁ x₂ → R' x₁ x₂
R' x x
 apply eqrelrefl.
  
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
issymm (generated_binopeqrel_hrel R)
 
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
x1, x2: X
H: generated_binopeqrel_hrel R x1 x2
R': binopeqrel X
HR: ∏ x₁ x₂ : X, R x₁ x₂ → R' x₁ x₂
R' x2 x1
 
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
x1, x2: X
H: generated_binopeqrel_hrel R x1 x2
R': binopeqrel X
HR: ∏ x₁ x₂ : X, R x₁ x₂ → R' x₁ x₂
R' x1 x2
 exact (H R' HR).
Defined.

Definition generated_binopeqrel {X : setwithbinop} (R : hrel X) : binopeqrel X :=
  make_binopeqrel (make_eqrel (generated_binopeqrel_hrel R) (iseqrel_generated_binopeqrel R))
                 (isbinophrel_generated_binopeqrel R).


X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
x, x': X
r: R x x'
generated_binopeqrel R x x'


X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
x, x': X
r: R x x'
generated_binopeqrel R x x'

  
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
x, x': X
r: R x x'
R': binopeqrel X
H: ∏ x₁ x₂ : X, R x₁ x₂ → R' x₁ x₂
R' x x'
 exact (H x x' r).
Defined.

(* A proof that homomorphisms preserve the generated relations if they preserve the original one *)

X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
R: binopeqrel Y
binopeqrel X

f: binopfun X Y
R: binopeqrel Y
binopeqrel X

f: binopfun X Y
R: binopeqrel Y
eqrel X

f: binopfun X Y
R: binopeqrel Y
isbinophrel ?t

R: binopeqrel Y

f: binopfun X Y
R: binopeqrel Y
hrel X

f: binopfun X Y
R: binopeqrel Y
iseqrel ?R

f: binopfun X Y
R: binopeqrel Y
hrel X

f: binopfun X Y
R: binopeqrel Y
x, x': X
hProp
 exact (R (f x) (f x')).

f: binopfun X Y
R: binopeqrel Y
iseqrel ((λ x x' : X, R (f x) (f x')) : hrel X)
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
R: binopeqrel Y
istrans (λ x x' : X, R (f x) (f x'))
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
R: binopeqrel Y
isrefl (λ x x' : X, R (f x) (f x'))
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
R: binopeqrel Y
issymm (λ x x' : X, R (f x) (f x'))

      
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
R: binopeqrel Y
istrans (λ x x' : X, R (f x) (f x'))
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
R: binopeqrel Y
x1, x2, x3: X
r1: R (f x1) (f x2)
r2: R (f x2) (f x3)
R (f x1) (f x3)
 exact (eqreltrans R _ _ _ r1 r2).
      
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
R: binopeqrel Y
isrefl (λ x x' : X, R (f x) (f x'))
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
R: binopeqrel Y
x: X
R (f x) (f x)
 exact (eqrelrefl R _).
      
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
R: binopeqrel Y
issymm (λ x x' : X, R (f x) (f x'))
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
R: binopeqrel Y
x, x': X
r: R (f x) (f x')
R (f x') (f x)
 exact (eqrelsymm R _ _ r).
  
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
R: binopeqrel Y
isbinophrel
  (make_eqrel ((λ x x' : X, R (f x) (f x')) : hrel X)
     (iseqrelconstr
        ((λ (x1 x2 x3 : X) (r1 : R (f x1) (f x2))
          (r2 : R (f x2) (f x3)),
          eqreltrans R (f x1) (f x2) (f x3) r1 r2)
         :
         istrans (λ x x' : X, R (f x) (f x')))
        ((λ x : X, eqrelrefl R (f x))
         :
         isrefl (λ x x' : X, R (f x) (f x')))
        ((λ (x x' : X) (r : R (f x) (f x')),
          eqrelsymm R (f x) (f x') r)
         :
         issymm (λ x x' : X, R (f x) (f x')))))
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
R: binopeqrel Y
x1, x2, x3: X
r: R (f x1) (f x2)
R (f x3 * f x1)%multoperation
  (f x3 * f x2)%multoperation
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
R: binopeqrel Y
x1, x2, x3: X
r: R (f x1) (f x2)
R (f x1 * f x3)%multoperation
  (f x2 * f x3)%multoperation

    
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
R: binopeqrel Y
x1, x2, x3: X
r: R (f x1) (f x2)
R (f x3 * f x1)%multoperation
  (f x3 * f x2)%multoperation
 exact (binopeqrel_resp_left R _ r).
    
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
R: binopeqrel Y
x1, x2, x3: X
r: R (f x1) (f x2)
R (f x1 * f x3)%multoperation
  (f x2 * f x3)%multoperation
 exact (binopeqrel_resp_right R _ r).
Defined.

f: binopfun X (setwithbinop_rev Y)
R: binopeqrel Y
binopeqrel X

binopeqrel X

binopeqrel (setwithbinop_rev Y)

eqrel (setwithbinop_rev Y)

isbinophrel ?t

R: binopeqrel Y
eqrel (setwithbinop_rev Y)
 exact R.
  
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X (setwithbinop_rev Y)
R: binopeqrel Y
isbinophrel R
 apply make_isbinophrel; intros x1 x2 x3 r; apply (pr2 R); exact r.
Defined.


X: setwithbinop
binopeqrel X


X: setwithbinop
binopeqrel X

eqrel X
X: setwithbinop
isbinophrel ?t

eqrel X
 
X: setwithbinop
hrel X
X: setwithbinop
iseqrel ?R

    
X: setwithbinop
hrel X
 
X: setwithbinop
x, x': X
hProp
 exact (make_hProp (x = x') (pr2 (pr1 X) _ _)).
    
X: setwithbinop
iseqrel
  ((λ x x' : X, make_hProp (x = x') ((pr21 X) x x'))
   :
   hrel X)
 
X: setwithbinop
istrans
  (λ x x' : X, make_hProp (x = x') ((pr21 X) x x'))
X: setwithbinop
isrefl
  (λ x x' : X, make_hProp (x = x') ((pr21 X) x x'))
X: setwithbinop
issymm
  (λ x x' : X, make_hProp (x = x') ((pr21 X) x x'))

      
X: setwithbinop
istrans
  (λ x x' : X, make_hProp (x = x') ((pr21 X) x x'))
 
X: setwithbinop
x1, x2, x3: X
r1: make_hProp (x1 = x2) ((pr21 X) x1 x2)
r2: make_hProp (x2 = x3) ((pr21 X) x2 x3)
make_hProp (x1 = x3) ((pr21 X) x1 x3)
 exact (r1 @ r2).
      
X: setwithbinop
isrefl
  (λ x x' : X, make_hProp (x = x') ((pr21 X) x x'))
 
X: setwithbinop
x: X
make_hProp (x = x) ((pr21 X) x x)
 reflexivity.
      
X: setwithbinop
issymm
  (λ x x' : X, make_hProp (x = x') ((pr21 X) x x'))
 
X: setwithbinop
x, x': X
r: make_hProp (x = x') ((pr21 X) x x')
make_hProp (x' = x) ((pr21 X) x' x)
 exact (!r).
  
X: setwithbinop
isbinophrel
  (make_eqrel
     ((λ x x' : X, make_hProp (x = x') ((pr21 X) x x'))
      :
      hrel X)
     (iseqrelconstr
        ((λ (x1 x2 x3 : X)
          (r1 : make_hProp (x1 = x2) ((pr21 X) x1 x2))
          (r2 : make_hProp (x2 = x3) ((pr21 X) x2 x3)),
          r1 @ r2)
         :
         istrans
           (λ x x' : X,
            make_hProp (x = x') ((pr21 X) x x')))
        ((λ x : X, idpath x)
         :
         isrefl
           (λ x x' : X,
            make_hProp (x = x') ((pr21 X) x x')))
        ((λ (x x' : X)
          (r : make_hProp (x = x') ((pr21 X) x x')),
          ! r)
         :
         issymm
           (λ x x' : X,
            make_hProp (x = x') ((pr21 X) x x')))))
 apply make_isbinophrel; simpl; intros x1 x2 x3 r; rewrite r; reflexivity.
Defined.

Definition binopeqrel_of_binopfun {X Y : setwithbinop} (f : binopfun X Y) : binopeqrel X :=
  pullback_binopeqrel f (binopeqrel_eq Y).


X, Y: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
f: binopfun X Y
H: iscomprelfun R f
iscomprelfun (generated_binopeqrel R) f


X, Y: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
f: binopfun X Y
H: iscomprelfun R f
iscomprelfun (generated_binopeqrel R) f

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
f: binopfun X Y
H: iscomprelfun R f
x, x': X
r: generated_binopeqrel R x x'
f x = f x'
 exact (r (binopeqrel_of_binopfun f) H).
Defined.


X, Y: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
S: hrel Y
f: binopfun X Y
H: iscomprelrelfun R S f
iscomprelrelfun (generated_binopeqrel R)
  (generated_binopeqrel S) f

R: hrel X
S: hrel Y
f: binopfun X Y
H: iscomprelrelfun R S f
iscomprelrelfun (generated_binopeqrel R)
  (generated_binopeqrel S) f

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
S: hrel Y
f: binopfun X Y
H: iscomprelrelfun R S f
x, x': X
r: generated_binopeqrel R x x'
generated_binopeqrel S (f x) (f x')
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
S: hrel Y
f: binopfun X Y
H: iscomprelrelfun R S f
x, x': X
r: generated_binopeqrel R x x'
∏ x₁ x₂ : X,
R x₁ x₂
→ pullback_binopeqrel f (generated_binopeqrel S) x₁ x₂

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
S: hrel Y
f: binopfun X Y
H: iscomprelrelfun R S f
x, x': X
r: generated_binopeqrel R x x'
x1, x2: X
r': R x1 x2
S': binopeqrel Y
s: ∏ x₁ x₂ : Y, S x₁ x₂ → S' x₁ x₂
S' (f x1) (f x2)
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
S: hrel Y
f: binopfun X Y
H: iscomprelrelfun R S f
x, x': X
r: generated_binopeqrel R x x'
x1, x2: X
r': R x1 x2
S': binopeqrel Y
s: ∏ x₁ x₂ : Y, S x₁ x₂ → S' x₁ x₂
S (f x1) (f x2)
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
S: hrel Y
f: binopfun X Y
H: iscomprelrelfun R S f
x, x': X
r: generated_binopeqrel R x x'
x1, x2: X
r': R x1 x2
S': binopeqrel Y
s: ∏ x₁ x₂ : Y, S x₁ x₂ → S' x₁ x₂
R x1 x2
 exact r'.
Defined.

(* It is also true for "contravariant" homomorphisms, where f (x * y) = f y * f x *)

S: hrel Y
f: binopfun X (setwithbinop_rev Y)
H: iscomprelrelfun R S f
iscomprelrelfun (generated_binopeqrel R)
  (generated_binopeqrel S) f

x, x': X

∏ x₁ x₂ : X,
R x₁ x₂
→ pullback_binopeqrel_rev f (generated_binopeqrel S)
    x₁ x₂

  
X, Y: setwithbinop

S: hrel Y

S' (f x1) (f x2)

x1, x2: X

s: ∏ x₁ x₂ : Y, S x₁ x₂ → S' x₁ x₂
S (f x1) (f x2)
 
X, Y: setwithbinop

S: hrel Y
f: binopfun X (setwithbinop_rev Y)
H: iscomprelrelfun R S f
x, x': X
r: generated_binopeqrel R x x'
x1, x2: X
r': R x1 x2
S': binopeqrel Y
s: ∏ x₁ x₂ : Y, S x₁ x₂ → S' x₁ x₂
R x1 x2
 exact r'.
Defined.

(** * 3.6. Relations inversely compatible with a binary operation *)

Definition isinvbinophrel {X : setwithbinop} (R : hrel X) : UU :=
  (∏ a b c : X, R (op c a) (op c b) →  R a b) × (∏ a b c : X, R (op a c) (op b c) → R a b).


X: setwithbinop
L, R: hrel X
lg: hrellogeq L R
isl: isinvbinophrel L
isinvbinophrel R


X: setwithbinop
L, R: hrel X
lg: hrellogeq L R
isl: isinvbinophrel L
isinvbinophrel R

  
X: setwithbinop
L, R: hrel X
lg: hrellogeq L R
isl: isinvbinophrel L
∏ a b c : X,
R (c * a)%multoperation (c * b)%multoperation → R a b
X: setwithbinop
L, R: hrel X
lg: hrellogeq L R
isl: isinvbinophrel L
∏ a b c : X,
R (a * c)%multoperation (b * c)%multoperation → R a b

  
X: setwithbinop
L, R: hrel X
lg: hrellogeq L R
isl: isinvbinophrel L
∏ a b c : X,
R (c * a)%multoperation (c * b)%multoperation → R a b
 
X: setwithbinop
L, R: hrel X
lg: hrellogeq L R
isl: isinvbinophrel L
a, b, c: X
rab: R (c * a)%multoperation (c * b)%multoperation
R a b

    apply ((pr1 (lg _ _) ((pr1 isl) _ _ _ (pr2 (lg  _ _) rab)))).
  
X: setwithbinop
L, R: hrel X
lg: hrellogeq L R
isl: isinvbinophrel L
∏ a b c : X,
R (a * c)%multoperation (b * c)%multoperation → R a b
 
X: setwithbinop
L, R: hrel X
lg: hrellogeq L R
isl: isinvbinophrel L
a, b, c: X
rab: R (a * c)%multoperation (b * c)%multoperation
R a b

    apply ((pr1 (lg _ _) ((pr2 isl) _ _ _ (pr2 (lg  _ _) rab)))).
Defined.


X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
isaprop (isinvbinophrel R)


X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
isaprop (isinvbinophrel R)

isaprop
  (∏ a b c : X,
   R (c * a)%multoperation (c * b)%multoperation
   → R a b)

  (∏ a b c : X,

   → R a b)

   → R a b)

∏ t : X,
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ b c : X,
   R (c * t)%multoperation (c * b)%multoperation
   → R t b)

a: X

  (∏ b c : X,

    apply (pr2 (R _ _)).

isaprop
  (∏ a b c : X,

X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
a, b, c: X
R (a * c)%multoperation (b * c)%multoperation
→ isofhlevel 1 (R a b)
 
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
a, b, c: X
r: R (a * c)%multoperation (b * c)%multoperation
isofhlevel 1 (R a b)

    apply (pr2 (R _ _)).
Defined.


X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
is: iscomm op
isl: ∏ a b c : X, R (c * a)%multoperation (c * b)%multoperation → R a b
isinvbinophrel R

∏ a b c : X,
R (a * c)%multoperation (b * c)%multoperation → R a b

R: hrel X
is: iscomm op
isl: ∏ a b c : X, R (c * a)%multoperation (c * b)%multoperation → R a b
a, b, c: X
rab: R (a * c)%multoperation (b * c)%multoperation
R a b

  
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
is: iscomm op
isl: ∏ a b c : X, R (c * a)%multoperation (c * b)%multoperation → R a b
a, b, c: X

R a b
 
X: setwithbinop
R: hrel X
is: iscomm op
isl: ∏ a b c : X, R (c * a)%multoperation (c * b)%multoperation → R a b
a, b, c: X
rab: R (c * a)%multoperation (c * b)%multoperation
R a b

  apply (isl _ _ _ rab).
Defined.

Definition ispartinvbinophrel {X : setwithbinop} (S : hsubtype X) (R : hrel X) : UU :=
  (∏ a b c : X, S c → R (op c a) (op c b) → R a b) ×
  (∏ a b c : X, S c → R (op a c) (op b c) → R a b).


X: setwithbinop
S: hsubtype X
L: hrel X
d2: isinvbinophrel L
ispartinvbinophrel S L


X: setwithbinop
S: hsubtype X
L: hrel X
d2: isinvbinophrel L
ispartinvbinophrel S L

  
X: setwithbinop
S: hsubtype X
L: hrel X
d2: (∏ a b c : X,
 L (c * a)%multoperation (c * b)%multoperation
 → L a b)
× (∏ a b c : X,
   L (a * c)%multoperation (b * c)%multoperation
   → L a b)
ispartinvbinophrel S L

 L (c * a)%multoperation (c * b)%multoperation
 → L a b)

   → L a b)

 S c
 → L (c * a)%multoperation (c * b)%multoperation
   → L a b)

   → L (a * c)%multoperation (b * c)%multoperation
     → L a b)

 → L a b)

   → L a b)

s: S c
L (c * a)%multoperation (c * b)%multoperation → L a b

 → L a b)
× (∏ a b c : X,

   → L a b)
a, b, c: X
s: S c
L (a * c)%multoperation (b * c)%multoperation → L a b
 apply (pr2 d2 a b c).

(** * 3.7. Homomorphisms and relations *)


X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
R: hrel Y
is: isbinophrel R
isbinophrel (λ x x' : X, R (f x) (f x'))


X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
R: hrel Y
is: isbinophrel R
isbinophrel (λ x x' : X, R (f x) (f x'))

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
R: hrel Y
is: isbinophrel R
ish:= pr2 f
:
∏ a0 b0 : X,
f (a0 * b0)%multoperation =
(f a0 * f b0)%multoperation: ∏ a0 b0 : X, f (a0 * b0)%multoperation = (f a0 * f b0)%multoperation
isbinophrel (λ x x' : X, R (f x) (f x'))

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
R: hrel Y
is: isbinophrel R
ish:= pr2 f
:
∏ a0 b0 : X,
f (a0 * b0)%multoperation =
(f a0 * f b0)%multoperation: ∏ a0 b0 : X, f (a0 * b0)%multoperation = (f a0 * f b0)%multoperation
∏ a b c : X,
R (f a) (f b)
→ R (f (c * a)%multoperation)
    (f (c * b)%multoperation)
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
R: hrel Y

∏ a b c : X,
R (f a) (f b)
→ R (f (a * c)%multoperation)
    (f (b * c)%multoperation)

:

∏ a b c : X,
R (f a) (f b)
→ R (f (c * a)%multoperation)
    (f (c * b)%multoperation)

R (f (c * a)%multoperation) (f (c * b)%multoperation)

R (f c * f a)%multoperation (f (c * b)%multoperation)

:

R (f c * f a)%multoperation (f c * f b)%multoperation

R (f a) (f b)
 apply r.

X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y

ish:= pr2 f
:
∏ a0 b0 : X,

→ R (f a) (f b)

X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
SX: hsubtype X
SY: hsubtype Y
iss: ∏ x : X, SX x → SY (f x)
R: hrel Y
is: ispartbinophrel SY R
ish:= pr2 f
:
∏ a0 b0 : X,
f (a0 * b0)%multoperation =
(f a0 * f b0)%multoperation: ∏ a0 b0 : X, f (a0 * b0)%multoperation = (f a0 * f b0)%multoperation

s: SX c
r: R (f a) (f b)
R (f a * f c)%multoperation (f b * f c)%multoperation

    apply ((pr2 is) _ _ _ (iss _ s) r).
Defined.

f: binopfun X Y
R: hrel Y
is: isinvbinophrel R
isinvbinophrel (λ x x' : X, R (f x) (f x'))


X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
R: hrel Y
is: isinvbinophrel R
isinvbinophrel (λ x x' : X, R (f x) (f x'))

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
R: hrel Y
is: isinvbinophrel R
ish:= pr2 f
:
∏ a0 b0 : X,
f (a0 * b0)%multoperation =
(f a0 * f b0)%multoperation: ∏ a0 b0 : X, f (a0 * b0)%multoperation = (f a0 * f b0)%multoperation
isinvbinophrel (λ x x' : X, R (f x) (f x'))

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
R: hrel Y
is: isinvbinophrel R
ish:= pr2 f
:
∏ a0 b0 : X,
f (a0 * b0)%multoperation =
(f a0 * f b0)%multoperation: ∏ a0 b0 : X, f (a0 * b0)%multoperation = (f a0 * f b0)%multoperation
∏ a b c : X,
R (f (c * a)%multoperation) (f (c * b)%multoperation)
→ R (f a) (f b)

:

∏ a b c : X,
R (f (a * c)%multoperation) (f (b * c)%multoperation)
→ R (f a) (f b)

:

→ R (f a) (f b)

:

  (f (c * b)%multoperation)
R (f a) (f b)
 
X, Y: setwithbinop

R: hrel Y
is: isinvbinophrel R
ish:= pr2 f
:
∏ a0 b0 : X,

r: R (f c * f a)%multoperation
  (f (c * b)%multoperation)
R (f a) (f b)
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
R: hrel Y
is: isinvbinophrel R
ish:= pr2 f
:
∏ a0 b0 : X,

a, b, c: X
r: R (f c * f a)%multoperation
  (f c * f b)%multoperation
R (f a) (f b)

    apply ((pr1 is) _ _ _ r).

:

  (f b * f c)%multoperation

Defined.


X, Y: setwithbinop

iss: ∏ x : X, SX x → SY (f x)

is: ispartinvbinophrel SY R
ispartinvbinophrel SX (λ x x' : X, R (f x) (f x'))

→ R (f (c * a)%multoperation)

→ R (f (c * a)%multoperation)

f: binopfun X Y
SX: hsubtype X

is: ispartinvbinophrel SY R
ish:= pr2 f
:
∏ a0 b0 : X,
f (a0 * b0)%multoperation =

a, b, c: X
s: SX c
r: R (f (c * a)%multoperation)
  (f (c * b)%multoperation)
R (f a) (f b)
 
X, Y: setwithbinop

:

a, b, c: X
s: SX c
r: R (f c * f a)%multoperation
  (f (c * b)%multoperation)
R (f a) (f b)
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
SX: hsubtype X
SY: hsubtype Y
iss: ∏ x : X, SX x → SY (f x)
R: hrel Y
is: ispartinvbinophrel SY R
ish:= pr2 f
:
∏ a0 b0 : X,
f (a0 * b0)%multoperation =
(f a0 * f b0)%multoperation: ∏ a0 b0 : X, f (a0 * b0)%multoperation = (f a0 * f b0)%multoperation
a, b, c: X
s: SX c
r: R (f c * f a)%multoperation
  (f c * f b)%multoperation
R (f a) (f b)

    apply ((pr1 is) _ _ _ (iss _ s) r).

SX c
→ R (f (a * c)%multoperation)
    (f (b * c)%multoperation) → R (f a) (f b)

r: R (f (a * c)%multoperation)
  (f (b * c)%multoperation)
R (f a) (f b)

r: R (f a * f c)%multoperation

R (f a) (f b)
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
f: binopfun X Y
SX: hsubtype X
SY: hsubtype Y
iss: ∏ x : X, SX x → SY (f x)
R: hrel Y
is: ispartinvbinophrel SY R
ish:= pr2 f
:
∏ a0 b0 : X,
f (a0 * b0)%multoperation =
(f a0 * f b0)%multoperation: ∏ a0 b0 : X, f (a0 * b0)%multoperation = (f a0 * f b0)%multoperation
a, b, c: X
s: SX c
r: R (f a * f c)%multoperation
  (f b * f c)%multoperation
R (f a) (f b)

    apply ((pr2 is) _ _ _ (iss _ s) r).
Defined.


(** * 3.8. Quotient relations *)


X: setwithbinop
R: binopeqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: isbinophrel L
isbinophrel (quotrel is)


X: setwithbinop
R: binopeqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: isbinophrel L
isbinophrel (quotrel is)

  
X: setwithbinop
R: binopeqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: isbinophrel L
(∏ a b c : setwithbinopquot R,
 quotrel is a b
 → quotrel is (c * a)%multoperation
     (c * b)%multoperation)
× (∏ a b c : setwithbinopquot R,
   quotrel is a b
   → quotrel is (a * c)%multoperation
       (b * c)%multoperation)
 
X: setwithbinop
R: binopeqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: isbinophrel L
∏ a b c : setwithbinopquot R,
quotrel is a b
→ quotrel is (c * a)%multoperation
    (c * b)%multoperation
X: setwithbinop
R: binopeqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: isbinophrel L
∏ a b c : setwithbinopquot R,
quotrel is a b
→ quotrel is (a * c)%multoperation
    (b * c)%multoperation

  
X: setwithbinop
R: binopeqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: isbinophrel L
∏ a b c : setwithbinopquot R,
quotrel is a b
→ quotrel is (c * a)%multoperation
    (c * b)%multoperation
 
X: setwithbinop
R: binopeqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: isbinophrel L
∏ a b c : setwithbinopquot R,
isaprop
  (quotrel is a b
   → quotrel is (c * a)%multoperation
       (c * b)%multoperation)
X: setwithbinop
R: binopeqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: isbinophrel L
int: ∏ a b c : setwithbinopquot R,
isaprop
(quotrel is a b → quotrel is (c * a)%multoperation (c * b)%multoperation)
∏ a b c : setwithbinopquot R,
quotrel is a b
→ quotrel is (c * a)%multoperation
    (c * b)%multoperation

    
X: setwithbinop
R: binopeqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: isbinophrel L
∏ a b c : setwithbinopquot R,
isaprop
  (quotrel is a b
   → quotrel is (c * a)%multoperation
       (c * b)%multoperation)

      
X: setwithbinop
R: binopeqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: isbinophrel L
a, b, c: setwithbinopquot R
isaprop
  (quotrel is a b
   → quotrel is (c * a)%multoperation
       (c * b)%multoperation)
 
X: setwithbinop
R: binopeqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: isbinophrel L
a, b, c: setwithbinopquot R
quotrel is a b
→ isofhlevel 1
    (quotrel is (c * a)%multoperation
       (c * b)%multoperation)
 
X: setwithbinop
R: binopeqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: isbinophrel L
a, b, c: setwithbinopquot R
t: quotrel is a b
isofhlevel 1
  (quotrel is (c * a)%multoperation
     (c * b)%multoperation)
 apply (pr2 (quotrel is _ _)).
    
X: setwithbinop
R: binopeqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: isbinophrel L
int: ∏ a b c : setwithbinopquot R,
isaprop
(quotrel is a b → quotrel is (c * a)%multoperation (c * b)%multoperation)
∏ a b c : setwithbinopquot R,
quotrel is a b
→ quotrel is (c * a)%multoperation
    (c * b)%multoperation

    
X: setwithbinop
R: binopeqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: isbinophrel L
int: ∏ a b c : setwithbinopquot R,
isaprop
(quotrel is a b → quotrel is (c * a)%multoperation (c * b)%multoperation)
∏ x x' x'' : X,
make_hProp
  (quotrel is (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x')
   → quotrel is
       (setquotpr R x'' * setquotpr R x)%multoperation
       (setquotpr R x'' * setquotpr R x')%multoperation)
  (int (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x')
     (setquotpr R x''))

    exact (pr1 isl).
  
X: setwithbinop
R: binopeqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: isbinophrel L
∏ a b c : setwithbinopquot R,
quotrel is a b
→ quotrel is (a * c)%multoperation
    (b * c)%multoperation
 
X: setwithbinop
R: binopeqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: isbinophrel L
∏ a b c : setwithbinopquot R,
isaprop
  (quotrel is a b
   → quotrel is (a * c)%multoperation
       (b * c)%multoperation)
X: setwithbinop
R: binopeqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: isbinophrel L
int: ∏ a b c : setwithbinopquot R,
isaprop
(quotrel is a b → quotrel is (a * c)%multoperation (b * c)%multoperation)
∏ a b c : setwithbinopquot R,
quotrel is a b
→ quotrel is (a * c)%multoperation
    (b * c)%multoperation

    
X: setwithbinop
R: binopeqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: isbinophrel L
∏ a b c : setwithbinopquot R,
isaprop
  (quotrel is a b
   → quotrel is (a * c)%multoperation
       (b * c)%multoperation)

      
X: setwithbinop
R: binopeqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: isbinophrel L
a, b, c: setwithbinopquot R
isaprop
  (quotrel is a b
   → quotrel is (a * c)%multoperation
       (b * c)%multoperation)
 
X: setwithbinop
R: binopeqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: isbinophrel L
a, b, c: setwithbinopquot R
quotrel is a b
→ isofhlevel 1
    (quotrel is (a * c)%multoperation
       (b * c)%multoperation)
 
X: setwithbinop
R: binopeqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: isbinophrel L
a, b, c: setwithbinopquot R
t: quotrel is a b
isofhlevel 1
  (quotrel is (a * c)%multoperation
     (b * c)%multoperation)
 apply (pr2 (quotrel is _ _)).
    
X: setwithbinop
R: binopeqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: isbinophrel L
int: ∏ a b c : setwithbinopquot R,
isaprop
(quotrel is a b → quotrel is (a * c)%multoperation (b * c)%multoperation)
∏ a b c : setwithbinopquot R,
quotrel is a b
→ quotrel is (a * c)%multoperation
    (b * c)%multoperation

    
X: setwithbinop
R: binopeqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: isbinophrel L
int: ∏ a b c : setwithbinopquot R,
isaprop
(quotrel is a b → quotrel is (a * c)%multoperation (b * c)%multoperation)
∏ x x' x'' : X,
make_hProp
  (quotrel is (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x')
   → quotrel is
       (setquotpr R x * setquotpr R x'')%multoperation
       (setquotpr R x' * setquotpr R x'')%multoperation)
  (int (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x')
     (setquotpr R x''))

    exact (pr2 isl).
Defined.


X: hSet
R: eqrel X
f: binop X
is: iscomprelrelfun2 R R f
p: iscomm f
iscomm (setquotfun2 R R f is)


X: hSet
R: eqrel X
f: binop X
is: iscomprelrelfun2 R R f
p: iscomm f
iscomm (setquotfun2 R R f is)

  
X: hSet
R: eqrel X
f: binop X
is: iscomprelrelfun2 R R f
p: iscomm f
∏ x x' : X,
(λ x0 y : setquot R,
 (setquotfun2 R R f is x0 y =
  setquotfun2 R R f is y x0)%logic) (setquotpr R x)
  (setquotpr R x')

  
X: hSet
R: eqrel X
f: binop X
is: iscomprelrelfun2 R R f
p: iscomm f
x, x': X
(λ x y : setquot R,
 (setquotfun2 R R f is x y = setquotfun2 R R f is y x)%logic)
  (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x')

  
X: hSet
R: eqrel X
f: binop X
is: iscomprelrelfun2 R R f
p: iscomm f
x, x': X
setquotpr R (f x x') = setquotpr R (f x' x)

  now rewrite p.
Defined.


X: hSet
R: eqrel X
f: binop X
is: iscomprelrelfun2 R R f
p: isassoc f
isassoc (setquotfun2 R R f is)


X: hSet
R: eqrel X
f: binop X
is: iscomprelrelfun2 R R f
p: isassoc f
isassoc (setquotfun2 R R f is)

  
X: hSet
R: eqrel X
f: binop X
is: iscomprelrelfun2 R R f
p: isassoc f
ff:= setquotfun2 R R f is: setquot R → setquot R → setquot R
isassoc ff

  
X: hSet
R: eqrel X
f: binop X
is: iscomprelrelfun2 R R f
p: isassoc f
ff:= setquotfun2 R R f is: setquot R → setquot R → setquot R
x, x', x'': setquot R
ff (ff x x') x'' = ff x (ff x' x'')

  
X: hSet
R: eqrel X
f: binop X
is: iscomprelrelfun2 R R f
p: isassoc f
ff:= setquotfun2 R R f is: setquot R → setquot R → setquot R
x, x', x'': setquot R
∏ x x' x'' : X,
(λ x0 y z : setquot R,
 (ff (ff z x0) y = ff z (ff x0 y))%logic)
  (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x') (setquotpr R x'')

  
X: hSet
R: eqrel X
f: binop X
is: iscomprelrelfun2 R R f
p: isassoc f
ff:= setquotfun2 R R f is: setquot R → setquot R → setquot R
x, x', x'': setquot R
x0, x'0, x''0: X
(λ x y z : setquot R,
 (ff (ff z x) y = ff z (ff x y))%logic)
  (setquotpr R x0) (setquotpr R x'0)
  (setquotpr R x''0)

  
X: hSet
R: eqrel X
f: binop X
is: iscomprelrelfun2 R R f
p: isassoc f
ff:= setquotfun2 R R f is: setquot R → setquot R → setquot R
x, x', x'': setquot R
x0, x'0, x''0: X
setquotpr R (f (f x''0 x0) x'0) =
setquotpr R (f x''0 (f x0 x'0))

  now rewrite p.
Defined.

(** * 3.9. Direct products *)


X, Y: setwithbinop
setwithbinop


X, Y: setwithbinop
setwithbinop

  
X, Y: setwithbinop
binop (setdirprod X Y)
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
setdirprod X Y → setdirprod X Y → setdirprod X Y
 
X, Y: setwithbinop
X × Y → X × Y → X × Y

  (* ??? in 8.4-8.5-trunk the following apply generates an error message if the
     type of xy and xy' is left as _ despite the fact that the type of goal is
     X × Y → X × Y →.. *)
  apply (λ xy xy' : X × Y, op (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy') ,, op (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')).
Defined.


(** * 4. Sets with two binary operations *)

(** * 4.1. General definitions *)

Definition setwith2binop : UU := ∑ (X : hSet), (binop X) × (binop X).

Definition make_setwith2binop (X : hSet) (opps : (binop X) × (binop X)) :
  setwith2binop := X ,, opps.

Definition pr1setwith2binop : setwith2binop → hSet :=
  @pr1 _ (λ X : hSet, (binop X) × (binop X)).
Coercion pr1setwith2binop : setwith2binop >-> hSet.

Definition op1 {X : setwith2binop} : binop X := pr1 (pr2 X).

Definition op2 {X : setwith2binop} : binop X := pr2 (pr2 X).

Definition setwithbinop1 (X : setwith2binop) : setwithbinop := make_setwithbinop (pr1 X) (@op1 X).

Definition setwithbinop2 (X : setwith2binop) : setwithbinop := make_setwithbinop (pr1 X) (@op2 X).

Declare Scope twobinops_scope.
Notation "x + y" := (op1 x y) : twobinops_scope.
Notation "x * y" := (op2 x y) : twobinops_scope.


X: hSet
isaset (binop X × binop X)


X: hSet
isaset (binop X × binop X)

  
X: hSet
isofhlevel 2 (binop X)
X: hSet
isofhlevel 2 (binop X)

  
X: hSet
isofhlevel 2 (binop X)
 use isasetbinoponhSet.
  
X: hSet
isofhlevel 2 (binop X)
 use isasetbinoponhSet.
Qed.


(** * 4.2. Functions compatible with a pair of binary operation (homomorphisms) and their properties *)

Definition istwobinopfun {X Y : setwith2binop} (f : X → Y) : UU :=
  (∏ x x' : X, f (op1 x x') = op1 (f x) (f x')) ×
  (∏ x x' : X, f (op2 x x') = op2 (f x) (f x')).

Definition make_istwobinopfun {X Y : setwith2binop} (f : X → Y)
           (H1 : ∏ x x' : X, f (op1 x x') = op1 (f x) (f x'))
           (H2 : ∏ x x' : X, f (op2 x x') = op2 (f x) (f x')) :
  istwobinopfun f := H1 ,, H2.


X, Y: setwith2binop
f: X → Y
isaprop (istwobinopfun f)


X, Y: setwith2binop
f: X → Y
isaprop (istwobinopfun f)

  
X, Y: setwith2binop
f: X → Y
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ x x' : X, f (op1 x x') = op1 (f x) (f x'))
X, Y: setwith2binop
f: X → Y
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ x x' : X, f (op2 x x') = op2 (f x) (f x'))

  
X, Y: setwith2binop
f: X → Y
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ x x' : X, f (op1 x x') = op1 (f x) (f x'))
 
X, Y: setwith2binop
f: X → Y
∏ t : X,
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ x' : X, f (op1 t x') = op1 (f t) (f x'))
 
X, Y: setwith2binop
f: X → Y
x: X
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ x' : X, f (op1 x x') = op1 (f x) (f x'))

    
X, Y: setwith2binop
f: X → Y
x: X
∏ t : X, isofhlevel 1 (f (op1 x t) = op1 (f x) (f t))
 
X, Y: setwith2binop
f: X → Y
x, x': X
isofhlevel 1 (f (op1 x x') = op1 (f x) (f x'))

    apply (setproperty Y).
  
X, Y: setwith2binop
f: X → Y
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ x x' : X, f (op2 x x') = op2 (f x) (f x'))
 
X, Y: setwith2binop

∏ t : X,
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ x' : X, f (op2 t x') = op2 (f t) (f x'))
 
X, Y: setwith2binop

x: X
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ x' : X, f (op2 x x') = op2 (f x) (f x'))

    
X, Y: setwith2binop
f: X → Y
x: X
∏ t : X, isofhlevel 1 (f (op2 x t) = op2 (f x) (f t))
 
X, Y: setwith2binop
f: X → Y
x, x': X
isofhlevel 1 (f (op2 x x') = op2 (f x) (f x'))

    apply (setproperty Y).
Defined.

Definition twobinopfun (X Y : setwith2binop) : UU := ∑ (f : X → Y), istwobinopfun f.

Definition make_twobinopfun {X Y : setwith2binop} (f : X → Y) (is : istwobinopfun f) :
  twobinopfun X Y := f ,, is.

Definition pr1twobinopfun (X Y : setwith2binop) : twobinopfun X Y → (X → Y) := @pr1 _ _.
Coercion pr1twobinopfun : twobinopfun >-> Funclass.

Definition binop1fun {X Y : setwith2binop} (f : twobinopfun X Y) :
  binopfun (setwithbinop1 X) (setwithbinop1 Y) :=
  @make_binopfun (setwithbinop1 X) (setwithbinop1 Y) (pr1 f) (pr1 (pr2 f)).

Definition binop2fun {X Y : setwith2binop} (f : twobinopfun X Y) :
  binopfun (setwithbinop2 X) (setwithbinop2 Y) :=
  @make_binopfun (setwithbinop2 X) (setwithbinop2 Y) (pr1 f) (pr2 (pr2 f)).


X, Y: setwith2binop
f, g: twobinopfun X Y
e: pr1 f = pr1 g
f = g


X, Y: setwith2binop
f, g: twobinopfun X Y
e: pr1 f = pr1 g
f = g

e: pr1 f = pr1 g
pr1 f = pr1 g
X, Y: setwith2binop
f, g: twobinopfun X Y
e: pr1 f = pr1 g
transportf istwobinopfun ?p (pr2 f) = pr2 g

  
X, Y: setwith2binop
f, g: twobinopfun X Y
e: pr1 f = pr1 g
pr1 f = pr1 g
 exact e.

f, g: twobinopfun X Y
e: pr1 f = pr1 g
transportf istwobinopfun e (pr2 f) = pr2 g
 
X, Y: setwith2binop
f, g: twobinopfun X Y
e: pr1 f = pr1 g
isaprop (istwobinopfun (pr1 g))
 use isapropistwobinopfun.
Qed.

Qed.

 pr1 f (op2 x x') = op2 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'))

f: twobinopfun X Y

ax1f:= pr12 f: ∏ x x' : X,
pr1 f (op1 x x') = op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x')
ax2f:= pr22 f: (λ _ : ∏ x x' : X,

       op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'),
 ∏ x x' : X,
 pr1 f (op2 x x') = op2 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'))

       op1 (pr1 g x) (pr1 g x'),
 ∏ x x' : Y,
 pr1 g (op2 x x') = op2 (pr1 g x) (pr1 g x'))
  (pr12 g)
∏ x x' : X,
(pr1 g ∘ pr1 f) (op1 x x') =
op1 ((pr1 g ∘ pr1 f) x) ((pr1 g ∘ pr1 f) x')

X, Y, Z: setwith2binop
f: twobinopfun X Y
g: twobinopfun Y Z
ax1f:= pr12 f: ∏ x x' : X,
pr1 f (op1 x x') = op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x')
ax2f:= pr22 f: (λ _ : ∏ x x' : X,
       pr1 f (op1 x x') =
       op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'),
 ∏ x x' : X,
 pr1 f (op2 x x') = op2 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'))
  (pr12 f)
ax1g:= pr12 g: ∏ x x' : Y,
pr1 g (op1 x x') = op1 (pr1 g x) (pr1 g x')
ax2g:= pr22 g: (λ _ : ∏ x x' : Y,
       pr1 g (op1 x x') =
       op1 (pr1 g x) (pr1 g x'),
 ∏ x x' : Y,
 pr1 g (op2 x x') = op2 (pr1 g x) (pr1 g x'))
  (pr12 g)
a, b: X
pr1 g (pr1 f (op1 a b)) =
op1 (pr1 g (pr1 f a)) (pr1 g (pr1 f b))

f: twobinopfun X Y
g: twobinopfun Y Z
ax1f:= pr12 f: ∏ x x' : X,
pr1 f (op1 x x') = op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x')
ax2f:= pr22 f: (λ _ : ∏ x x' : X,
       pr1 f (op1 x x') =

 ∏ x x' : X,
 pr1 f (op2 x x') = op2 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'))
  (pr12 f)
ax1g:= pr12 g: ∏ x x' : Y,
pr1 g (op1 x x') = op1 (pr1 g x) (pr1 g x')
ax2g:= pr22 g: (λ _ : ∏ x x' : Y,
       pr1 g (op1 x x') =
       op1 (pr1 g x) (pr1 g x'),
 ∏ x x' : Y,
 pr1 g (op2 x x') = op2 (pr1 g x) (pr1 g x'))
  (pr12 g)
a, b: X
pr1 g (op1 (pr1 f a) (pr1 f b)) =
op1 (pr1 g (pr1 f a)) (pr1 g (pr1 f b))

f: twobinopfun X Y
g: twobinopfun Y Z
ax1f:= pr12 f: ∏ x x' : X,
pr1 f (op1 x x') = op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x')
ax2f:= pr22 f: (λ _ : ∏ x x' : X,
       pr1 f (op1 x x') =

 ∏ x x' : X,
 pr1 f (op2 x x') = op2 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'))
  (pr12 f)

       pr1 g (op1 x x') =
       op1 (pr1 g x) (pr1 g x'),
 ∏ x x' : Y,
 pr1 g (op2 x x') = op2 (pr1 g x) (pr1 g x'))
  (pr12 g)
a, b: X
op1 (pr1 g (pr1 f a)) (pr1 g (pr1 f b)) =
op1 (pr1 g (pr1 f a)) (pr1 g (pr1 f b))

    apply idpath.

  (pr12 g)
a, b: X
op2 (pr1 g (pr1 f a)) (pr1 g (pr1 f b)) =
op2 (pr1 g (pr1 f a)) (pr1 g (pr1 f b))

    apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition twobinopfuncomp {X Y Z : setwith2binop} (f : twobinopfun X Y) (g : twobinopfun Y Z) :
  twobinopfun X Z := make_twobinopfun (g ∘ f) (istwobinopfuncomp f g).

Definition twobinopmono (X Y : setwith2binop) : UU := ∑ (f : incl X Y), istwobinopfun f.

Definition make_twobinopmono {X Y : setwith2binop} (f : incl X Y) (is : istwobinopfun f) :
  twobinopmono X Y := f ,, is.

Definition pr1twobinopmono (X Y : setwith2binop) : twobinopmono X Y → incl X Y := @pr1 _ _.
Coercion pr1twobinopmono : twobinopmono >-> incl.

Definition twobinopincltotwobinopfun (X Y : setwith2binop) :
  twobinopmono X Y → twobinopfun X Y := λ f, make_twobinopfun (pr1 (pr1 f)) (pr2 f).
Coercion twobinopincltotwobinopfun : twobinopmono >-> twobinopfun.

Definition binop1mono {X Y : setwith2binop} (f : twobinopmono X Y) :
  binopmono (setwithbinop1 X) (setwithbinop1 Y) :=
  @make_binopmono (setwithbinop1 X) (setwithbinop1 Y) (pr1 f) (pr1 (pr2 f)).

Definition binop2mono {X Y : setwith2binop} (f : twobinopmono X Y) :
  binopmono (setwithbinop2 X) (setwithbinop2 Y) :=
  @make_binopmono (setwithbinop2 X) (setwithbinop2 Y) (pr1 f) (pr2 (pr2 f)).

Definition twobinopmonocomp {X Y Z : setwith2binop} (f : twobinopmono X Y) (g : twobinopmono Y Z) :
  twobinopmono X Z := make_twobinopmono (inclcomp (pr1 f) (pr1 g)) (istwobinopfuncomp f g).

Definition twobinopiso (X Y : setwith2binop) : UU := ∑ (f : X ≃ Y), istwobinopfun f.

Definition make_twobinopiso {X Y : setwith2binop} (f : X ≃ Y) (is : istwobinopfun f) :
  twobinopiso X Y := f ,, is.

Definition pr1twobinopiso (X Y : setwith2binop) : twobinopiso X Y → X ≃ Y := @pr1 _ _.
Coercion pr1twobinopiso : twobinopiso >-> weq.

Definition twobinopisototwobinopmono (X Y : setwith2binop) :
  twobinopiso X Y → twobinopmono X Y := λ f, make_twobinopmono (weqtoincl (pr1 f)) (pr2 f).
Coercion twobinopisototwobinopmono : twobinopiso >-> twobinopmono.

Definition twobinopisototwobinopfun {X Y : setwith2binop} (f : twobinopiso X Y) :
  twobinopfun X Y := make_twobinopfun f (pr2 f).


X, Y: setwith2binop
f, g: twobinopiso X Y
e: pr1 f = pr1 g
f = g


X, Y: setwith2binop
f, g: twobinopiso X Y
e: pr1 f = pr1 g
f = g

  
X, Y: setwith2binop
f, g: twobinopiso X Y
e: pr1 f = pr1 g
pr1 f = pr1 g
X, Y: setwith2binop
f, g: twobinopiso X Y
e: pr1 f = pr1 g
transportf (λ x : X ≃ Y, istwobinopfun x) ?p (pr2 f) =
pr2 g

  
X, Y: setwith2binop
f, g: twobinopiso X Y
e: pr1 f = pr1 g
pr1 f = pr1 g
 exact e.
  
X, Y: setwith2binop
f, g: twobinopiso X Y
e: pr1 f = pr1 g
transportf (λ x : X ≃ Y, istwobinopfun x) e (pr2 f) =
pr2 g
 
X, Y: setwith2binop
f, g: twobinopiso X Y
e: pr1 f = pr1 g
isaprop (istwobinopfun (pr1 g))
 use isapropistwobinopfun.
Qed.

Definition binop1iso {X Y : setwith2binop} (f : twobinopiso X Y) :
  binopiso (setwithbinop1 X) (setwithbinop1 Y) :=
  @make_binopiso (setwithbinop1 X) (setwithbinop1 Y) (pr1 f) (pr1 (pr2 f)).

Definition binop2iso {X Y : setwith2binop} (f : twobinopiso X Y) :
  binopiso (setwithbinop2 X) (setwithbinop2 Y) :=
  @make_binopiso (setwithbinop2 X) (setwithbinop2 Y) (pr1 f) (pr2 (pr2 f)).

Definition twobinopisocomp {X Y Z : setwith2binop} (f : twobinopiso X Y) (g : twobinopiso Y Z) :
  twobinopiso X Z := make_twobinopiso (weqcomp (pr1 f) (pr1 g)) (istwobinopfuncomp f g).


X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopiso X Y
istwobinopfun (invmap (pr1 f))


X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopiso X Y
istwobinopfun (invmap (pr1 f))

ax1f:= pr12 f: ∏ x x' : X,
pr1 f (op1 x x') = op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x')

ax1f:= pr12 f: ∏ x x' : X,
pr1 f (op1 x x') = op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x')
ax2f:= pr22 f: (λ _ : ∏ x x' : X,
       pr1 f (op1 x x') =
       op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'),
 ∏ x x' : X,
 pr1 f (op2 x x') = op2 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'))
  (pr12 f)
istwobinopfun (invmap (pr1 f))

f: twobinopiso X Y

pr1 f (op1 x x') = op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x')
ax2f:= pr22 f: (λ _ : ∏ x x' : X,

       op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'),
 ∏ x x' : X,
 pr1 f (op2 x x') = op2 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'))
  (pr12 f)
∏ x x' : Y,
invmap (pr1 f) (op1 x x') =
op1 (invmap (pr1 f) x) (invmap (pr1 f) x')

 pr1 f (op2 x x') = op2 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'))

f: twobinopiso X Y

ax2f:= pr22 f: (λ _ : ∏ x x' : X,
       pr1 f (op1 x x') =

 ∏ x x' : X,
 pr1 f (op2 x x') = op2 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'))

a, b: Y

X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopiso X Y
ax1f:= pr12 f: ∏ x x' : X,
pr1 f (op1 x x') = op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x')
ax2f:= pr22 f: (λ _ : ∏ x x' : X,
       pr1 f (op1 x x') =
       op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'),
 ∏ x x' : X,
 pr1 f (op2 x x') = op2 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'))
  (pr12 f)
a, b: Y
op2 a b = op2 a b

    apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition invtwobinopiso {X Y : setwith2binop} (f : twobinopiso X Y) :
  twobinopiso Y X := make_twobinopiso (invweq (pr1 f)) (istwobinopfuninvmap f).


X: setwith2binop
twobinopiso X X


X: setwith2binop
twobinopiso X X

  
X: setwith2binop
X ≃ X
X: setwith2binop
istwobinopfun ?f

  
X: setwith2binop
X ≃ X
 use (idweq X).
  
X: setwith2binop
istwobinopfun (idweq X)
 
X: setwith2binop
∏ x x' : X,
idweq X (op1 x x') = op1 (idweq X x) (idweq X x')
X: setwith2binop
∏ x x' : X,
idweq X (op2 x x') = op2 (idweq X x) (idweq X x')

    
X: setwith2binop
∏ x x' : X,
idweq X (op1 x x') = op1 (idweq X x) (idweq X x')
 
X: setwith2binop
x, x': X
idweq X (op1 x x') = op1 (idweq X x) (idweq X x')
 use idpath.
    
X: setwith2binop
∏ x x' : X,
idweq X (op2 x x') = op2 (idweq X x) (idweq X x')
 
X: setwith2binop
x, x': X
idweq X (op2 x x') = op2 (idweq X x) (idweq X x')
 use idpath.
Defined.


(** **** X = Y ≃ (X ≃ Y)
   The idea is to use the composition X = Y ≃ X ╝ Y ≃ (twobinopiso X Y)
*)

Definition setwith2binop_univalence_weq1 (X Y : setwith2binop) : (X = Y) ≃ (X ╝ Y) :=
  total2_paths_equiv _ X Y.


X, Y: setwith2binop
X ╝ Y ≃ twobinopiso X Y


X, Y: setwith2binop
X ╝ Y ≃ twobinopiso X Y

  
X, Y: setwith2binop
pr1 X = pr1 Y ≃ (X ≃ Y)
X, Y: setwith2binop
∏ x : pr1 X = pr1 Y,
(λ x0 : pr1 X = pr1 Y,
 transportf
   (λ x1 : hSet, (λ X : hSet, binop X × binop X) x1)
   x0 (pr2 X) = pr2 Y) x
≃ (λ x0 : X ≃ Y, istwobinopfun x0) (?w x)

  
X, Y: setwith2binop
pr1 X = pr1 Y ≃ (X ≃ Y)
 use hSet_univalence.
  
X, Y: setwith2binop
∏ x : pr1 X = pr1 Y,
(λ x0 : pr1 X = pr1 Y,
 transportf
   (λ x1 : hSet, (λ X : hSet, binop X × binop X) x1)
   x0 (pr2 X) = pr2 Y) x
≃ (λ x0 : X ≃ Y, istwobinopfun x0)
    (hSet_univalence (pr1 X) (pr1 Y) x)
 
X, Y: setwith2binop
e: pr1 X = pr1 Y
(λ x : pr1 X = pr1 Y,
 transportf
   (λ x0 : hSet, (λ X : hSet, binop X × binop X) x0) x
   (pr2 X) = pr2 Y) e
≃ (λ x : X ≃ Y, istwobinopfun x)
    (hSet_univalence (pr1 X) (pr1 Y) e)
 
X, Y: setwith2binop
e: pr1 X = pr1 Y
istwobinopfun (hSet_univalence (pr1 X) (pr1 Y) e)
≃ transportf
    (λ x : hSet, (λ X : hSet, binop X × binop X) x) e
    (pr2 X) = pr2 Y
 
X: hSet
Xop: binop X × binop X
Y: setwith2binop
e: pr1 (X,, Xop) = pr1 Y
istwobinopfun
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 Y) e)
≃ transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x × binop x) e
    (pr2 (X,, Xop)) = pr2 Y
 
X: hSet
Xop: binop X × binop X
Y: hSet
Yop: binop Y × binop Y
e: pr1 (X,, Xop) = pr1 (Y,, Yop)
istwobinopfun
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (Y,, Yop)) e)
≃ transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x × binop x) e
    (pr2 (X,, Xop)) = pr2 (Y,, Yop)
 
X: hSet
Xop: binop X × binop X
Y: hSet
Yop: binop Y × binop Y
e: X = Y
istwobinopfun
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (Y,, Yop)) e)
≃ transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x × binop x) e
    (pr2 (X,, Xop)) = pr2 (Y,, Yop)

    
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X × binop X
istwobinopfun
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X))
≃ transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x × binop x)
    (idpath X) (pr2 (X,, Xop)) = pr2 (X,, Yop)
 
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X × binop X
istwobinopfun
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X))
→ transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x × binop x)
    (idpath X) (pr2 (X,, Xop)) = pr2 (X,, Yop)
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X × binop X
transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x × binop x) (idpath X)
  (pr2 (X,, Xop)) = pr2 (X,, Yop)
→ istwobinopfun
    (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
       (idpath X))
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X × binop X
isaprop
  (istwobinopfun
     (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
        (idpath X)))
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X × binop X
isaprop
  (transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x × binop x)
     (idpath X) (pr2 (X,, Xop)) = pr2 (X,, Yop))

    
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X × binop X
istwobinopfun
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X))
→ transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x × binop x)
    (idpath X) (pr2 (X,, Xop)) = pr2 (X,, Yop)
 
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X × binop X
i: istwobinopfun
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X))
transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x × binop x) (idpath X)
  (pr2 (X,, Xop)) = pr2 (X,, Yop)

      
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X × binop X
i: istwobinopfun
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X))
pr1
  (transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x × binop x)
     (idpath X) (pr2 (X,, Xop))) = pr12 (X,, Yop)
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X × binop X
i: istwobinopfun
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X))
pr2
  (transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x × binop x)
     (idpath X) (pr2 (X,, Xop))) = pr22 (X,, Yop)

      
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X × binop X
i: istwobinopfun
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X))
pr1
  (transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x × binop x)
     (idpath X) (pr2 (X,, Xop))) = pr12 (X,, Yop)
 
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X × binop X
i: istwobinopfun
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X))
homotsec
  (pr1
     (transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x × binop x)
        (idpath X) (pr2 (X,, Xop)))) (pr12 (X,, Yop))
 
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X × binop X
i: istwobinopfun
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X))
x1: pr1 (X,, Yop)
pr1
  (transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x × binop x)
     (idpath X) (pr2 (X,, Xop))) x1 =
(pr12 (X,, Yop)) x1

        
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X × binop X
i: istwobinopfun
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X))
x1: pr1 (X,, Yop)
homotsec
  (pr1
     (transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x × binop x)
        (idpath X) (pr2 (X,, Xop))) x1)
  ((pr12 (X,, Yop)) x1)
 
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X × binop X
i: istwobinopfun
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X))
x1, x2: pr1 (X,, Yop)
pr1
  (transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x × binop x)
     (idpath X) (pr2 (X,, Xop))) x1 x2 =
(pr12 (X,, Yop)) x1 x2

        exact ((dirprod_pr1 i) x1 x2).
      
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X × binop X
i: istwobinopfun
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X))
pr2
  (transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x × binop x)
     (idpath X) (pr2 (X,, Xop))) = pr22 (X,, Yop)
 
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X × binop X
i: istwobinopfun
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X))
homotsec
  (pr2
     (transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x × binop x)
        (idpath X) (pr2 (X,, Xop)))) (pr22 (X,, Yop))
 
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X × binop X
i: istwobinopfun
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X))
x1: pr1 (X,, Yop)
pr2
  (transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x × binop x)
     (idpath X) (pr2 (X,, Xop))) x1 =
(pr22 (X,, Yop)) x1

        
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X × binop X
i: istwobinopfun
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X))
x1: pr1 (X,, Yop)
homotsec
  (pr2
     (transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x × binop x)
        (idpath X) (pr2 (X,, Xop))) x1)
  ((pr22 (X,, Yop)) x1)
 
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X × binop X
i: istwobinopfun
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X))
x1, x2: pr1 (X,, Yop)
pr2
  (transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x × binop x)
     (idpath X) (pr2 (X,, Xop))) x1 x2 =
(pr22 (X,, Yop)) x1 x2

        exact ((dirprod_pr2 i) x1 x2).
    
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X × binop X
transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x × binop x) (idpath X)
  (pr2 (X,, Xop)) = pr2 (X,, Yop)
→ istwobinopfun
    (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
       (idpath X))
 
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X × binop X
e: transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x × binop x)
  (idpath X) (pr2 (X,, Xop)) = pr2 (X,, Yop)
istwobinopfun
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X))
 
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X × binop X
e: Xop = Yop
istwobinopfun
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X))

      
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X × binop X
e: Xop = Yop
∏ x x' : X,, Xop,
hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
  (idpath X) (op1 x x') =
op1
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X) x)
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X) x')
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X × binop X
e: Xop = Yop
∏ x x' : X,, Xop,
hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
  (idpath X) (op2 x x') =
op2
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X) x)
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X) x')

      
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X × binop X
e: Xop = Yop
∏ x x' : X,, Xop,
hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
  (idpath X) (op1 x x') =
op1
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X) x)
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X) x')
 
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X × binop X
e: Xop = Yop
x1, x2: X,, Xop
hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
  (idpath X) (op1 x1 x2) =
op1
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X) x1)
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X) x2)
 
X: hSet
Xop: binop X × binop X
x1, x2: X,, Xop
hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Xop))
  (idpath X) (op1 x1 x2) =
op1
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Xop))
     (idpath X) x1)
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Xop))
     (idpath X) x2)
 use idpath.
      
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X × binop X
e: Xop = Yop
∏ x x' : X,, Xop,
hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
  (idpath X) (op2 x x') =
op2
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X) x)
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X) x')
 
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X × binop X
e: Xop = Yop
x1, x2: X,, Xop
hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
  (idpath X) (op2 x1 x2) =
op2
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X) x1)
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
     (idpath X) x2)
 
X: hSet
Xop: binop X × binop X
x1, x2: X,, Xop
hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Xop))
  (idpath X) (op2 x1 x2) =
op2
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Xop))
     (idpath X) x1)
  (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Xop))
     (idpath X) x2)
 use idpath.
    
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X × binop X
isaprop
  (istwobinopfun
     (hSet_univalence (pr1 (X,, Xop)) (pr1 (X,, Yop))
        (idpath X)))
 use isapropistwobinopfun.
    
X: hSet
Xop, Yop: binop X × binop X
isaprop
  (transportf (λ x : hSet, binop x × binop x)
     (idpath X) (pr2 (X,, Xop)) = pr2 (X,, Yop))
 use isasettwobinoponhSet.
Defined.
Opaque setwith2binop_univalence_weq2.


X, Y: setwith2binop
X = Y → twobinopiso X Y


X, Y: setwith2binop
X = Y → twobinopiso X Y

  
X, Y: setwith2binop
e: X = Y
twobinopiso X Y
 
X: setwith2binop
twobinopiso X X
 exact (idtwobinopiso X).
Defined.


X, Y: setwith2binop
isweq (setwith2binop_univalence_map X Y)


X, Y: setwith2binop
isweq (setwith2binop_univalence_map X Y)

  
X, Y: setwith2binop
X = Y → twobinopiso X Y
X, Y: setwith2binop
homotsec ?f1 (setwith2binop_univalence_map X Y)
X, Y: setwith2binop
isweq ?f1

  
X, Y: setwith2binop
X = Y → twobinopiso X Y
 exact (weqcomp (setwith2binop_univalence_weq1 X Y) (setwith2binop_univalence_weq2 X Y)).
  
X, Y: setwith2binop
homotsec
  (setwith2binop_univalence_weq2 X Y
   ∘ setwith2binop_univalence_weq1 X Y)%weq
  (setwith2binop_univalence_map X Y)
 
X, Y: setwith2binop
e: X = Y
(setwith2binop_univalence_weq2 X Y
 ∘ setwith2binop_univalence_weq1 X Y)%weq e =
setwith2binop_univalence_map X Y e
 
X: setwith2binop
(setwith2binop_univalence_weq2 X X
 ∘ setwith2binop_univalence_weq1 X X)%weq (idpath X) =
setwith2binop_univalence_map X X (idpath X)
 use weqcomp_to_funcomp_app.
  
X, Y: setwith2binop
isweq
  (setwith2binop_univalence_weq2 X Y
   ∘ setwith2binop_univalence_weq1 X Y)%weq
 use weqproperty.
Defined.
Opaque setwith2binop_univalence_isweq.

Definition setwith2binop_univalence (X Y : setwith2binop) : (X = Y) ≃ (twobinopiso X Y)
  := make_weq
    (setwith2binop_univalence_map X Y)
    (setwith2binop_univalence_isweq X Y).


(** * 4.3. Transport of properties of a pair of binary operations *)


X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopmono X Y
is: isldistr op1 op2
isldistr op1 op2


X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopmono X Y
is: isldistr op1 op2
isldistr op1 op2

  
X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopmono X Y
is: isldistr op1 op2
ax1f:= pr12 f: ∏ x x' : X,
pr1 f (op1 x x') = op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x')
isldistr op1 op2
 
X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopmono X Y
is: isldistr op1 op2
ax1f:= pr12 f: ∏ x x' : X,
pr1 f (op1 x x') = op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x')
ax2f:= pr22 f: (λ _ : ∏ x x' : X,
       pr1 f (op1 x x') =
       op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'),
 ∏ x x' : X,
 pr1 f (op2 x x') = op2 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'))
  (pr12 f)
isldistr op1 op2

  
X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopmono X Y
is: isldistr op1 op2
ax1f:= pr12 f: ∏ x x' : X,
pr1 f (op1 x x') = op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x')
ax2f:= pr22 f: (λ _ : ∏ x x' : X,
       pr1 f (op1 x x') =
       op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'),
 ∏ x x' : X,
 pr1 f (op2 x x') = op2 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'))
  (pr12 f)
a, b, c: X
op2 c (op1 a b) = op1 (op2 c a) (op2 c b)
 
X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopmono X Y
is: isldistr op1 op2
ax1f:= pr12 f: ∏ x x' : X,
pr1 f (op1 x x') = op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x')
ax2f:= pr22 f: (λ _ : ∏ x x' : X,
       pr1 f (op1 x x') =
       op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'),
 ∏ x x' : X,
 pr1 f (op2 x x') = op2 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'))
  (pr12 f)
a, b, c: X
(pr11 f) (op2 c (op1 a b)) =
(pr11 f) (op1 (op2 c a) (op2 c b))

  
X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopmono X Y
is: isldistr op1 op2
ax1f:= pr12 f: ∏ x x' : X,
pr1 f (op1 x x') = op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x')
ax2f:= pr22 f: (λ _ : ∏ x x' : X,
       pr1 f (op1 x x') =
       op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'),
 ∏ x x' : X,
 pr1 f (op2 x x') = op2 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'))
  (pr12 f)
a, b, c: X
pr1 f (op2 c (op1 a b)) =
pr1 f (op1 (op2 c a) (op2 c b))

  
X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopmono X Y
is: isldistr op1 op2
ax1f:= pr12 f: ∏ x x' : X,
pr1 f (op1 x x') = op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x')
ax2f:= pr22 f: (λ _ : ∏ x x' : X,
       pr1 f (op1 x x') =
       op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'),
 ∏ x x' : X,
 pr1 f (op2 x x') = op2 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'))
  (pr12 f)
a, b, c: X
op2 (pr1 f c) (pr1 f (op1 a b)) =
pr1 f (op1 (op2 c a) (op2 c b))

  
X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopmono X Y
is: isldistr op1 op2
ax1f:= pr12 f: ∏ x x' : X,
pr1 f (op1 x x') = op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x')
ax2f:= pr22 f: (λ _ : ∏ x x' : X,
       pr1 f (op1 x x') =
       op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'),
 ∏ x x' : X,
 pr1 f (op2 x x') = op2 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'))
  (pr12 f)
a, b, c: X
op2 (pr1 f c) (op1 (pr1 f a) (pr1 f b)) =
pr1 f (op1 (op2 c a) (op2 c b))

  
X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopmono X Y
is: isldistr op1 op2
ax1f:= pr12 f: ∏ x x' : X,
pr1 f (op1 x x') = op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x')
ax2f:= pr22 f: (λ _ : ∏ x x' : X,
       pr1 f (op1 x x') =
       op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'),
 ∏ x x' : X,
 pr1 f (op2 x x') = op2 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'))
  (pr12 f)
a, b, c: X
op2 (pr1 f c) (op1 (pr1 f a) (pr1 f b)) =
op1 (pr1 f (op2 c a)) (pr1 f (op2 c b))

  
X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopmono X Y
is: isldistr op1 op2
ax1f:= pr12 f: ∏ x x' : X,
pr1 f (op1 x x') = op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x')
ax2f:= pr22 f: (λ _ : ∏ x x' : X,
       pr1 f (op1 x x') =
       op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'),
 ∏ x x' : X,
 pr1 f (op2 x x') = op2 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'))
  (pr12 f)
a, b, c: X
op2 (pr1 f c) (op1 (pr1 f a) (pr1 f b)) =
op1 (op2 (pr1 f c) (pr1 f a)) (pr1 f (op2 c b))

  
X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopmono X Y
is: isldistr op1 op2
ax1f:= pr12 f: ∏ x x' : X,
pr1 f (op1 x x') = op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x')
ax2f:= pr22 f: (λ _ : ∏ x x' : X,
       pr1 f (op1 x x') =
       op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'),
 ∏ x x' : X,
 pr1 f (op2 x x') = op2 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'))
  (pr12 f)
a, b, c: X
op2 (pr1 f c) (op1 (pr1 f a) (pr1 f b)) =
op1 (op2 (pr1 f c) (pr1 f a))
  (op2 (pr1 f c) (pr1 f b))

  apply is.
Qed.


X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopmono X Y
is: isrdistr op1 op2
isrdistr op1 op2


X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopmono X Y
is: isrdistr op1 op2
isrdistr op1 op2

  
X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopmono X Y
is: isrdistr op1 op2
ax1f:= pr12 f: ∏ x x' : X,
pr1 f (op1 x x') = op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x')
isrdistr op1 op2
 
X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopmono X Y
is: isrdistr op1 op2
ax1f:= pr12 f: ∏ x x' : X,
pr1 f (op1 x x') = op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x')
ax2f:= pr22 f: (λ _ : ∏ x x' : X,
       pr1 f (op1 x x') =
       op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'),
 ∏ x x' : X,
 pr1 f (op2 x x') = op2 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'))
  (pr12 f)
isrdistr op1 op2

  
X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopmono X Y
is: isrdistr op1 op2
ax1f:= pr12 f: ∏ x x' : X,
pr1 f (op1 x x') = op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x')
ax2f:= pr22 f: (λ _ : ∏ x x' : X,
       pr1 f (op1 x x') =
       op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'),
 ∏ x x' : X,
 pr1 f (op2 x x') = op2 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'))
  (pr12 f)
a, b, c: X
op2 (op1 a b) c = op1 (op2 a c) (op2 b c)

  
X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopmono X Y
is: isrdistr op1 op2
ax1f:= pr12 f: ∏ x x' : X,
pr1 f (op1 x x') = op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x')
ax2f:= pr22 f: (λ _ : ∏ x x' : X,
       pr1 f (op1 x x') =
       op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'),
 ∏ x x' : X,
 pr1 f (op2 x x') = op2 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'))
  (pr12 f)
a, b, c: X
(pr11 f) (op2 (op1 a b) c) =
(pr11 f) (op1 (op2 a c) (op2 b c))

  
X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopmono X Y
is: isrdistr op1 op2
ax1f:= pr12 f: ∏ x x' : X,
pr1 f (op1 x x') = op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x')
ax2f:= pr22 f: (λ _ : ∏ x x' : X,
       pr1 f (op1 x x') =
       op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'),
 ∏ x x' : X,
 pr1 f (op2 x x') = op2 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'))
  (pr12 f)
a, b, c: X
pr1 f (op2 (op1 a b) c) =
pr1 f (op1 (op2 a c) (op2 b c))

  
X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopmono X Y
is: isrdistr op1 op2
ax1f:= pr12 f: ∏ x x' : X,
pr1 f (op1 x x') = op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x')
ax2f:= pr22 f: (λ _ : ∏ x x' : X,
       pr1 f (op1 x x') =
       op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'),
 ∏ x x' : X,
 pr1 f (op2 x x') = op2 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'))
  (pr12 f)
a, b, c: X
op2 (pr1 f (op1 a b)) (pr1 f c) =
pr1 f (op1 (op2 a c) (op2 b c))

  
X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopmono X Y
is: isrdistr op1 op2
ax1f:= pr12 f: ∏ x x' : X,
pr1 f (op1 x x') = op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x')
ax2f:= pr22 f: (λ _ : ∏ x x' : X,
       pr1 f (op1 x x') =
       op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'),
 ∏ x x' : X,
 pr1 f (op2 x x') = op2 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'))
  (pr12 f)
a, b, c: X
op2 (op1 (pr1 f a) (pr1 f b)) (pr1 f c) =
pr1 f (op1 (op2 a c) (op2 b c))

  
X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopmono X Y
is: isrdistr op1 op2
ax1f:= pr12 f: ∏ x x' : X,
pr1 f (op1 x x') = op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x')
ax2f:= pr22 f: (λ _ : ∏ x x' : X,
       pr1 f (op1 x x') =
       op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'),
 ∏ x x' : X,
 pr1 f (op2 x x') = op2 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'))
  (pr12 f)
a, b, c: X
op2 (op1 (pr1 f a) (pr1 f b)) (pr1 f c) =
op1 (pr1 f (op2 a c)) (pr1 f (op2 b c))

  
X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopmono X Y
is: isrdistr op1 op2
ax1f:= pr12 f: ∏ x x' : X,
pr1 f (op1 x x') = op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x')
ax2f:= pr22 f: (λ _ : ∏ x x' : X,
       pr1 f (op1 x x') =
       op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'),
 ∏ x x' : X,
 pr1 f (op2 x x') = op2 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'))
  (pr12 f)
a, b, c: X
op2 (op1 (pr1 f a) (pr1 f b)) (pr1 f c) =
op1 (op2 (pr1 f a) (pr1 f c)) (pr1 f (op2 b c))

  
X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopmono X Y
is: isrdistr op1 op2
ax1f:= pr12 f: ∏ x x' : X,
pr1 f (op1 x x') = op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x')
ax2f:= pr22 f: (λ _ : ∏ x x' : X,
       pr1 f (op1 x x') =
       op1 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'),
 ∏ x x' : X,
 pr1 f (op2 x x') = op2 (pr1 f x) (pr1 f x'))
  (pr12 f)
a, b, c: X
op2 (op1 (pr1 f a) (pr1 f b)) (pr1 f c) =
op1 (op2 (pr1 f a) (pr1 f c))
  (op2 (pr1 f b) (pr1 f c))

  apply is.
Qed.

Definition isdistrmonob {X Y : setwith2binop} (f : twobinopmono X Y)
           (is : isdistr (@op1 Y) (@op2 Y)) :
  isdistr (@op1 X) (@op2 X) := isldistrmonob f (pr1 is) ,, isrdistrmonob f (pr2 is).

Notation isldistrisob := isldistrmonob.
Notation isrdistrisob := isrdistrmonob.
Notation isdistrisob := isdistrmonob.


X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopiso X Y
is: isldistr op1 op2
isldistr op1 op2


X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopiso X Y
is: isldistr op1 op2
isldistr op1 op2

  apply (isldistrisob (invtwobinopiso f) is).
Defined.


X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopiso X Y
is: isrdistr op1 op2
isrdistr op1 op2


X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopiso X Y
is: isrdistr op1 op2
isrdistr op1 op2

  apply (isrdistrisob (invtwobinopiso f) is).
Defined.

∑ axs : isabmonoidop op1 × ismonoidop op2,
(∏ x : Y,
 op2 (unel_is (pr1 axs)) x = unel_is (pr1 axs))
× (∏ x : Y,
   op2 x (unel_is (pr1 axs)) = unel_is (pr1 axs))

(∏ x : Y,

× (∏ x : Y,

X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopiso X Y
is: isrigops op1 op2
(∏ x : Y,
 op2
   (unel_is
      (pr1
         (isabmonoidopisof (binop1iso f)
            (rigop1axs_is is),,
          ismonoidopisof (binop2iso f)
            (rigop2axs_is is)))) x =
 unel_is
   (pr1
      (isabmonoidopisof (binop1iso f)
         (rigop1axs_is is),,
       ismonoidopisof (binop2iso f) (rigop2axs_is is))))
× (∏ x : Y,
   op2 x
     (unel_is
        (pr1
           (isabmonoidopisof (binop1iso f)
              (rigop1axs_is is),,
            ismonoidopisof (binop2iso f)
              (rigop2axs_is is)))) =
   unel_is
     (pr1
        (isabmonoidopisof (binop1iso f)
           (rigop1axs_is is),,
         ismonoidopisof (binop2iso f)
           (rigop2axs_is is))))

    
X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopiso X Y
is: isrigops op1 op2
(∏ x : Y,
 op2
   (unel_is
      (ismonoidopisof (binop1iso f) (rigop1axs_is is)))
   x =
 unel_is
   (ismonoidopisof (binop1iso f) (rigop1axs_is is)))
× (∏ x : Y,
   op2 x
     (unel_is
        (ismonoidopisof (binop1iso f)
           (rigop1axs_is is))) =
   unel_is
     (ismonoidopisof (binop1iso f) (rigop1axs_is is)))

is: isrigops op1 op2
isdistr op1 op2

is: isrigops op1 op2
isdistr op1 op2
 apply (rigdistraxs_is is).
Defined.


X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopiso X Y
is: isrigops op1 op2
isrigops op1 op2


X, Y: setwith2binop
f: twobinopiso X Y
is: isrigops op1 op2
isrigops op1 op2

  apply (isrigopsisof (invtwobinopiso f) is).
Defined.

Definition isringopsisof {X Y : setwith2binop} (f : twobinopiso X Y)
           (is : isringops (@op1 X) (@op2 X)) : isringops (@op1 Y) (@op2 Y) :=
    (isabgropisof (binop1iso f) (ringop1axs_is is) ,,
    ismonoidopisof (binop2iso f) (ringop2axs_is is)) ,,
    isdistrisof f (pr2 is).

Definition isringopsisob {X Y : setwith2binop} (f : twobinopiso X Y)
           (is : isringops (@op1 Y) (@op2 Y)) : isringops (@op1 X) (@op2 X) :=
  (isabgropisob (binop1iso f) (ringop1axs_is is) ,,
  ismonoidopisob (binop2iso f) (ringop2axs_is is)) ,,
  isdistrisob f (pr2 is).

Definition iscommringopsisof {X Y : setwith2binop} (f : twobinopiso X Y)
           (is : iscommringops (@op1 X) (@op2 X)) : iscommringops (@op1 Y) (@op2 Y) :=
  isringopsisof f is ,, iscommisof (binop2iso f) (pr2 is).

Definition iscommringopsisob {X Y : setwith2binop} (f : twobinopiso X Y)
           (is : iscommringops (@op1 Y) (@op2 Y)) : iscommringops (@op1 X) (@op2 X) :=
  isringopsisob f is ,, iscommisob (binop2iso f) (pr2 is).


(** * 4.4. Subobjects *)

Definition issubsetwith2binop {X : setwith2binop} (A : hsubtype X) : UU :=
  (∏ a a' : A, A (op1 (pr1 a) (pr1 a'))) × (∏ a a' : A, A (op2 (pr1 a) (pr1 a'))).


X: setwith2binop
A: hsubtype X
isaprop (issubsetwith2binop A)


X: setwith2binop
A: hsubtype X
isaprop (issubsetwith2binop A)

  
X: setwith2binop
A: hsubtype X
isofhlevel 1 (∏ a a' : A, A (op1 (pr1 a) (pr1 a')))
X: setwith2binop
A: hsubtype X
isofhlevel 1 (∏ a a' : A, A (op2 (pr1 a) (pr1 a')))

A: hsubtype X
isofhlevel 1 (∏ a a' : A, A (op1 (pr1 a) (pr1 a')))
 
X: setwith2binop

∏ t : A,
isofhlevel 1 (∏ a' : A, A (op1 (pr1 t) (pr1 a')))

a: A
isofhlevel 1 (∏ a' : A, A (op1 (pr1 a) (pr1 a')))

a: A
∏ t : A, isofhlevel 1 (A (op1 (pr1 a) (pr1 t)))
 
X: setwith2binop
A: hsubtype X
a, a': A
isofhlevel 1 (A (op1 (pr1 a) (pr1 a')))

    apply (pr2 (A (op1 (pr1 a) (pr1 a')))).
  
X: setwith2binop
A: hsubtype X
isofhlevel 1 (∏ a a' : A, A (op2 (pr1 a) (pr1 a')))
 
X: setwith2binop
A: hsubtype X
∏ t : A,
isofhlevel 1 (∏ a' : A, A (op2 (pr1 t) (pr1 a')))
 
X: setwith2binop
A: hsubtype X
a: A
isofhlevel 1 (∏ a' : A, A (op2 (pr1 a) (pr1 a')))

    
X: setwith2binop
A: hsubtype X
a: A
∏ t : A, isofhlevel 1 (A (op2 (pr1 a) (pr1 t)))
 
X: setwith2binop
A: hsubtype X
a, a': A
isofhlevel 1 (A (op2 (pr1 a) (pr1 a')))

    apply (pr2 (A (op2 (pr1 a) (pr1 a')))).
Defined.

Definition subsetswith2binop (X : setwith2binop) : UU :=
  ∑ (A : hsubtype X), issubsetwith2binop A.

Definition make_subsetswith2binop {X : setwith2binop} (t : hsubtype X) (H : issubsetwith2binop t)
  : subsetswith2binop X
  := t ,, H.

Definition subsetswith2binopconstr {X : setwith2binop} :
  ∏ (t : hsubtype X), (λ A : hsubtype X, issubsetwith2binop A) t →
                       ∑ A : hsubtype X, issubsetwith2binop A :=
  @make_subsetswith2binop X.

Definition pr1subsetswith2binop (X : setwith2binop) : subsetswith2binop X → hsubtype X :=
  @pr1 _ (λ A : hsubtype X, issubsetwith2binop A).
Coercion pr1subsetswith2binop : subsetswith2binop >-> hsubtype.


X: setwith2binop
subsetswith2binop X


X: setwith2binop
subsetswith2binop X

(λ _ : X, htrue) → (λ _ : X, htrue) → htrue

x, x': λ _ : X, htrue
htrue
 apply tt.

(λ _ : X, htrue) → (λ _ : X, htrue) → htrue

htrue
 apply tt.
Defined.

setwith2binop

setwith2binop

(isasetsubset (pr1carrier A) (setproperty X) (isinclpr1carrier A))
:
hSet: hSet
setwith2binop

  (isasetsubset (pr1carrier A) 
     (setproperty X) (isinclpr1carrier A))
:

binop aset × binop aset

A: subsetswith2binop X
aset:= make_hSet A
  (isasetsubset (pr1carrier A) 
     (setproperty X) (isinclpr1carrier A))
:
hSet: hSet
subopp1:= (λ a a' : A,
 make_carrier A
   (op1 (pr1carrier A a) (pr1carrier A a'))
   ((pr12 A) a a'))
:
A → A → A: A → A → A
binop aset × binop aset

  
X: setwith2binop
A: subsetswith2binop X
aset:= make_hSet A
  (isasetsubset (pr1carrier A) 
     (setproperty X) (isinclpr1carrier A))
:
hSet: hSet
subopp1:= (λ a a' : A,
 make_carrier A
   (op1 (pr1carrier A a) (pr1carrier A a'))
   ((pr12 A) a a'))
:
A → A → A: A → A → A
subopp2:= (λ a a' : A,
 make_carrier A
   (op2 (pr1carrier A a) (pr1carrier A a'))
   ((pr22 A) a a'))
:
A → A → A: A → A → A
binop aset × binop aset

  
X: setwith2binop
A: subsetswith2binop X
aset:= make_hSet A
  (isasetsubset (pr1carrier A) 
     (setproperty X) (isinclpr1carrier A))
:
hSet: hSet
subopp1:= (λ a a' : A,
 make_carrier A
   (op1 (pr1carrier A a) (pr1carrier A a'))
   ((pr12 A) a a'))
:
A → A → A: A → A → A
subopp2:= (λ a a' : A,
 make_carrier A
   (op2 (pr1carrier A a) (pr1carrier A a'))
   ((pr22 A) a a'))
:
A → A → A: A → A → A
binop A × binop A
 exact (subopp1 ,, subopp2).
Defined.
Coercion carrierofsubsetwith2binop : subsetswith2binop >-> setwith2binop.


(** * 4.5. Quotient objects *)

Definition is2binophrel {X : setwith2binop} (R : hrel X) : UU :=
  (@isbinophrel (setwithbinop1 X) R) × (@isbinophrel (setwithbinop2 X) R).


X: setwith2binop
R: hrel X
isaprop (is2binophrel R)


X: setwith2binop
R: hrel X
isaprop (is2binophrel R)

  
X: setwith2binop
R: hrel X
isofhlevel 1 (isbinophrel R)
X: setwith2binop
R: hrel X
isofhlevel 1 (isbinophrel R)

  
X: setwith2binop
R: hrel X
isofhlevel 1 (isbinophrel R)
 apply isapropisbinophrel.
  
X: setwith2binop
R: hrel X
isofhlevel 1 (isbinophrel R)
 apply isapropisbinophrel.
Defined.


X: setwith2binop
R: hrel X
is: istrans R
isb: is2binophrel R
iscomprelrelfun2 R R op1 × iscomprelrelfun2 R R op2


X: setwith2binop
R: hrel X
is: istrans R
isb: is2binophrel R
iscomprelrelfun2 R R op1 × iscomprelrelfun2 R R op2

is: istrans R
isb: is2binophrel R
iscomprelrelfun2 R R op1
X: setwith2binop

is: istrans R
isb: is2binophrel R
iscomprelrelfun2 R R op2

  
X: setwith2binop
R: hrel X
is: istrans R
isb: is2binophrel R
iscomprelrelfun2 R R op1
 apply (@iscompbinoptransrel (setwithbinop1 X) R is (pr1 isb)).
  
X: setwith2binop
R: hrel X
is: istrans R
isb: is2binophrel R
iscomprelrelfun2 R R op2
 apply (@iscompbinoptransrel (setwithbinop2 X) R is (pr2 isb)).
Defined.

Definition twobinophrel (X : setwith2binop) : UU := ∑ (R : hrel X), is2binophrel R.

Definition make_twobinophrel {X : setwith2binop} (t : hrel X) (H : is2binophrel t)
  : twobinophrel X
  := t ,, H.

Definition pr1twobinophrel (X : setwith2binop) : twobinophrel X → hrel X :=
  @pr1 _ (λ R : hrel X, is2binophrel R).
Coercion pr1twobinophrel : twobinophrel >-> hrel.

Definition twobinoppo (X : setwith2binop) : UU := ∑ (R : po X), is2binophrel R.

Definition make_twobinoppo {X : setwith2binop} (t : po X) (H : is2binophrel t)
  : twobinoppo X
  := t ,, H.

Definition pr1twobinoppo (X : setwith2binop) : twobinoppo X → po X :=
  @pr1 _ (λ R : po X, is2binophrel R).
Coercion pr1twobinoppo : twobinoppo >-> po.

Definition twobinopeqrel (X : setwith2binop) : UU := ∑ (R : eqrel X), is2binophrel R.

Definition make_twobinopeqrel {X : setwith2binop} (t : eqrel X) (H : is2binophrel t)
  : twobinopeqrel X
  := t ,, H.

Definition pr1twobinopeqrel (X : setwith2binop) : twobinopeqrel X → eqrel X :=
  @pr1 _ (λ R : eqrel X, is2binophrel R).
Coercion pr1twobinopeqrel : twobinopeqrel >-> eqrel.

setwith2binop

qtset:= setquotinset R: hSet

R: twobinopeqrel X
qt:= setquot R: UU
qtset:= setquotinset R: hSet
iscomp1: iscomprelrelfun2 R R op1
qtop1:= setquotfun2 R R op1 iscomp1: setquot R → setquot R → setquot R
binop qtset × binop qtset

  
X: setwith2binop
R: twobinopeqrel X
qt:= setquot R: UU
qtset:= setquotinset R: hSet

qtop1:= setquotfun2 R R op1 iscomp1: setquot R → setquot R → setquot R
iscomp2: iscomprelrelfun2 R R op2
binop qtset × binop qtset

  
X: setwith2binop
R: twobinopeqrel X
qt:= setquot R: UU
qtset:= setquotinset R: hSet
iscomp1: iscomprelrelfun2 R R op1
qtop1:= setquotfun2 R R op1 iscomp1: setquot R → setquot R → setquot R
iscomp2: iscomprelrelfun2 R R op2
qtop2:= setquotfun2 R R op2 iscomp2: setquot R → setquot R → setquot R
binop qtset × binop qtset

  
X: setwith2binop
R: twobinopeqrel X
qt:= setquot R: UU
qtset:= setquotinset R: hSet
iscomp1: iscomprelrelfun2 R R op1
qtop1:= setquotfun2 R R op1 iscomp1: setquot R → setquot R → setquot R
iscomp2: iscomprelrelfun2 R R op2
qtop2:= setquotfun2 R R op2 iscomp2: setquot R → setquot R → setquot R
binop (setquot R) × binop (setquot R)
 exact (qtop1 ,, qtop2).
Defined.


(** * 4.6. Direct products *)


X, Y: setwith2binop
setwith2binop


X, Y: setwith2binop
setwith2binop

  
X, Y: setwith2binop
binop (setdirprod X Y) × binop (setdirprod X Y)
 
X, Y: setwith2binop
binop (X × Y) × binop (X × Y)

  (* ??? same issue as with setwithbinopdirpro above *)
  exact (
    (λ xy xy', (op1 (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy')) ,, (op1 (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy'))) ,,
    (λ xy xy', (op2 (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy')) ,, (op2 (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')))
  ).
Defined.


(** * 5. Infinitary operations *)

(** Limit a more general infinitary operation to a binary operation *)


X: hSet
op: ∏ I : UU, (I → X) → X
binop X


X: hSet
op: ∏ I : UU, (I → X) → X
binop X

  intros x y; exact (op _ (bool_rect (λ _, X) x y)).
Defined.
